name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32097%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dReRUwaVD9%2flff7m6j9fdA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32098%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1hB3q8yS5i1ma0RrsGj97g&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32099%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DhHOBPa1buwOPsrbzqJsCw&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News

name: Larry Klayman
subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zao1mank1rsmk175ij7plavgalahilh6e4l8gef0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g64ob2c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqivr8cekhrtddv8pk65b9sup4tora1gq3fad280_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g64ob2c9h2bs) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zub28d0oplcoa615fen63e1nn1vimpt2lk98la18_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g64ob2c9h2bs)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what's really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

**That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years.

You've seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi8mffqmbmkqvcl6f3o9p2e3u8ov6hqa456qb93g_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g64ob2c9h2bs)**

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgkvaf1r039lc3pj1qa8389nfkgac0dlunks19mo_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g64ob2c9h2bs)**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn9r5dn78ec0mq61kft58geef52bdtbr0aop33oo_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g64ob2c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbglskm7k12lr1gk2uqnkadn5naiks7kch437490_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g64ob2c5h2bs)

name: American Action News
subject: National Referendum on Religious Liberty
body:
I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb1ma8omp7v55p579mcm2grl07c2tmdg4vlm19t0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g6cpj4c3h2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo32bti8ua1abskqnaprcun8468bad3kvoer98t0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g6cpj4c3h2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include: **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z91cd4isgpvjken52o49oecfelfct0u1oo0hfbf8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g6cpj4c3h2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgbvk2qlir0u6khehmki30crnrcd4cuodr15s8qg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64or1c9h66oh1k8gn48n24hjm8pj0c1j6cp30s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zscarnm6jv7h1op8h459r94l5qpc6onp270edtj0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g6cpj4c3h2bs)_

body:
I’ll be real honest with you

| |

I’ll be real honest with you: My friends over in the House have a huge deadline coming up, and I just got word they’re **WAY OFF TRACK** to hit their goal. Let me tell you - it’d be a complete disaster if they missed it.

To make matters even worse, Liberals are firing up the Democrat Machine to smear every last Conservative in the House and kick them out of office **PERMANENTLY.**

So with all the respect in the world, I’m personally asking you to kick in a few bucks and help save the day.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32006%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f3L%2bKEK%2bdZFm84wgyE3eug&sysid=1 "That’s why I’m teaming up

The Democrat Machine is flush with cash and the pressure is on. I'm worried. I’m like a cat on a hot-tin roof - we urgently need your help because our path to victory **FULLY RELIES** on strong Conservatives like you agreeing to help.

That's why I really need your help right now. We don’t have time to sit and wait - not if we want to win!

# **[43 Senate Republicans Sign Demand For Full Mayorkas Trial](http://trk.libertyledger.-soT2pggwCQ)**
---
Almost all members of the Senate Republican conference have demanded that Majority Leader Chuck Schumer move forward with a full impeachment trial against Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas, while Senate Democrats are signaling they’ll dismiss charges against him quickly. # **[Focus group of undecided voters gets brutally honest about Biden and the economy: 'Gaslighting literally everyone'](http://trk.libertyledger.)**

In all likelihood, undecided voters will decide the outcome of the 2024 election. And if you're President Joe Biden, that's probably not a good thing.On Wednesday, MSNBC highlighted a recent focus group of undecided voters from Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin, three battleground states that pave the path to the White House. Biden won those states in 2020, but Donald Trump won them in 2016.

name: A HUGE WIN
subject: NO MORE MEN in these women’s locker rooms!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
This is a huge victory.

| | | Friend,

This is Coach Tommy Tuberville – U.S. Senator from the great state of Alabama and a guy who believes all this woke insanity from the left is complete and total nonsense.

**Here’s the good news – the NAIA, which governs 249 small colleges around the country, has voted UNANIMOUSLY to BAN transgender athletes (these are biological males) from competing in women’s sports!**

_This is a huge victory_. Common sense has prevailed in a big way.

I have been on the forefront in this fight. I have introduced multiple bills in the U.S Senate to put an end to this agenda once and for all. I know better than most that we need to do all we can to **PROTECT WOMEN’S SPORTS**.

**[**If you agree, make a donation now to fuel our efforts >>**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqji0ue7qcafr9h45962hph7nlk24ig3lce66ifg_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g66o36cth2bs)**
---
[**PROTECT WOMEN’S SPORTS**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8iqks2q55n56d30h1s3ntei3d010e6cgdvtscpo_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g66o36cth2bs)
---
This is a big win. But it’s a small victory in the big scheme of things.

**They think you’re a BIGOT if you’re against biological men competing against young girls and women. These people are out of their minds – _I can’t believe this is even a debate_!**

Help me lead the charge to get this nonsense OUT of all high school and college athletics and out of the Olympics. These far-left Democrats beholden to the woke left WILL NOT LISTEN unless the American people stand up and speak up for our young women.

**[RUSH CRITICAL SUPPORT TO STOP THIS INSANITY>>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqlouemtuuvahoiuro5c1chhhpf5i1t3ch5vobkg_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g66o36cth2bs)[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0mmtn3v6889iqmflemmm1dt548l2r3k0l4ihbpo_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g66o36cth2bs)[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9afnhl5fmge7ij3kea5ks172d48gaudl0p1sgq8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g66o36cth2bs)**

The woke left wants you to pretend men and women are the same. That men don’t run faster, punch harder, and jump higher. **_Are they OUT OF THEIR MINDS_?!**

I know you don’t want your daughter or granddaughter competing against a boy in swimming, soccer, or tennis. We cannot allow this nonsense.

**Every bit of support is a huge help. And I can assure you, I will not let up. This cannot become the “new norm” in America.**

[**THANK YOU for any support you can send!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhqkm31ab1s5fj22mp2acrbdkoaq5b24du7i3loo_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g66o36cth2bs)

---
Coach Tommy Tuberville
U.S. Senator, Alabama
---
[**PROTECT WOMEN’S SPORTS**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7vk13dk8e6nti1qr4edii99330cmkbk5luvscig_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g66o36cth2bs)

body:
Your number is being called today, Friend.

**I put a bullet through Osama bin Laden's skull, Friend. **

It's Rob O'Neill. I'm a Navy SEAL. At my core, I am built to serve this country; I will do _**WHATEVER**_ it takes to make America safe and prosperous.

I hope you share that sentiment. And if you don't, then the rest of this message just isn't for you. Feel free to delete this email and move on with your life if you're not committed to American excellence.

**If you 're still reading, then I thank you for your commitment. And now, I'm counting on you to rise to the occasion, Friend. **

My Navy SEAL brother, Senior Chief Derrick Van Orden, needs your help. He served our nation for over 25 years in the Navy and fought extremists from the Taliban to Al-Qaeda. He's one of the most patriotic & hard-working men I know. Today, he's still serving our country by representing true American patriots like you & me in Congress.

I'm not a swamp-dwelling politician - I don't have support from mega-donors or Super PACs. I'm just like you - **a concerned American who loves this nation and will always do the right thing.**

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Don’t let them ignore my assault
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW4_coSizN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW4_coSizN

Fellow Conservative,
At San Francisco State University
last April, I was physically assaulted by an angry mob,
barricaded in a classroom, and held for ransom for four hours.
I'm still waiting for justice.
The news just broke that the
investigation into my case was suspended by the San Francisco
State University police - with no charges filed. The officer who
replied to my inquiry said, "The charges in this case are
unfounded."
This just encourages what
happened to me to happen to more people who dare to question
common sense, lived experience, and reality. We don't see this
happen to so-called "progressive" speakers, or to anyone who
dissents from my viewpoint.
While I was locked in the
classroom that would become my prison for hours, I wrote on
social media, "When they want you silent, speak louder." I am
more determined than ever to keep speaking louder.
That's exactly what my team and I
do here at the Leadership Institute.
Through the Riley Gaines Center
at the Leadership Institute, my team of Ambassadors and I
spearhead a growing nationwide movement to defend women, common
sense, and free speech.
We travel the country to spread
the word on more college campuses. We encourage more girls and
women to share their stories and protect themselves against
radical gender ideology. We defend basic biological reality - and
the very concept of truth itself.
Women fought for equality. Now
our achievements are erased by men who merely declare themselves
women. This social contagion robs women of opportunities, puts
them in physical danger, and silences them when they dare to
dissent.

That's why my colleagues and I
show college-aged students how to speak out bravely. We connect
them with Leadership Institute training opportunities where they
develop their skills. Armed with LI training, these young people
become principled leaders on their campuses and in their
communities - and fight for America's future.
I'd love to have you join this
movement to defend women, sanity, and free speech.
Stand bravely with me,
Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center
at the Leadership Institute

Train Leaders for
America

The Leadership Institute, 1101 N.
Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201

If you 're still reading, then I thank you for your commitment. And now, I'm counting on you to rise to the occasion, Friend. My Navy SEAL brother, Senior Chief Derrick Van Orden, needs your help. He served our nation for over 25 years in the Navy and fought extremists from the Taliban to Al-Qaeda. He's one of the most patriotic & hard-working men I know. Today, he's still serving our country by representing true American patriots like you & me in Congress. | | "SUPPORT NAVY SEAL DERRICK VAN ORDEN" | "Derrick Van Orden" The Left is doing everything in its power to undermine and neutralize Derrick. Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

As you read this, the Radical Left have organized a stunning movement to **PACK & DESTROY the U.S. Supreme Court** and end the careers of our brave conservative judges like Clarence Thomas & Brett Kavanaugh.

_**As you read this, MILLIONS of radicalized left-wing activists are mobilizing to topple our conservative Supreme Court majority.**_

**• Clarence Thomas
• Brett Kavanaugh

• Neil Gorsuch**

name: A HUGE WIN
subject: NO MORE MEN in these women’s locker rooms!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
This is a huge victory.

| | | Friend,

This is Coach Tommy Tuberville – U.S. Senator from the great state of Alabama and a guy who believes all this woke insanity from the left is complete and total nonsense.

**Here’s the good news – the NAIA, which governs 249 small colleges around the country, has voted UNANIMOUSLY to BAN transgender athletes (these are biological males) from competing in women’s sports!**

_This is a huge victory_. Common sense has prevailed in a big way.

I have been on the forefront in this fight. I have introduced multiple bills in the U.S Senate to put an end to this agenda once and for all. I know better than most that we need to do all we can to **PROTECT WOMEN’S SPORTS**.

**[**If you agree, make a donation now to fuel our efforts >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbvujk7b997l0pq334oeeikcgck9038585uk5dug_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g69or4clh2bs)**
---
[**PROTECT WOMEN’S SPORTS**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziu7acionhq03p0hr60jo08gngsova9t2c9e56s8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g69or4clh2bs)
---
This is a big win. But it’s a small victory in the big scheme of things.

**They think you’re a BIGOT if you’re against biological men competing against young girls and women. These people are out of their minds – _I can’t believe this is even a debate_!**

Help me lead the charge to get this nonsense OUT of all high school and college athletics and out of the Olympics. These far-left Democrats beholden to the woke left WILL NOT LISTEN unless the American people stand up and speak up for our young women.

**[RUSH CRITICAL SUPPORT TO STOP THIS INSANITY>>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjqjmia2h43q35hncm9siglukr202un610t71oc8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g69or4clh2bs)[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3a6v8m3272db9vo76tmu7hrv1le5dbhiea2j1po_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g69or4clh2bs)[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmagcu55m6nel7nllip3ht3qu5smtakp7g62rlcg_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g69or4clh2bs)**

The woke left wants you to pretend men and women are the same. That men don’t run faster, punch harder, and jump higher. **_Are they OUT OF THEIR MINDS_?!**

I know you don’t want your daughter or granddaughter competing against a boy in swimming, soccer, or tennis. We cannot allow this nonsense.

**Every bit of support is a huge help. And I can assure you, I will not let up. This cannot become the “new norm” in America.**

[**THANK YOU for any support you can send!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z71h37fqn2tvf9ksbue9st1oas2dam2t8akcv29g_rp22sh2s8i6ep36c1g69or4clh2bs)

name: Russell Prescott (Personal)
subject: They (literally) stormed the border
body:
Breaking News out of El Paso TX|
| | | | [](https://sxw89cgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pwGnk3TO3EJ7MnPJvKlisvrlDYoNGehpmW19WDmHqLS1mkurHavzGkjUmMOvHvHJwHsCcTfzkzZVwstd-HuzCVQ5qESILHRL0wHsJUq2ieAAyslhd7ty8WUqWqaGyB-emyAeJlSoS78M3HtCre-R2VO5bsp0ZXae-RF55kzJBD_RCXKlpKBAYImaWPbIqrN9VZowOnB0GUGX_7GXhRyHMA6DkKg5odRYcLvmQNHMXK8Q8sv0tzM1XH_EO-D5Qt-V1pS6a7G75TR_2sdQJB9uzieVsEsAl82QS_8PE3ZwZJZF0vL-732hwnPKWsYS86A4fb2d2kwn0HD6OUI_yiqXTI2XVgKjBs4gojNC8jeVlk3QLDNSVzVStw==&c=LQLlIdUAGwV-mkw7QRZZXTrxQxbuW2Ktc-ljh_3POfT_Hkih0VVA5g==&ch=JrYH2OiFiGaGjNRxk5yET50ocX45gg3kYu2okZE2ztXwHUFgOT8upw==)
---
| Peter,
We just witnessed another prime example of Chris Pappas' blissful ignorance when it comes to the crisis at our border.
---
| [](https://sxw89cgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pwGnk3TO3EJ7MnPJvKlisvrlDYoNGehpmW19WDmHqLS1mkurHavzGkjUmMOvHvHJwHsCcTfzkzZVwstd-HuzCVQ5qESILHRL0wHsJUq2ieAAyslhd7ty8WUqWqaGyB-emyAeJlSoS78M3HtCre-R2VO5bsp0ZXae-RF55kzJBD_RCXKlpKBAYImaWPbIqrN9VZowOnB0GUGX_7GXhRyHMA6DkKg5odRYcLvmQNHMXK8Q8sv0tzM1XH_EO-D5Qt-V1pS6a7G75TR_2sdQJB9uzieVsEsAl82QS_8PE3ZwZJZF0vL-732hwnPKWsYS86A4fb2d2kwn0HD6OUI_yiqXTI2XVgKjBs4gojNC8jeVlk3QLDNSVzVStw==&c=LQLlIdUAGwV-mkw7QRZZXTrxQxbuW2Ktc-ljh_3POfT_Hkih0VVA5g==&ch=JrYH2OiFiGaGjNRxk5yET50ocX45gg3kYu2okZE2ztXwHUFgOT8upw==)
---
| It's time for action - We cannot allow this crisis to continue unchecked.
Illegal immigrants stormed our border, overwhelming the Texas National Guard troops.
Despite their efforts to maintain order, a judge ordered the release of those involved in what can only be described as a border riot.
Instead of facing consequences for their actions, these individuals are being let off the hook.
This sends a message of weakness and gives others incentive to attempt similar actions.
We cannot allow our border to be treated as if it's a free-for-all.
[This is why I'm calling on you to stand with me in demanding immediate action to close our border and restore order. >>>](https://sxw89cgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pwGnk3TO3EJ7MnPJvKlisvrlDYoNGehpmW19WDmHqLS1mkurHavzGkjUmMOvHvHJwHsCcTfzkzZVwstd-HuzCVQ5qESILHRL0wHsJUq2ieAAyslhd7ty8WUqWqaGyB-emyAeJlSoS78M3HtCre-R2VO5bsp0ZXae-RF55kzJBD_RCXKlpKBAYImaWPbIqrN9VZowOnB0GUGX_7GXhRyHMA6DkKg5odRYcLvmQNHMXK8Q8sv0tzM1XH_EO-D5Qt-V1pS6a7G75TR_2sdQJB9uzieVsEsAl82QS_8PE3ZwZJZF0vL-732hwnPKWsYS86A4fb2d2kwn0HD6OUI_yiqXTI2XVgKjBs4gojNC8jeVlk3QLDNSVzVStw==&c=LQLlIdUAGwV-mkw7QRZZXTrxQxbuW2Ktc-ljh_3POfT_Hkih0VVA5g==&ch=JrYH2OiFiGaGjNRxk5yET50ocX45gg3kYu2okZE2ztXwHUFgOT8upw==)
We cannot afford to wait any longer.
I refuse to stand by while Congressman Pappas continues to double-talk his way through this crisis, trying to convince us that complacency is the solution. It's time for real leadership, not empty promises.

clean_body: Breaking News out of El Paso TX| | | | | == | Peter, We just witnessed another prime example of Chris Pappas' blissful ignorance when it comes to the crisis at our border. | == | It's time for action - We cannot allow this crisis to continue unchecked. Illegal immigrants stormed our border, overwhelming the Texas National Guard troops. Despite their efforts to maintain order, a judge ordered the release of those involved in what can only be described as a border riot. Instead of facing consequences for their actions, these individuals are being let off the hook. This sends a message of weakness and gives others incentive to attempt similar actions. We cannot allow our border to be treated as if it's a free-for-all. == We cannot afford to wait any longer. I refuse to stand by while Congressman Pappas continues to double-talk his way through this crisis, trying to convince us that complacency is the solution. It's time for real leadership, not empty promises. | | == | We must secure the border, and we must do it fast. Please join me in demanding action from our elected officials. Together, we can make a difference and ensure that our border is secure. | | | Friend, this sent chills down my spine, but sadly I am not surprised at all. You deserve to hear it from me before the biased and slanted media twists the facts.

_**My opponent was personally endorsed by Jeffrey Epstein 's right-hand man. **_

It's more than clear- my opponent is in the pocket of some of the most disgusting and abhorrent people in the world.

**Every known criminal associate of Jeffrey Epstein should have the book thrown at them. We cannot let this get swept under the rug. There cannot be any refuge for these vile sex offenders.**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: How important is religious liberty to you?
body:
I want to remind you of some things we’ve seen (and lived through) in recent years—which we never thought we’d see in our country...

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_QK6D-XIv3Gi_7XBzkRnZA~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_O9gP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3JlbGlnaW91cy1saWJlcnR5LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEyNTNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJlbGlnaW91c2xpYmVydHlzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtQ0ItMjAyNDA0MTNXA3NwY0IKZhCiVBpmlRoRV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_QK6D-XIv3Gi_7XBzkRnZA~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_O9gP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3JlbGlnaW91cy1saWJlcnR5LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEyNTNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJlbGlnaW91c2xpYmVydHlzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtQ0ItMjAyNDA0MTNXA3NwY0IKZhCiVBpmlRoRV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_QK6D-XIv3Gi_7XBzkRnZA~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_O9gP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3JlbGlnaW91cy1saWJlcnR5LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEyNTNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJlbGlnaW91c2xpYmVydHlzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtQ0ItMjAyNDA0MTNXA3NwY0IKZhCiVBpmlRoRV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/z0iqRLpMyG1-Y4L2m2R62w~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_O9gP0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuY29uc2VydmF0aXZlYnJvYWRjYXN0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmUtQnJvYWRjYXN0LU9mZmVycyZlPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclMjU0MGdtYWlsLmNvbVcDc3BjQgpmEKJUGmaVGhFXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vrWz5UAXu0Ecls3TGNKI2w~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_O9gP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVicm9hZGNhc3QuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpmEKJUGmaVGhFXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

subject: Iran Threatens Israel, Tiger Makes the Cut, and the World's Oldest Gorilla
body:
U.S. and Israeli officials are preparing for the possibility of a direct attack on Israeli soil by Iran in retaliation for an April 1 strike in Syria that left seven Iranian military officers dead..

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# SATURDAY, APRIL 13, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this date in 1997, 21-year-old [Tiger Woods won the Masters](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71u8yAUQJ8Gtlj8XCAeGL5Plbd07Whd4NqmwsFyiK28fZXOXc-RjnS-buMNc8n3-RNX8m2qI8aWDxrhIvVFwQg8-YlIkebkpZNaSCN0zxefIgUX-zBZm4wjQdGQsyZeg04oMfDslVAgQGrRG6ttJ3tAhWgMOkhXEAwEpdzq3n3XfG8LTeVVD9q7WFde_NLa9mD6H1MDU8N5nt2rPtsz0Nu_Cba4MD0cTH-Ec9cLDGX7P_Pdp-3MpeSHdQzEvGIuv8n25-BPAAAA___bt1HX) Tournament for the first time by a record 12 strokes in Augusta, Georgia. It made him the youngest golfer to win the event. The warmer weather has _The Flyover_ office talking barbeque. We've been arguing over which region has the best techniques, and one staff member from Oklahoma swears by the [Pioneer Woman's barbecue recipes](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQBb_GdCDbu5ijcBEpcndpUyJjL7CJwQScQ_n76FKnfW-K0bzfh7vnxNv85leyZcqDD4UfNGCtoNY4YBXtRKQJKrKqUyBVK6GvFnvrR4nKG1Rwo2ACKpAmBoQpUhdHU7HVUqN87n1rwDSqR6-9b1vfYbyhFCgpcslH85F5KwtN6Sc_6GhCXqtkl1L2U8CL0E5od11XUxbaOW9Ex5VXvz05od2Uc6xDzp-8zUK7lXw665W271NoN0MPbWe6Vmg3jl_1QYF3ej4C3Jk4koBXVR027henxKfpBMp59Zz-NMq_UX4DAAD__1duYcE). (Another staff member from Kansas City had plenty to say about this selection.) Check out her take on [baked beans here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu7CAQQNGvwR0WDLBeCorX0O1rU1pjM15P1gYLo7Xy91FSp7_F1fl4jA_kjfPzP-4U2lJGnBu_abRSGwl2tF0KCxGQ6SjoQRulnTK-W4Ne0jT4QWvlfErocJiWRDohgENjVccBFFhltVHe3cyt194iIDqHg013q4RVlLiV2n8Wzm2lZfsqb6r9XPZuC2trxynMPwFRQLyuq28rHVwyUb3KjvmnExCXUpKcS3lxfgqIlWY-6BQQ0d-9EhDbSnKis8kJX5TkRJhPSW-qAmJXQzou3jY-b4Ow6rkjb78D7U-O7wAAAP__qjthTA) and decide for yourself! Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1OwzAQAOCnsbdW9t05P4MHpCoTYWWMjviSHDhJlZoi3h4hRrp_0_faDz1r1m1-4VVimfaBx6J3Gejk8QQ0kE1xEgFBK9HXHp0PDlu7RN9IW6cmAHIABExNM9UIyMmJtG-V1QgOyJFH14YKq7NviYE5BK4pNeQMOUla9uP8vutWFpny936X4zzuq81xKeV6M_hkoDPQ_ScGup5nHZ91-_g12InBS7p-ac56q2pDbl5Z85-tPstq8ELOHvGxseVhwE8AAAD__2riWmw). Today we're flying with our new sponsor [Quietum Plus.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFv8jAQgOFf42xEtu-SwOABCWXjW78xOuwzucrBbnBC-fdVO3d-h1d6_l-nK0mSx_0fLexqzBP5KjtPeDBwsDhhE1xktgwNOzMY0KbTcGpmd9OgmYfu2GlvQjAUAY2OQ_Q23qz3jTirLWo0oE9dD31rTkiWqOtowHBErVBzkJrX9iPLo84c0zvvvLY-L01yc63lqeCs7Kjs-LkJ120paXv-dGXHXQLntsxFwUgxRklClRVcbjkFKvxllO33KkHBJab3g1-BgxnOZbV4blYXyktSkmc_KNT3hST9juufDN8BAAD__8NuXtQ) If you suffer from pesky [Tinnitus (ringing ears)](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFv8jAQgOFf42xEtu-SwOABCWXjW78xOuwzucrBbnBC-fdVO3d-h1d6_l-nK0mSx_0fLexqzBP5KjtPeDBwsDhhE1xktgwNOzMY0KbTcGpmd9OgmYfu2GlvQjAUAY2OQ_Q23qz3jTirLWo0oE9dD31rTkiWqOtowHBErVBzkJrX9iPLo84c0zvvvLY-L01yc63lqeCs7Kjs-LkJ120paXv-dGXHXQLntsxFwUgxRklClRVcbjkFKvxllO33KkHBJab3g1-BgxnOZbV4blYXyktSkmc_KNT3hST9juufDN8BAAD__8NuXtQ), you're going to want to check out their helpful products.
|
---
## U.S. Expects Iranian Strike on Israel
U.S. and Israeli officials are preparing for the [possibility of a direct attack](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LuSozAQheGnEZko3UAmULAJmTfdkGqLxvSOLFFSjxm__ZQnnvDUl5z6_12XK1CifP8LDwy8lQUi0xMXJ7WVxi2uW8OGaNB2GLTXVulB2anbg4_ee6sut8kPcXTKWbOZC2LUcZzMEDsKRhmnnLZqGkY79npyYACGAbxbL04Jp3AlLrX_Xyjzjlt6lSfWPpZHl8LOfDRh_wgzCzOf59nnW8x4trcLMx8lEVNsb9yJUe7ls6Ew841WzLLBq0n8OjByk1Qhy8aVPlBSq4BJtlIyVlmBd6wyAb9HzKCdH-3U1bAeJ6VEbfTCqfsDKP0c418zfQcAAP__FKVqoA) on Israeli soil by Iran in retaliation for an April 1 strike in Syria that left seven Iranian military officers dead. The U.S. has [positioned warships in the region](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1z4yAQQH8N6tDAgr4KFedCc41vrrtSsydW1iYIPIBN8u8zTp3qFa958_5d1yuy53D7gyfNZY8rboWftFqpjQS72sbNOxGQaWjWgzZKd8pMzTGT2fpp6Ak0wNirDtyoum7Q6v829M6NDc-gwCqrjZq63vStniwCYtfhYN1olbCKHJeY2rfIoRy0-8_4pNRu8Wz8fJRyz8L8ErAIWGqt7ZnDywlYKMhHFrAEqi_UmLwTsDyyPOOTsqyY8sH3LEuUjnYKTnJOSF5ykBtmknGXnDAwBoml4PYuYMEkLxfty9-P302a3b2y95z7QVh1O5H9d1j5cdNXAAAA__8_zGkj) to protect Israeli and American forces from an Iranian attack believed to be imminent. Officials believe Iran has more than 100 drones and dozens of missiles aimed at military targets. Messages sent to the Biden administration through Iranian proxies indicated [U.S. forces would be attacked](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7Fu7CAQRb8GOiwYMF4XFK9xt69NaY0B706CjQVknfx95NRpbnOlc3Te7vMdKdH--I9bdG3NM_pGrzgbobQAMxse3BojRM2jU4PSUvVSj_zphrHXYfCLWuEmLd5G8NZ4FRclwxIWy8mBBCON0nLsrbadGg0CYt_jYMLNSGZkDNRy6d4z7e0Z1_SdX7F0Pm88uWdrR2X6H4OJwXSeZ4dflOv1MpguNoNJXqOAwUQFd0G1YEwCW0P_IT6raCXno4oTy077gxcXjpNSomoHZuRjQ0q_uvZn_E8AAAD__xTbWbc) if the U.S. got involved in fighting between Israel and Iran. A travel warning has been issued for Israel by the U.S. government, [as well as a message](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb8Gd1gwjO2koHiNu7x2S2tihnhWGEfAxtq_X2Xr7e7VaY7Ox225kSTJj_-0s2_xWGht8uIFtXUacMEu-MgM7Dr2drLO2MG4a7d54tURI8DlAvcI4xSdcdbZGGJAY6ZOPBhAg9aZ6zC6sbdXJCAaBpowXNAoNBykHaX_PCS3jWP6Pl5c-vXYu-S31p5VuX8KZgXzeZ79eq-Zz_rmCub3VDBLLcRJS6GsN9qp6pOK_qq6FXpxer8s-aF3CSGxZqpNr0eOSdamYO6KD89TUpI6TgrNYydJvwbtzx4_AQAA__8XEmLD) from President Biden to Tehran: "_Don 't_."
## Man Rams Semi Into Texas DPS Office
A Texas man allegedly [stole a semi-truck](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D1uxCAUBODT4A6LXxMXFGncbdqUFobH-kXYWMCus7ePHKVMNZ80zWg-b_PNYcL9_uE2sC3m2fmGT5gV5ZIKNasu2AggQHZgueGScc3k2K2WjyyKgcXFjCPERRsThJZhCdwPi9OqQyuYUExxyUY9yKHno3LCOa2dUeFNMaIYBGy59F8Z97ZCTK_8hNL7vHXJrq0dlch3IiYipvM8-33xO5z16omYLhIxPSr9k8_bBgW9S_QJK_oE1BdXV6i0wberNByV5hjRA90eqeGRgB6Qr6hQMD9qetHid8eVGRjvig3HiSlhHQxR7L45TL_j2r9X_QQAAP__feRs8A) and intentionally drove it into a Department of Public Safety office in Brenham, Texas, on Friday, killing one person and injuring 13 others. Authorities say Clenard Parker of Chappell Hill, TX visited the Brenham Public Safety office Thursday to [renew his commercial driver's license](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAURb8Gd1jwADsUFNu4y7ZbWsQ84pfFxgIS7_79yFNPc5ojXV2dP_f57inR_vztN3Qt5tkvjT44ay4VBz3rLriICKg6dHKUSkgjlO1WpyBKiKhvQsDDSBQxGDt4GywYhXbsyIEALbRUwppBDb202oP3xvhRh5sWTAsM1HLpX5n2tmJM__MHS7_krUtube2oTP1iMDGYzvPs_z7av0symK5pBpO4IOHCjZ8rYsLCl-LripXT3jJ_FNxXv_FwVJ5jpAV5xUL5ffnXuxBWXvDIpWFgMHXFheOklKgOI9PiuXlK34faj3m-AgAA__9h4GVQ) but was denied. He returned Friday in a stolen semi-truck and crashed it into the office's entrance. After crashing into the building the first time, Parker reportedly backed up the truck with the intention of [smashing the building again](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwjAQQL8m2YLO9sWQwUMXNrp2jM6-M7nKJFFioPx9ReeOT295el-X8UJadL5-0k1CzctIqepDRuyM6yyO2HLIIlZcK8EcjQPTgxvaKeTk-phMNJm9H4DRih8gUYQUmXtuNViwCGgcDL13_mAGJEvU93REPiE0CMJal-3wvehcJ8nltTxkO6Tl1pYw1brujfto7LmxZ1pnee5v9YatairS2HOVH9q79R6Lpm6nLPXVxbsW1vnapY32qQMjkMjLyWLk5DKxRbDZuhN7zMLtFnh9aim6-2ODcL2Rlr-G-u-R3wAAAP__EtpiCA) before being detained. Texas Rangers have opened an investigation, and Parker is believed to be facing multiple felony charges. _Want to keep up with the Lone Star State? ## Hospital Stops Transplant Programs
A Texas surgeon overseeing liver and kidney transplant programs at a Houston hospital [allegedly manipulated](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOpCAURp8GOwxcrjoWFtvQzbZbmutwVTYIBpgxvv1mtv6br_qSc3L-POcn-eDj9psOnuqaZnpV_-EZpTYScMbGTSszsGl40oM2SnfKjM0-sVZu7PvHoPtlXV6sO14Q1TisOCqisfETKECF2qix603f6hEJiLqOBnQPVAIVO19Tbv8mH-vOa7jTh3P7SkcTpr3WswjzS4AVYK_rat-FanJ0fw8CbKkp3wJs5KsIsDtTqLsA-8UKsOo7GgTYg4-UPQW5cz4oRlkzxXIGilWeOW2ZDlne5eTo2MnljilKHz9cqt-o-hQF2MEYpQ2iUoMA2-TJnZcPwZd-EKi2g3z4711_rPgvAAD__8IGcoc) a government database and deprived patients of an opportunity for lifesaving care. Dr. J. Steve Bynon Jr., a doctor at the University of Texas Health Science Center in Houston, is described by hospital officials as a talented and caring "pioneer in abdominal organ transplantation." They also claim Bynon admitted to altering the records. The hospital [discovered irregularities](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOqzAQheGngc7I2GMIhYvb0OW2W6KJPYTZNTaynaC8_SqrLbf7pa85Oh_X5YocON7_4062rmlBV_lJC4heCwULtN6uRIp0S7Yfey17I_XUbtZoScoZMreVzLReJuPpAuM43Rw6AtOyVVKBhF7LyQx66PoJUCEagyP4C8gGJHmuKXefiWPdaA2v9KTcubS3wW61HqXR_xo1N2o-z7OLNxfpLG9v1PzORs2PIn5rS49SUxRbKgdXDGLDUIsI_KQsvthHeomaMZYjYHwDYY4c78InV1MWO0Y-HiK7iD2MZoA2W3-cHAKXYWxA3nfk8LOu_vnVdwAAAP__YKZt9A) with donor matching data for liver transplants in early April and halted the program. The kidney transplant program was also paused because they share the same leadership. Numerous attempts have been made to speak to Bynon by phone, but he referred questions to the hospital and did not confirm he had admitted to altering records.

Man Rams Semi Into Texas DPS Office A Texas man allegedly and intentionally drove it into a Department of Public Safety office in Brenham, Texas, on Friday, killing one person and injuring 13 others. Authorities say Clenard Parker of Chappell Hill, TX visited the Brenham Public Safety office Thursday to but was denied. He returned Friday in a stolen semi-truck and crashed it into the office's entrance. Hospital Stops Transplant Programs A Texas surgeon overseeing liver and kidney transplant programs at a Houston hospital a government database and deprived patients of an opportunity for lifesaving care. Dr. J. Steve Bynon Jr., a doctor at the University of Texas Health Science Center in Houston, is described by hospital officials as a talented and caring "pioneer in abdominal organ transplantation." They also claim Bynon admitted to altering the records. The hospital with donor matching data for liver transplants in early April and halted the program. The kidney transplant program was also paused because they share the same leadership. Numerous attempts have been made to speak to Bynon by phone, but he referred questions to the hospital and did not confirm he had admitted to altering records. name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Religious Liberty is Under Serious Threat
body:
I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bd2d76d468244ba1a6da785c8dc263d5&_e=BszYk3YqVBzcp5FiM9ykK8o6L4HBkgTfI8C-ILfa-TgaFGK0l5duYTEO15VpAVLdidlXsQRK_kITPDHy8i4IRmYAVaqhSP_GXRltx8GGxbY7H3dFi0DeMBEcsFZ6-t__5nLRH54l6ojd4ojZF43zfxIGC5jSHwoJzObWCXTtdwQD7AdVJYFg5IWHEc6Oa2d-wQQVaUx07D_TFQnmGQXBYTPJ2zC1VgyuW-WgftnUpYUVbev1-jaROMyMXddcwUJxh3FkUyLrIbvHcuAmUXj_iTvsK4VsE1XhBGBmCd3NdPLbtbUptpqvwpB6Vg6mT9oBC7_7WjJE6FmO-tQ-7HFdjJnpRLGE_k5ssw1Gs65wQ50GDmGJgjv-AC_on2_0pwJnd_wZBmxtQb6hClTtKiDgjA%3D%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bd2d76d468244ba1a6da785c8dc263d5&_e=BszYk3YqVBzcp5FiM9ykK8o6L4HBkgTfI8C-ILfa-TgaFGK0l5duYTEO15VpAVLdidlXsQRK_kITPDHy8i4IRmYAVaqhSP_GXRltx8GGxbY7H3dFi0DeMBEcsFZ6-t__5nLRH54l6ojd4ojZF43zfxIGC5jSHwoJzObWCXTtdwQD7AdVJYFg5IWHEc6Oa2d-wQQVaUx07D_TFQnmGQXBYTPJ2zC1VgyuW-WgftnUpYUVbev1-jaROMyMXddcwUJx3urESVw548BZSzAEaMzMFESkyJyNZn9_WoiJWps3brnGSNHSJ-yRGA7-t66_DnTLSS_yKqYtIfgbXUeiAagv2qqXEMU0iEh1NptQIazYD2ZMA6KbwlwLWv1Ffx-xKRneiTueMZM_P0ieKEvpxMCQ5A%3D%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include: **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. clean_body: I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty. The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open. Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation. The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism." Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the National Referendum on Religious Liberty by using the secure link below: Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty." Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. The first step is ...EDUCATION. Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03ed3774a9994bfb86202e1abb1e6e80&_e=KgQp8fSwJdQ6KpMYHN9w7EE_h3BGo0nQ2rlz-9zJx-4VdBIaz311ohbD0VMfHUfUSB3uF0LDOJIT76tPapq86KiuS5CTpJLichY6iGtxDiSE5Ndgxsn_bFwg6qZfW5MB1wa8bMr__ZY50Q2o3NC3O8h6Zv0Sdl5dgGcTV7grmnTAb5-9En2EpHMGg4ntwl8IvMk1yH1SM-Yt6Q42L9dr10sscnYPrzOEc84iQpQAOhP6gniG7rfNSUjMlRtjFY7oGCJR8IRe7FCt9B7J6rUsCVqupCjBLQjRM5I_998gbU04ABvISBn5SqhBh2CCEpE5ElENRlZT6zQpbMKxReNYSVTqhsdwLSLRqIQ1SOdWZC7BYG_TA80kZYsMYaxJOayYInzzz9S0m63OD39V62S0eQiHv7Wjo0baYxA8DtCaNrM%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

name: Kristin Lyerly
subject: Big news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
We have work to do.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40826265-d2ff-473c-9bf9-b954239da050/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1f447123-2aaf-4002-bb3a-7a9d59d1ada8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I wanted you to be the first to hear the big news: I’m launching my campaign for Wisconsin’s 8th Congressional District.

[I’d like to tell you my story, and ask you to chip in to my campaign for a better future for Wisconsin and our country.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T504c96be-b1fa-4217-b9c1-67217daede50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I grew up in northeast Wisconsin, in a working class family where too often, we struggled.

As a kid, I would never have dreamed of running for office – though I always wanted to serve my community. I’ve been practicing medicine for years, focusing on women’s health and reproductive care, while working particularly in underserved communities. But today, I’m not practicing in the Green Bay area, where I grew up and where I live. Thanks first to the harsh restrictions on abortion care in Wisconsin that were passed in 1849 – before women could even vote – and then to the threat of retaliation from Republicans after I helped overturn those restrictions I travel to Minnesota every month, and also travel to Arizona to continue to care for patients who need it most. Those long commutes have given me plenty of time to think about where we’re at as a state, and as a country. I’ve spent a lot of time talking with my neighbors, fellow doctors, and folks all across our community about the challenges we’re facing. Our healthcare system is in crisis. Doctors and nurses are leaving the field in droves. There’s confusion about how we can care for our patients under new restrictions that are a direct result of Dobbs. And it all goes back to the division that too many politicians have sown in recent years. I’m running for office to do something about it. We have a real opportunity to flip this open seat, put an end to the divisiveness, and pass policies that help families in northeast Wisconsin – and every corner of the country. From expanding rural broadband access to implementing a social safety net that catches struggling families, we’ve got a lot of work to do. It won’t be easy. But most things worth doing aren’t easy. [I’m running for Congress to make a difference, and I’m asking for your support. If you’re with me, I hope you’ll chip in $5 or more to my campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4cdc9814-4fd7-47a4-8c73-0165267f9f94/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ea523a9-2b7a-4be1-a23e-117f1a75d054/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Let’s go!

Kristin Dr. Kristin Lyerly
Candidate for Congress, Wisconsin’s 8th Congressional District
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---

name: Full Mag News
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc3294393fc43889a17cec37f1847b8&_e=JrJQydrRgYYv8PkydYJhe0adz79ALYAjfEGZawewGadjKi6hthbDaO1SmLtZflN5wZCMrp4HnALSrdV1Uty6-9jmObHmj7XlY0d8jsiwDvdeXHwl_gOu2tx5Bijez2YN9KEL0wmfTOK81PWXRj-gb0KKVrEv4qJRNWiRoerWBfdHzEz8b8EyrHgezfIMsEWdRPEXGQ2N29XN-G6AgUBoggQzrklYs7P6xBmkPxfH1f72EXFig6kKVJN1Pzd3HItL6SQJzcnUTAt2HSo7SfWLvbIPycN8CRpFPKCiqce3KnCAtuXcrHozMTSzGtL2wfN5VzkgOe40F4FPrldgH1snO24wQEV8BI3POzv2Ezyqtrjh1WLHguxAzKmcmEZ-xYt59V-3NkpOIThilz6uIymrdj2CHiV13TrVqmDpbEZvuGI%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** **
**You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc3294393fc43889a17cec37f1847b8&_e=JrJQydrRgYYv8PkydYJhe0adz79ALYAjfEGZawewGadjKi6hthbDaO1SmLtZflN5wZCMrp4HnALSrdV1Uty6-9jmObHmj7XlY0d8jsiwDvdeXHwl_gOu2tx5Bijez2YN9KEL0wmfTOK81PWXRj-gb0KKVrEv4qJRNWiRoerWBfdHzEz8b8EyrHgezfIMsEWdRPEXGQ2N29XN-G6AgUBoggQzrklYs7P6xBmkPxfH1f72EXFig6kKVJN1Pzd3HItL6SQJzcnUTAt2HSo7SfWLvWVwtgzrhE-bkmr7XnhKXruB5ALIGzqiT9Ue7L6Fv6NuMpg2DcylqA1WNG0c9j_-spfsma76-OYBVDj6xIAswh6Sn6buZz5FHcrsyimw8oKvlhAbPQSzcoOFLRrqXUUIE8_55zQWDfdNVvmPG3I2Oqo%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dc3294393fc43889a17cec37f1847b8&_e=JrJQydrRgYYv8PkydYJhe0adz79ALYAjfEGZawewGadjKi6hthbDaO1SmLtZflN5wZCMrp4HnALSrdV1Uty6-9jmObHmj7XlY0d8jsiwDvdeXHwl_gOu2tx5Bijez2YN9KEL0wmfTOK81PWXRj-gb0KKVrEv4qJRNWiRoerWBfdHzEz8b8EyrHgezfIMsEWdRPEXGQ2N29XN-G6AgUBoggQzrklYs7P6xBmkPxfH1f72EXFig6kKVJN1Pzd3HItL6SQJzcnUTAt2HSo7SfWLvSOBFmArXqVTjTZAa1EGw4xZhPf1DhQCPPgWioqgKuwJ-vAyfGNZ1KauYMjjYmBm3Fm_f2FWjAhWv9SAD5O3VSQR9wm1HIwNtwDLCPBCzJkuHg35u0f478nyT2_xnmwV-0NeQobnjSle0JMG1xFrOF0%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff73104c5cc84c2da1ee85cb1f391898&_e=sf4WTIovFHpnE30UethtdI4_-Eg1v3mNg-z2j28b5530zkUyzLsn-8PRHMket2NoO9-_Df5LRYPpv9zrbwgkmFh8FKMsFW7vqX63xrvdpyN1Yfg6As5vzv746UXfa0OLwLwFSPnNztIV-4UaISwjFeyEGAMigJebpZgkrFbzzZO8sUrvOnwQOycr7MvUoNv1U4yZQFazL6ZPV3-IvVKA-m4faR4etgOTf_CUEsUQlMtjwCxKCpUtMuVf3aMICBYJs79Y6ErBBlcBaaABxqApJp0obH4CTQdrKadShLR4huz4eFc3oxffQRfedcdwFhTGNCbLLdJN-L9PxoiIt2WV6qR0zkXNCevK1w2RgfLV4eQBEDwSEQF9Y7kqkTvcHqZMV-vLgb9l9XQHftOr_UuM9T_l0eU8iUZKOk-MMXTvV6o%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff73104c5cc84c2da1ee85cb1f391898&_e=sf4WTIovFHpnE30UethtdI4_-Eg1v3mNg-z2j28b5530zkUyzLsn-8PRHMket2NoO9-_Df5LRYPpv9zrbwgkmFh8FKMsFW7vqX63xrvdpyN1Yfg6As5vzv746UXfa0OLwLwFSPnNztIV-4UaISwjFeyEGAMigJebpZgkrFbzzZO8sUrvOnwQOycr7MvUoNv1U4yZQFazL6ZPV3-IvVKA-m4faR4etgOTf_CUEsUQlMtjwCxKCpUtMuVf3aMICBYJcX-a_kZ0VwhYMMM7vt6rbqr_fTSFi-bEFIytZ2b0HFU7Bp0vHAup148j0SqJlWsXQCTFn4fWHsPGxGD7KP5iXZk7MlU2uOMyd8w2mlDbpZEMnGD2QOTrGoWzh2lIQAmGWSsNuHNKhPwJrKMBFjEpGdSib_V6cyjvv366TNEavQY%3D)

Hey Peter, it’s John. I really need to talk to you about my friend Bob Casey.
The 2024 election is here — **and the GOP’s road to winning back the Senate runs right through PA.**
Republicans are zeroing in on 2024’s battleground states as we speak. You can bet Mitch McConnell and the GOP’s shadiest billionaires will spend hundreds of million$ to attack Bob.
This is *seriously* scary stuff, but you know what gives ME hope? This amazing grassroots team!!!
The way we stopped the GOP in 2022 is the same way we fight back and re-elect Bob now: by bringing together an ✨all-star grassroots team✨ that can stand up to the GOP’s money by folks chipping in $5, $25, or more at a time.
Together, we’ll defend PA’s Senate seat, as long as we don’t lose sight of the stakes. **Holding this seat is make-or-break for our Democratic majority.**
