name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wires is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2798f1ad09045a483a279efcf68a6e2&_e=HNshptGvYljTlRvYzT2Jwc_H797NbRlmv9em7OWSxvd0QjT0CIlc9VWAW-EH8pS5vwqGg9YoOXmToa1y1DvuoGZKeSmpq-bkwZXANH7GVYQWmhdPqMGDMIffpTrhfEeRi5FoQGnS_u5_-SWjIWS6H7UQ08JEEYNhZlIjH5lqIgUw8a7QqV0KoGFhngQPFrLALEkyWXp1WWr96H_lS_-OEZrPZMDFsVWSdDEi8OPfAa-SHMrlt1u_TRdipbLkcRPYMEAnCXlHdMePF2qwCacdYdCblYrDlaYdpcIuw7k-l042VKldQND8pRvbS4CMWcjULn5METpb0eXr_WPQBq6YpaIOCdADry7k14rwxRQWAla0CSALRgGuvCXgudkBISFlmVGk2jJZ9TjGxY43Zu3a0P9IK5agCaJ4Cem7SFZAAHE%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** **
**You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2798f1ad09045a483a279efcf68a6e2&_e=HNshptGvYljTlRvYzT2Jwc_H797NbRlmv9em7OWSxvd0QjT0CIlc9VWAW-EH8pS5vwqGg9YoOXmToa1y1DvuoGZKeSmpq-bkwZXANH7GVYQWmhdPqMGDMIffpTrhfEeRi5FoQGnS_u5_-SWjIWS6H7UQ08JEEYNhZlIjH5lqIgUw8a7QqV0KoGFhngQPFrLALEkyWXp1WWr96H_lS_-OEZrPZMDFsVWSdDEi8OPfAa-SHMrlt1u_TRdipbLkcRPYMEAnCXlHdMePF2qwCacdYX8RtCNMijiF7OyUBlp2jGd-U37CmWgzAHWMQ10HH5c6brxh9Y7myOmcWQYrrTE7hx23hGdzzy_JtLF2iU6JDao30B_BG4DpavuD_sMniZumAaPjqQTzIHBuf9nJVTFJvKgFISoFN0YvWzhf2lSQ31I%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2798f1ad09045a483a279efcf68a6e2&_e=HNshptGvYljTlRvYzT2Jwc_H797NbRlmv9em7OWSxvd0QjT0CIlc9VWAW-EH8pS5vwqGg9YoOXmToa1y1DvuoGZKeSmpq-bkwZXANH7GVYQWmhdPqMGDMIffpTrhfEeRi5FoQGnS_u5_-SWjIWS6H7UQ08JEEYNhZlIjH5lqIgUw8a7QqV0KoGFhngQPFrLALEkyWXp1WWr96H_lS_-OEZrPZMDFsVWSdDEi8OPfAa-SHMrlt1u_TRdipbLkcRPYMEAnCXlHdMePF2qwCacdYVynoEJCgHwJlkpSasHKWLVR_mfFFIzYAWbkV013YdktaKm390cNaocqwLru-TEZpIiylPRyif3bB5_a4NjSrea3OTnEBKwzF3tdo2E5yrU9aNouvziGYBnBQ8s2C3dS1qB6PIszsjANcLT9FqozJOk%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: I’ll be real honest with you | | | | | Folks - this is John Kennedy. I'll be real honest with you: My friends over in the House have a huge deadline coming up, and I just got word they're WAY OFF TRACK to hit their goal. Let me tell you - it'd be a complete disaster if they missed it. To make matters even worse, Liberals are firing up the Democrat Machine to smear every last Conservative in the House and kick them out of office PERMANENTLY. ~ "That’s why I’m teaming up with my brother from the bayou – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to raise $500,000 before April is over and done with. So with all the respect in the world, I’m personally asking you to kick in a few bucks and help save the day." | | | "Contribute Ten Bucks Now >>" | | | "Contribute Thirty Bucks \(Most Folks Give This Much\ >>") | | | "Contribute Fifty Bucks Now >>" | | | ~ "Contribute More Now >>" How dire is the situation? Well, just about every poll shows Republicans and Democrats in a STATISTICAL TIE for control of the House... and election experts just downgraded Republicans in a half-dozen key races. The Democrat Machine is flush with cash and the pressure is on. I'm worried. I'm like a cat on a hot-tin roof - we urgently need your help because our path to victory FULLY RELIES on strong Conservatives like you agreeing to help. That's why I really need your help right now. We don't have time to sit and wait - not if we want to win! ~ "I’m personally asking you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat the Democrat Machine once and for all." God bless you, John Kennedy | | | "Please take my Election Year Check-In!" This is Steve Scalise. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84fa05536b014ca989345b7778c1e81a&_e=WrAH3E412aDDsyVIaTbr0yyXccDKsl3AB2qlnvkhGfR0q9rmgUIMYHymu1STS1WMlFXpGJa5oxttCJm5HzA2kyvh427BAsyPtYwz3Yei2vXOSMWy7zeqwHbmSorfs3NZGvgmTsOG8kJq_CATuk5qzAC3NXqoWtVIpVxUzhSckWdDZM5PUCKvzRNr53EZJMdv9vU53eiW06AWNWwlanAxVOOXBQg58tFhOM1b_5Nue7mNM6BH2BtsAOqp3RQftH4SobVzZp-2Yj1KorHCvGK8Rfx3krFkQ2mzC__obDpzecS8tzACmykEkUWKXSqiAt_cyHiu17EQKinclJav34WXCZO1HijSMqO8QRDGajFKyiN8RIgZG8nfOxhN1XoL0XTPZWFKs6E3snljicO5moJU59lGI_JZjpHqUhWWefF4bU8%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

name: TX-34 Election Updates
subject: REVEALED: Jeffrey Epstein's right hand man
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Mayra JFC
body:
My opponent was personally endorsed by Jeffrey Epstein's right-hand man.

| |
---
| | | Friend, this sent chills down my spine, but sadly I am not surprised at all. You deserve to hear it from me before the biased and slanted media twists the facts.

_**My opponent was personally endorsed by Jeffrey Epstein 's right-hand man. **_
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91d8204bd31844c8996235de2df32d4e&_e=xGUEZczuVgcPHbRJCb3YkUV2oZox5PAD0aHeXvYjRiO3J8XEAg4Lqoi-DOpsrPGP2OGVUewU4sx0vt8BzppWWauY2gEKDc5b-05sHYQavk8qvycmYgvUj7KOBKW-VbxPHKard5Bd78SfIo7eI4SsNbv_ImHNPfZIpw3vp5y-wtd5E_svclhxOQ48W2Q0s6vGg9CwdsQqao93YaJkFEFmZU8uUYCfye6wrwrgEc0MWGu3yxYEL_G_Op6JNebM5s-GrZRqXvc-VrQ-IvY9B36qjNPSBpySSSyCnc7HDlE0jyA9AV7dSSKjiKQdA97avA2kwxPDFsmjleJcFtTdogdsp32pfRFMf0HtXVAtBWOcR3Vki1NmpSbQfIG1ZgCL7kj2WM8nuaFPT6syCtBsW7lPhCWh0mMVoqS4s3UqIOWiJnjp29XLbvaIVSmcNvCQ3i2JOjq-b2oajtC5SODj8MxTsA%3D%3D)
---

My opponent begged for and celebrated an endorsement from Bill Clinton.

It's more than clear- my opponent is in the pocket of some of the most disgusting and abhorrent people in the world.

**Every known criminal associate of Jeffrey Epstein should have the book thrown at them. We cannot let this get swept under the rug. There cannot be any refuge for these vile sex offenders.**

Our country is on the brink of irreversible disaster both economically & morally, and letting someone like my opponent stay in Congress will be the thing that ultimately pushes us over the edge.

If there has ever been a time to stand strongly on God, family, and country, its right here & right now.

**[So if you're with me, please consider supporting my campaign with a contribution you are comfortable making today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91d8204bd31844c8996235de2df32d4e&_e=xGUEZczuVgcPHbRJCb3YkUV2oZox5PAD0aHeXvYjRiO3J8XEAg4Lqoi-DOpsrPGP2OGVUewU4sx0vt8BzppWWQ_Q_7aBWCZwVzkirrnnPOMF3jIRbGTnrWIxPRCAcR_g-CvqRs_BkHf2zKEZmbGFGfdFqprTuJncPo3dXTiTuhK9QoSwGgSMSNW0HH5tme8dluNNGRRQwt-TVvSeEk7S9UU8RfTVoriaiDuYbMlcGgU18hPi-8Qx1yGI6PEchxgob9Q0BX83Nf-R2dOE00DTLCvaALvcdVD2tf_GbJYVBj_jfqvrBMQuWBP0zy2kjAxk9kCGn9FiYskZsZWaN3I1KZmVTiqvt9JTzOY7f0djBYER6woC0iIRANirifNHT1N6WXBPDLZyF_E_cR_73nSA9ruoFfzeW6NNmBWLTToeLziTERwBUeAs9PtYuNSlIdYmjapT_IRgi86IlwPM2bK8IQ%3D%3D "So if you’re with me, please consider supporting my campaign with a contribution you are comfortable making today. THANK YOU
-Mayra Flores

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Is there still a chance for school funding reform? Update from Mississippi’s conservative voice.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11572161?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Every year, Mississippi lawmakers debate the amount to spend on education. As important, perhaps, is the question of _how_ we spend the money. **

If Mississippi is serious about improving education, we need to improve the way we allocate the tax dollars that are available.

**For almost 30 years, Mississippi has had an antiquated funding formula known as the MAEP, or the Mississippi Adequate Education Program.** Complex and arcane, MAEP means we fund a system, not students.

**Under MAEP, the money does not always get to where it is most needed: the classroom. **

The shortcomings of the MAEP are widely accepted. Indeed, last year saw an 11th hour attempt to dramatically change it. In doing so, the Senate appeared to acknowledge that major change is needed.

You would be forgiven, therefore, for supposing that we might see progress on replacing the old system this session with one that works.
---
|
---
_Rep. Roberson and Speaker Jason White support the INSPIRE bill_ _._
| **At the start of this year’s session, Representative Roberson unveiled the INSPIRE bill, which proposed giving every child in the state a weighted amount of funding, based on their individual circumstances.** Different people will no doubt have different views as to how best to weight the amount per student, but everyone ought to be able to agree on the basic principle of funding students, rather than a system.

**The House overwhelmingly backed INSPIRE, with majority support on both sides of the aisle.** (Indeed, according to the Magnolia Tribune, Democrat support for INSPIRE has increased with each vote). The Governor, also, came out strongly in favor.

**I don’t think it is totally fair to say that the Senate is against INSPIRE. It is just that some in the Senate have used various procedural maneuvers to kill it off.**

Why?

It can’t be about the amount of money. **Most school districts would be better off under INSPIRE.** There would be significantly more money. Jackson Public Schools, for example, could receive something like $20 million more in state funding under INSPIRE.

Some have said that they oppose INSPIRE because it does not have an objective formula for the base student cost. **Opposing a funding formula for being insufficiently formulaic sounds to me like scrambling around for a reason to be against it.**

**Some, I suspect oppose INSPIRE because it wasn’t their idea in the first place. If so, then how sad for our state, and what a sad reflection on their leadership.**
---
|
---
_Governor Tate Reeves strongly supports INSPIRE.___
| There is a slight chance that we might still see real change. The House has given school funding reform another lifeline, inserting the INSPIRE bill text into SB2693. It is possible that the Senate might yet approve it.

**Failing that, I hope that Governor Tate Reeves and Speaker White work together to play hardball, perhaps even extending the session, or holding a special session. **Conservatives across the state would rally behind them.

**Mississippi deserves better than what we have seen so far this session.**
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d388fc105a&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=2f5cea8f3a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=2f5cea8f3a).

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: I’m not going anywhere!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Our movement is growing stronger. Our coalition is building.

|
---
| | | | [**Our movement is growing stronger. Our coalition is building.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=1)

---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=2)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
My campaign first requested Secret Service protection in May of 2023 with a 63-page declaration showing the many threats that have been made against me.
Despite filing five additional requests, _all have been refused_.
We are currently awaiting responses to our pending requests from both the Secret Service and the White House.
This marks the first time in 55 years that a presidential candidate’s request for protection has been denied.
It's unprecedented in history for a presidential candidate not to receive Secret Service coverage from the administration.
Think about that for a moment—it's a significant deviation from the norm.
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=5)
---
Polls, a key factor in determining eligibility for Secret Service protection, show strong support for my campaign.
According to a New York Times/Siena Poll, I'm at 24% in battleground states. An NBC poll suggests 34% of Americans could see themselves voting for me, indicating a base of 50 million Americans rallying behind our vision.
Historically, presidential candidates received Secret Service protection well in advance of the election, regardless of political affiliation—Obama by the Bush Administration, Trump by Obama, and Biden by Trump.
The decision not to grant me Secret Service protection appears to be a strategic move to impact our campaign's momentum and resources. _However, this only strengthens our resolve to push forward and ensure our voice is heard._
The challenges we face, including certain decisions from Secretary Mayorkas and the current administration, highlight the need for vigilance and resilience in our campaign.
[Can I count on your continued support today?](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=6)
[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=7)
[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?amount=10&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=8)
[CONTRIBUTE $24](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?amount=24&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=9)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 ](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=10)
[CONTRIBUTE $240](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=11)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=12)
I want to be clear: my respect for the Secret Service is immense. The issues we face stem from decisions made far above their jurisdiction.
Judicial Watch has recently uncovered a substantial number of documents from DHS related to my request for Secret Service protection, yet over 100 pages were redacted.
_What are they trying to hide?_
So, here’s what I want to say to the political establishment and those maneuvering in secrecy: _I’m not going anywhere!_
Our movement is growing stronger. Our coalition is building. I’m more steadfast than ever about winning in November.
Thank you for your faithful support!
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/protection-video-donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_4_13_24_rs_nd1&n=13)
|

clean_body: Our movement is growing stronger. Our coalition is building. | | | | | | | Dear Peter, My campaign first requested Secret Service protection in May of 2023 with a 63-page declaration showing the many threats that have been made against me. Despite filing five additional requests, all have been refused. We are currently awaiting responses to our pending requests from both the Secret Service and the White House. This marks the first time in 55 years that a presidential candidate’s request for protection has been denied. It's unprecedented in history for a presidential candidate not to receive Secret Service coverage from the administration. Think about that for a moment—it's a significant deviation from the norm. Polls, a key factor in determining eligibility for Secret Service protection, show strong support for my campaign. According to a New York Times/Siena Poll, I'm at 24% in battleground states. An NBC poll suggests 34% of Americans could see themselves voting for me, indicating a base of 50 million Americans rallying behind our vision. Historically, presidential candidates received Secret Service protection well in advance of the election, regardless of political affiliation—Obama by the Bush Administration, Trump by Obama, and Biden by Trump. The decision not to grant me Secret Service protection appears to be a strategic move to impact our campaign's momentum and resources. However, this only strengthens our resolve to push forward and ensure our voice is heard. The challenges we face, including certain decisions from Secretary Mayorkas and the current administration, highlight the need for vigilance and resilience in our campaign. I want to be clear: my respect for the Secret Service is immense. The issues we face stem from decisions made far above their jurisdiction. Judicial Watch has recently uncovered a substantial number of documents from DHS related to my request for Secret Service protection, yet over 100 pages were redacted. What are they trying to hide? So, here’s what I want to say to the political establishment and those maneuvering in secrecy: I’m not going anywhere! Our movement is growing stronger. Our coalition is building. I’m more steadfast than ever about winning in November. Thank you for your faithful support! | | Sincerely, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. | | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jz2PnDAQhn_N0IHsGT7WBUUSRIpIKVJEuurkNWbXJ8ZmjS20__4Et7rOft5nvjSvi5ufPXQ_AfHupg0QgX4A4uNt55g_-M_vcr_9-18-2r_cHCn-AsT0XO23-upSWdZuOWg3FFNP8yTqwvaykySEUo0q7r0i0c5I1hpLsp0F1W0na6WaWWnVUFO4HgXWopYkjwdWVgijO-pmaS8K6QK1OOdUmm10Rsst7TrGELgygYulv6e0budiI-C4WZOjrXbno50OA3D0Orng9VKa4LfkUn59F72X2bvgAcdVxyn4kq_lWQI05sTvW8jRWKDhKwZsD8p2cpmBhkM9idG8anfzQANfXyzZeDh7lICt5pB9AhqwKWI_rbtbFre1HdTidl5nAn8GAAD__00Sgj8) Patriot,

I’ve now represented 50 Americans who have been politically charged for peacefully protesting on January 6th.

And of those, 12 jury trials have been held.

Despite my best efforts and Harvard Law pedigree, the guilty verdicts keep coming.

I firmly believe no attorney in America could return a "not guilty" verdict for these Americans. It is impossible as **these are Biden's SHOW TRIALS to dole out political punishment**.

My job is to preserve appeals for these men and women while pursuing other strategies I cannot openly discuss. However, my organization, NCLU, **[needs your help to keep the fight alive](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jz2PnDAQhn_N0IHsGT7WBUUSRIpIKVJEuurkNWbXJ8ZmjS20__4Et7rOft5nvjSvi5ufPXQ_AfHupg0QgX4A4uNt55g_-M_vcr_9-18-2r_cHCn-AsT0XO23-upSWdZuOWg3FFNP8yTqwvaykySEUo0q7r0i0c5I1hpLsp0F1W0na6WaWWnVUFO4HgXWopYkjwdWVgijO-pmaS8K6QK1OOdUmm10Rsst7TrGELgygYulv6e0budiI-C4WZOjrXbno50OA3D0Orng9VKa4LfkUn59F72X2bvgAcdVxyn4kq_lWQI05sTvW8jRWKDhKwZsD8p2cpmBhkM9idG8anfzQANfXyzZeDh7lICt5pB9AhqwKWI_rbtbFre1HdTidl5nAn8GAAD__00Sgj8).**

I have now spent months camped out in the Swamp as I work these trials, and it is costing us tens of thousands of dollars with each trial...

...and that's our expenses between accommodations and travel for staff, family, and witnesses. **[Will you chip in to help cover our costs?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jz2PnDAQhn_N0IHsGT7WBUUSRIpIKVJEuurkNWbXJ8ZmjS20__4Et7rOft5nvjSvi5ufPXQ_AfHupg0QgX4A4uNt55g_-M_vcr_9-18-2r_cHCn-AsT0XO23-upSWdZuOWg3FFNP8yTqwvaykySEUo0q7r0i0c5I1hpLsp0F1W0na6WaWWnVUFO4HgXWopYkjwdWVgijO-pmaS8K6QK1OOdUmm10Rsst7TrGELgygYulv6e0budiI-C4WZOjrXbno50OA3D0Orng9VKa4LfkUn59F72X2bvgAcdVxyn4kq_lWQI05sTvW8jRWKDhKwZsD8p2cpmBhkM9idG8anfzQANfXyzZeDh7lICt5pB9AhqwKWI_rbtbFre1HdTidl5nAn8GAAD__00Sgj8)**

This past week, my client, a young family man named Jared Kastner, was found guilty on all counts and will be sentenced in the coming months.

His offense?

While traveling to Washington with his church group, he peacefully entered the Capitol, damaging or disturbing nothing and harming no one.

Jared and his wife, Kaitlyn, have a beautiful seven-month-old daughter and are expecting their second. **If Biden's DOJ gets its way, Jared will likely spend the first years of his newborn's life in Federal Prison**.

My subsequent trial for Bryan Smith begins on May 6th. What the government has done to this man is truly evil, and our trial prep has already started.

I need to purchase airline tickets for my team to return to DC and book hotel rooms.

**[I would appreciate any amount you can contribute](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jz2PnDAQhn_N0IHsGT7WBUUSRIpIKVJEuurkNWbXJ8ZmjS20__4Et7rOft5nvjSvi5ufPXQ_AfHupg0QgX4A4uNt55g_-M_vcr_9-18-2r_cHCn-AsT0XO23-upSWdZuOWg3FFNP8yTqwvaykySEUo0q7r0i0c5I1hpLsp0F1W0na6WaWWnVUFO4HgXWopYkjwdWVgijO-pmaS8K6QK1OOdUmm10Rsst7TrGELgygYulv6e0budiI-C4WZOjrXbno50OA3D0Orng9VKa4LfkUn59F72X2bvgAcdVxyn4kq_lWQI05sTvW8jRWKDhKwZsD8p2cpmBhkM9idG8anfzQANfXyzZeDh7lICt5pB9AhqwKWI_rbtbFre1HdTidl5nAn8GAAD__00Sgj8)** to offset these costs.

While we defend these Americans in court, Biden’s Department of Justice continues their arrests. Just scan the news. As I write you, a Cincinnati man was arrested for following a group of people through the open doors of the Capitol.

**And Biden will not give up**. They won’t stop arresting Americans until November has passed and the political games they play are over.

The wheels of justice turn slowly despite the rapid-fire show trials that are now occurring, and **I pray that in less than a year, my clients and the other 1,300 Americans who have been charged will be fully pardoned.**

In the meantime, **we must fight with everything we have to keep these men and women out of federal prison as jobs and homes are being lost and, sadly, families are being broken**.

**[Patriot, will you help?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jz2PnDAQhn_N0IHsGT7WBUUSRIpIKVJEuurkNWbXJ8ZmjS20__4Et7rOft5nvjSvi5ufPXQ_AfHupg0QgX4A4uNt55g_-M_vcr_9-18-2r_cHCn-AsT0XO23-upSWdZuOWg3FFNP8yTqwvaykySEUo0q7r0i0c5I1hpLsp0F1W0na6WaWWnVUFO4HgXWopYkjwdWVgijO-pmaS8K6QK1OOdUmm10Rsst7TrGELgygYulv6e0budiI-C4WZOjrXbno50OA3D0Orng9VKa4LfkUn59F72X2bvgAcdVxyn4kq_lWQI05sTvW8jRWKDhKwZsD8p2cpmBhkM9idG8anfzQANfXyzZeDh7lICt5pB9AhqwKWI_rbtbFre1HdTidl5nAn8GAAD__00Sgj8)**

Thank you for **[any support you can provide](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jz2PnDAQhn_N0IHsGT7WBUUSRIpIKVJEuurkNWbXJ8ZmjS20__4Et7rOft5nvjSvi5ufPXQ_AfHupg0QgX4A4uNt55g_-M_vcr_9-18-2r_cHCn-AsT0XO23-upSWdZuOWg3FFNP8yTqwvaykySEUo0q7r0i0c5I1hpLsp0F1W0na6WaWWnVUFO4HgXWopYkjwdWVgijO-pmaS8K6QK1OOdUmm10Rsst7TrGELgygYulv6e0budiI-C4WZOjrXbno50OA3D0Orng9VKa4LfkUn59F72X2bvgAcdVxyn4kq_lWQI05sTvW8jRWKDhKwZsD8p2cpmBhkM9idG8anfzQANfXyzZeDh7lICt5pB9AhqwKWI_rbtbFre1HdTidl5nAn8GAAD__00Sgj8)** to help me keep fighting.

In Vigilance,
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jz2PnDAQhn_N0IHsGT7WBUUSRIpIKVJEuurkNWbXJ8ZmjS20__4Et7rOft5nvjSvi5ufPXQ_AfHupg0QgX4A4uNt55g_-M_vcr_9-18-2r_cHCn-AsT0XO23-upSWdZuOWg3FFNP8yTqwvaykySEUo0q7r0i0c5I1hpLsp0F1W0na6WaWWnVUFO4HgXWopYkjwdWVgijO-pmaS8K6QK1OOdUmm10Rsst7TrGELgygYulv6e0budiI-C4WZOjrXbno50OA3D0Orng9VKa4LfkUn59F72X2bvgAcdVxyn4kq_lWQI05sTvW8jRWKDhKwZsD8p2cpmBhkM9idG8anfzQANfXyzZeDh7lICt5pB9AhqwKWI_rbtbFre1HdTidl5nAn8GAAD__00Sgj8)
John M. Pierce

| | **25 election deniers now serve in statewide offices overseeing elections in 19 states — seven governors, five secretaries of state, two state elections board members, and 11 attorneys general.** There’s no sugarcoating this: The foxes are guarding the henhouse of our democracy. Election deniers have used their positions of authority to hinder election administration, push dangerous unfounded claims of voter fraud, and pull out of an effort to ensure accurate voter rolls. These anti-voter extremists have no place in elected office. **We’re fighting to elect pro-voter candidates in the 2024 cycle and beyond. And no matter how hard some politicians try to suppress the vote, we’ll work even harder to make sure eligible voters have the resources they need to cast their ballots.** But this work depends on grassroots support from activists like you. The amount of donations we receive from emails like this one informs how much we can invest in protecting the freedom to vote. [**Can you make a donation of $20 or any amount to help defend free and fair elections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82937997/466787609/93727327?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240413_f_deniersresend_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjk0MjEzMi04ZWY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1hng4s6iq97SQwI_juTy-ZsRZQbdXYK4YPDZ4OFV4DU=) Together, The Fair Fight Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82937998/466787610/93727327?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240413_f_deniersresend_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjk0MjEzMi04ZWY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1hng4s6iq97SQwI_juTy-ZsRZQbdXYK4YPDZ4OFV4DU=)

clean_body: This work depends on grassroots support from activists like you. | | | 25 election deniers now serve in statewide offices overseeing elections in 19 states — seven governors, five secretaries of state, two state elections board members, and 11 attorneys general. There’s no sugarcoating this: The foxes are guarding the henhouse of our democracy. Election deniers have used their positions of authority to hinder election administration, push dangerous unfounded claims of voter fraud, and pull out of an effort to ensure accurate voter rolls. These anti-voter extremists have no place in elected office. We’re fighting to elect pro-voter candidates in the 2024 cycle and beyond. And no matter how hard some politicians try to suppress the vote, we’ll work even harder to make sure eligible voters have the resources they need to cast their ballots. But this work depends on grassroots support from activists like you. The amount of donations we receive from emails like this one informs how much we can invest in protecting the freedom to vote. = Together, The Fair Fight Team | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2024 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. body:
This is a huge victory.

| | | Friend,

This is Coach Tommy Tuberville - U.S. Senator from the great state of Alabama and a guy who believes all this woke insanity from the left is complete and total nonsense.

**Here 's the good news - the NAIA, which governs 249 small colleges around the country, has voted UNANIMOUSLY to BAN transgender athletes (these are biological males) from competing in women's sports!**

_This is a huge victory_. Common sense has prevailed in a big way.

I have been on the forefront in this fight. I have introduced multiple bills in the U.S Senate to put an end to this agenda once and for all. I know better than most that we need to do all we can to **PROTECT WOMEN 'S SPORTS**.

clean_body: This is a huge victory. | | | Friend, This is Coach Tommy Tuberville - U.S. Senator from the great state of Alabama and a guy who believes all this woke insanity from the left is complete and total nonsense. Here 's the good news - the NAIA, which governs 249 small colleges around the country, has voted UNANIMOUSLY to BAN transgender athletes (these are biological males) from competing in women's sports! This is a huge victory. Common sense has prevailed in a big way. I have been on the forefront in this fight. I have introduced multiple bills in the U.S Senate to put an end to this agenda once and for all. I know better than most that we need to do all we can to PROTECT WOMEN 'S SPORTS. This is a big win. But it's a small victory in the big scheme of things. They think you 're a BIGOT if you're against biological men competing against young girls and women. These people are out of their minds - I can 't believe this is even a debate! Help me lead the charge to get this nonsense OUT of all high school and college athletics and out of the Olympics. These far-left Democrats beholden to the woke left WILL NOT LISTEN unless the American people stand up and speak up for our young women. The woke left wants you to pretend men and women are the same. That men don't run faster, punch harder, and jump higher. Are they OUT OF THEIR MINDS?! I know you don't want your daughter or granddaughter competing against a boy in swimming, soccer, or tennis. We cannot allow this nonsense. Every bit of support is a huge help. And I can assure you, I will not let up. This cannot become the "new norm" in America. Coach Tommy Tuberville U.S. Senator, Alabama | | Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc. | | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hung
subject: I’m sorry to bother you this early
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | Peter,
---
I’m sorry to bother you this early on a Saturday, but I just got out of bed and I couldn’t get my day started until I got this off my chest: **Democrats just announced Virginia as a must-win state to hold onto their Senate majority.**

That means that if we defeat Tim Kaine, their chances at the majority are all over - and Republicans can start really getting back to work to get our country back on track.

_But it also means that we’re going to see an INFLUX of Democrat money, and their attacks on me are only going to get more outrageous and vicious._

**[I need every patriot in our corner to step up RIGHT NOW if we’re going to win this race and take back the Senate, Peter. Can I count on you?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=cbccf4ccaf9e44b9be2014c64fd9a023&_e=6wY8xMbxnqUmDJEMyTuwlblj5vQ_CtHyuMNemnkDHMhfcDyoA7rlQxmo4cpu5_fQ4a17EQoIdF6VjN6jfKv_wDCLegJD_TqaXzzt556tun31Y5Svuqzy680tDPJ3_gfxNlusOYRIxKyyiPKk3mbROyYjWCXi9GGLDxXeXA9otHXhhcGQhEy3GEbTnlyHDKzcZtGL6YAB5S41VcAhwJEzHtbC0IEaHyqO7CRyYojwmz16BPzlK3PqfOYoT13mzj4wt4Ck4_XPviD3QWoJNB_MVwsyR5w83r7Tn-J9VChsBRBc5HJazfgMwASezUyljSKn-eBitOx3ys8rAPLiIF-1uO5dlBw7pg7xTdC3hyY5I-GJgGb-Fn-Budi598XE0lcWFmXFHo3UgQYtKd8Dkz6D3A%3D%3D)**

| | Patriot, I rarely take this step, but I sense this family needs me.

I want you to please, just read this and do what your heart
compels you to do.
I’m reaching out with an urgent plea on behalf of Officer Chris
Taylor and his family.
Imagine dedicating your life to serving and protecting your
community, only to find yourself facing life in prison for
performing your duty.
Soon, Chris will go to trial (AGAIN!), accused of a crime he did
not commit – defending himself and others against a deadly
threat.

**[I’m asking you for your financial support towards Chris’s defense. subject: Cloe Had Her Bre**ts Removed at 13 - Now Says It Is "Nazi experiments"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Cox for Congress, Inc
body:
I will fight to stop FISA warrantless spying and Trans Surgeries on Minors. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/coxforcongress/cloe-had-her-brets-removed-at-13-now-says-it-is-nazi-experiments-6724089?e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| |
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $310 TO HELP US GET ON AIR>>](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=635f6efd21&e=5bb5efcda7 "CONTRIBUTE $310 TO HELP US GET ON AIR>>")
---
| |
# Our Country Is Worth Saving.
Dear ,

Our country is worth saving - and too many spineless politicians are continuing to trample our Constitution.

Today, by a tie-vote-breaking vote, Congress shamefully voted to continue spying on you with FISA warrantless searches in violation of the Fourth Amendment of the Constitution.

_However, because of patriot Congresswoman Luna, we have one more chance this Monday to stop this tyrannical practice that was used to spy on President Trump and likely you and me - including "Constitutional" and freedom-loving anti-Lockdown citizens._

Congressman Jim Jordan valiantly spoke on the House Floor the simple truth in defense of our Constitution: if the government wants to spy on any American citizen, "get a WARRANT!"

[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=128e0eda21&e=5bb5efcda7)

As I've been lobbying for years, I would have not only voted NO on extending FiSA spying, I would have worked the leadership for a more unified conference to pass the Biggs Amendment requiring compliance with the Fourth Amendment and an end to the spying without a warrant.

**My opponent Neil Parrott is shamelessly silent in acquiescence once again.** Is that the kind of "leadership" you want? I hope not - because my wife and I want nothing to do with this kind of Deep State trampling on our Constitution and the future of our children and grandchildren. I will fight it with every breath God gives me.

Few things highlight this more than parental rights in the Health and trans identity debate.

[England has banned the practice](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=834320c690&e=5bb5efcda7) on minors - and we should follow suit! In the article below, Chloe had her breasts removed at age 13 and now calls such acts "Nazi-era experiments." That is the similar human rights argument I made to protect kids from trans-castrations on the House Floor just three years ago.

[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=bdd6868dbd&e=5bb5efcda7)

In fact - can you believe it - in the UK they require parental permission for kids to buy Mountain Dew! And here radical politicians want to emasculate your kids before they even develop without even you knowing. That's criminal child abuse and a violation of the laws of nature and nature's God.

[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=07f7aec062&e=5bb5efcda7)

I have served you as State Delegate and attorney, fighting globalist WHO and big Pharma powers-that-be (with BILLIONS of dollars) in defense of medical freedom and the Human Rights of parents determining their child's healthcare.

That is why I am proud to announce [I have been endorsed by STAND FOR HEALTH FREEDOM](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=08536b2fd7&e=5bb5efcda7) \- a national parental rights and health freedom advocacy organization.

America is on the brink of losing our Republic. We must not let that happen. Franklin said we have a Republic, "If you can keep it." [Help me](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=71be23382a&e=5bb5efcda7) do so.

**I have 31 days until the Primary Election and only two weeks until Early Voting radio commercials must be running on air.**

Would you [help me make up our $20,000 shortfall](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=4fedf135d3&e=5bb5efcda7)?

The day is far spent; the voting has already begun. Thank you for helping.

God bless and God bless America,

[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=afd9c7ca5b&e=5bb5efcda7)
Dan Cox, Candidate for U.S. House of Representatives (R-MD6) [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=44655be4fe&e=5bb5efcda7)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ICYMI: Ozinga's Vacated House Seat Filled
body:
Ozinga ally Patrick Sheehan, a law enforcement veteran, sworn in today to fill the House seat suddenly vacated by an out-of-country Tim Ozinga.

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/ad25c63e5a64/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10299228?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=6ed0f732be) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=6ed0f732be)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Dear Peter,

Earlier this week we reported that Illinois State Representative Tim Ozinga abruptly resigned from his office, as speculation about a potential future statewide campaign spread like wildfire. Late today, as Ozinga is reportedly overseas, his House seat was filled by political ally and law enforcement veteran, Patrick Sheehan. Continue to follow Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for more updates.

** Patrick Sheehan Selected to Fill Seat Vacated by Political Ally and Former State Rep. Tim Ozinga (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/patrick-sheehan-selected-to-fill-seat-vacated-by-political-ally-and-former-state-rep-tim-ozinga.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/patrick-sheehan-selected-to-fill-seat-vacated-by-political-ally-and-former-state-rep-tim-ozinga.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

By Illinois Review

On Friday afternoon, Lockport Alderman Patrick Sheehan was selected and sworn in to replace former State Rep. Tim Ozinga, (37th Dist.), who abruptly resigned (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/bombshell-resignation-rocks-illinois-gop-tim-ozinga-vacates-office-effective-immediately.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on Tuesday, effective immediately, amid rumors that he is eying a run for governor in 2026.

The selection of Sheehan came as no surprise, as the local alderman is a close ally of Ozinga. But the rush to name his appointment just days after the shock resignation has many wondering why. Ozinga has been a major financial contributor to Sheehnan’s campaigns.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/patrick-sheehan-selected-to-fill-seat-vacated-by-political-ally-and-former-state-rep-tim-ozinga.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On his Facebook page, Sheehan, a law enforcement veteran, wrote:

“I am humbled and honored to be named the new State Representative for the 37th District. I look forward to serving you here and in Springfield to continue to make our district the best it can be.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/patrick-sheehan-selected-to-fill-seat-vacated-by-political-ally-and-former-state-rep-tim-ozinga.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/patrick-sheehan-selected-to-fill-seat-vacated-by-political-ally-and-former-state-rep-tim-ozinga.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Meanwhile, it's been quite a week in Chicago, as disgraced Chicago GOP Chair Stephen Boulton, who achieved only 24 write-in ballots of the 111 necessary to retain his committeeman post, lashes out at Illinois Review for publishing (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/chicago-gop-chair-steve-boulton-endorsed-a-never-trumper-in-2016-and-compared-trump-to-hitler-now-trying-to-facilitate-a-trump-visit-secure-campaign-money.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) his Never Trumper posts. During the same time, though, the purported leader of the free world, Joe Biden, visited Chicago for a very low-key but high-dollar fundraiser, which we bring to you here.

** Biden Needs Teleprompter During Small, Private Fundraiser in Downtown Chicago Home with Close Friends, Wealthy Supporters (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/biden-needs-teleprompter-during-small-private-fundraiser-in-downtown-chicago-home-with-close-friends-wealthy-supporters.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/biden-needs-teleprompter-during-small-private-fundraiser-in-downtown-chicago-home-with-close-friends-wealthy-supporters.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
This past Monday night, President Joe Biden needed a teleprompter set up in the living room of a private home to address a small group of wealthy donors and close friends, as he made a brief stop in downtown Chicago to raise money for his re-election campaign.

The private event, attended by about 50 people including Bill Daley, the former White House Chief of Staff under President Barack Obama, and First Lady of Illinois MK Pritzker. The fundraiser was hosted by Michael Sacks, CEO of GCM Grosvenor, an investment and advisory firm and Chicago Cubs co-owner Laura Ricketts.

Ricketts, a Democrat, is the sister of Republican’s Pete, Tom and Todd. Todd Ricketts was listed as a
co-chair (https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/trumps-palm-beach-fundraiser-joined-melania-trump-rakes/story?id=108949489&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for the Palm Beach fundraiser last Saturday night that raised a record $50.5 million for President Donald Trump’s presidential campaign. In 2019, President Trump selected Todd to serve as Finance Chairman for Trump Victory. Pete Ricketts served as the 40th Governor of Nebraska and is now a United States Senator.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/chicago-gop-chair-steve-boulton-endorsed-a-never-trumper-in-2016-and-compared-trump-to-hitler-now-trying-to-facilitate-a-trump-visit-secure-campaign-money.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.mypillow.com/ir?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6ed0f732be-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Tim Ozinga, (37th Dist.), who abruptly resigned () on Tuesday, effective immediately, amid rumors that he is eying a run for governor in 2026. The selection of Sheehan came as no surprise, as the local alderman is a close ally of Ozinga. But the rush to name his appointment just days after the shock resignation has many wondering why. Ozinga has been a major financial contributor to Sheehnan’s campaigns. CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () On his Facebook page, Sheehan, a law enforcement veteran, wrote: “I am humbled and honored to be named the new State Representative for the 37th District. I look forward to serving you here and in Springfield to continue to make our district the best it can be.” CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () Meanwhile, it's been quite a week in Chicago, as disgraced Chicago GOP Chair Stephen Boulton, who achieved only 24 write-in ballots of the 111 necessary to retain his committeeman post, lashes out at Illinois Review for publishing () his Never Trumper posts. During the same time, though, the purported leader of the free world, Joe Biden, visited Chicago for a very low-key but high-dollar fundraiser, which we bring to you here. Biden Needs Teleprompter During Small, Private Fundraiser in Downtown Chicago Home with Close Friends, Wealthy Supporters () This past Monday night, President Joe Biden needed a teleprompter set up in the living room of a private home to address a small group of wealthy donors and close friends, as he made a brief stop in downtown Chicago to raise money for his re-election campaign. The private event, attended by about 50 people including Bill Daley, the former White House Chief of Staff under President Barack Obama, and First Lady of Illinois MK Pritzker. The fundraiser was hosted by Michael Sacks, CEO of GCM Grosvenor, an investment and advisory firm and Chicago Cubs co-owner Laura Ricketts. Ricketts, a Democrat, is the sister of Republican’s Pete, Tom and Todd. Todd Ricketts was listed as a co-chair () for the Palm Beach fundraiser last Saturday night that raised a record $50.5 million for President Donald Trump’s presidential campaign. In 2019, President Trump selected Todd to serve as Finance Chairman for Trump Victory. Pete Ricketts served as the 40th Governor of Nebraska and is now a United States Senator. | | Friend, It’s about time someone had the backbone to protect women in sports! The National Association of Intercollegiate Athletics just [took a stand](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=deccaa807c16441e86caad6df8b37138&_e=Z1JsmjZCIxF-bJpt7VW492CC6yxxqMH5qW06UeaKnJsyoy3DhCs1CWWBWCWhQgWHjnZkPPX_o3GHeU1-E0el_ZufVktU5dOxTOAX2554D0AAmrcXTa1yUHNZvrXQPCbqV5KkDR78SiPiraWqJaFPlHMbZnGKqX0njUavMBu8pxE6C_5YlNttdqV0LZOGHpXDCvWHKaElsrpvWMMycGaRPG6WnMMBSAlexrSVnM7e2zsElwUxv0M3OAyg3DlVAHTrJAXHFt6wCkxPqcGa6n7IDeVcAZw9h6vV5vc4P7U6C5bOoQRsO0FRUN1ExH8zI41Y) against the woke bullies by banning biological men from competing in women’s sports, citing the need for “fair and safe competition for all student-athletes.” Finally, _someone_ said it. But hey, can we get some guts from the [NCAA](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=deccaa807c16441e86caad6df8b37138&_e=Z1JsmjZCIxF-bJpt7VW492CC6yxxqMH5qW06UeaKnJuEio1REO1E_JSq9GiTwhhEj2nsr0PjwCpg4KTK4TjJvTOq3cESaOc-zytGdbQkGWBNIO8-6iZwdzqHfI_0qOQLb80Ipa6wLMnyN_yp09bSsRQ1zOhNZfnSUzRh-0dXqIlirPEveOZ_HErj7pF7xemS30LV1FtgUjDLc8VCSViWFBLNDLU7p3XfqvlmT-VLSH6BXU3ZO3qdpWb93njGNQCmwCE9Emc8XiFl9rajQo_Lg-aKlDBFzG93owMrLpDkl7bjxPFArtXXFwnj1jO20yg6) to follow suit? I’m not holding my breath, but I’ll continue to apply the pressure.
---
[**DEMAND FAIR PLAY**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=deccaa807c16441e86caad6df8b37138&_e=Z1JsmjZCIxF-bJpt7VW49_4sKQu0os-kipLTi5dzgFb3ALNGe2gvIM-ziUgF4dB9sCPqgdOktGFUPZow7NfSo-mQR6GHpsyOmnLkGwED-8PqiYpqWIl8TCM_CdX8fMORu4c2-D5PWycDTnRElmbyNdsxfhZjTEAl3XJtQ7d5pkqmYqz6ymEhp9E8vQsIn53PoJC6m3a9N1vxeS1yhq7jp513S4dW-uigReuhP0P0OncJMATa7EQjL5rK9PMqHOKxfsMqmQxIYFSuxe6gMP2WbqFjohjVeTGPt4pebfue_ZIaSe8njdHJVoU_JnU94vFUOGin58LJPj3UZtA1P1GscaH3ES_2SB5W0vZcsrBg684%3D)
---
Let’s not kid ourselves, men and women are different, especially in athletics. Even the [American College of Sports Medicine](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=deccaa807c16441e86caad6df8b37138&_e=Z1JsmjZCIxF-bJpt7VW490hQJPMSjX-z2ALCTcSjVpJM7S9UW4CKt0j0qAPSltdmorXgDUImsoQfDc_ECqPhUEvXch7BzFxJwiRMKzhlZVOinV1kDGa5rzT4hLCyOmpeIpMn5GqwwhUk7q9lEf-zLKBDKBX3r2iy8v7OVUkptICZ7-kZdRiOiqDcInRVmp15DsTREBqRfDhYcxCAXP5xkv2kgQ__pyHg97kVEC--nLCza7B-pvGywBs-uXoLotsSbYQNIUMlf5KcA62V54tQizw0Vecp3nrGuo9zi4CrX3S9w8XFNpqzziuOZSooG1xBEYBQZbOnvr8e4BF1ukYaIPBqtp2hb8PyyAhfXaLoZfM%3D) published a statement last year that said men are roughly 10-30% stronger and faster than women of similar age and training status. The radical people on the Left can stick their heads in the sand, but facts are facts. Aren’t these the same folks who locked us up and told us to “follow the science” for years on end? Seems like they conveniently forgot that mantra when it didn’t fit their agenda. **[Enough of this circus. The safety of women and girls in sports shouldn’t come second to men who claim to be something they’re not. Will you show your support for female athletes by taking a stand with me?](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=deccaa807c16441e86caad6df8b37138&_e=Z1JsmjZCIxF-bJpt7VW49_4sKQu0os-kipLTi5dzgFb3ALNGe2gvIM-ziUgF4dB9sCPqgdOktGFUPZow7NfSo-mQR6GHpsyOmnLkGwED-8PqiYpqWIl8TCM_CdX8fMORu4c2-D5PWycDTnRElmbyNdsxfhZjTEAl3XJtQ7d5pkqmYqz6ymEhp9E8vQsIn53PoJC6m3a9N1vxeS1yhq7jp0Q3le-iwdwQSn8oBMA5I_ALUHh6n9-Sy8v_4wmRV-VMc6J1qmQDc_nAtNDuacyhl8S2Jvhg28tHecJu9KGnKcbjB-ZR1ju86Ss4085k5L53oqhUby5wWv-MC0iPX-V-sB7qQ4vFjJS6i6nt-8NK3F4%3D) **

I refuse to watch her [get hurt](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=deccaa807c16441e86caad6df8b37138&_e=Z1JsmjZCIxF-bJpt7VW492CC6yxxqMH5qW06UeaKnJsgxDspTItCIoOYm_DihRBm68tTklD5qiYoXnvfflg2DgVH0R31XjmdoPpgdZ7Zf8KFLAFvuE-naDNBv59reBUSrM44FThACFpeb_X25npnLTEk_xOwV8Ymu6jee2wcrD1XN-fc203wTlywYN3TJe_FlkLyYkHnDPqs119FGHzL-_iX6u9JRgU_4YOrnlKc4EZkkaLirCvohjAoXyi0vtBvjLdg8owTw7H4iIjCt04Ui9KnJl6U-IffLNYUv9Wk2uPf8v09Gn5SfI1uPXGdBXfAedP4mPcMAD-Vg6ATsFuCgw%3D%3D) or [lose opportunities](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=deccaa807c16441e86caad6df8b37138&_e=Z1JsmjZCIxF-bJpt7VW499dEwtROzifq15IY6uArattr0v8ZAJp4assiujMMcEGQY3cpyASaeYSLNPsMDBunFPGprV5OQpYRvB5IFQ-NOecKKjSqB07_KRa-eTirmHCgSrfTS65QgLraqIn70UFDl7iySc9g9wxwpf3Ct9eVjYjg1lX2ct1h0pPgcnbpvuDhLJhrKej2a_y17UhN-VPKXn015CcScFUzq9P7P04_RslGZwATDoU6bYzGbDQ1ZHbG00WcPs_NyIZerz9O1K1ZHQ%3D%3D) for the sake of inclusivity gone haywire. body:
I’m a straight shooter – always have been always will. You might not like what I have to say but I will never sugarcoat the truth. Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington. |
[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e05c15ee94ef4a42b7e4b63eea560da4&_e=TcplbtR_RCmlF1abj2oaa2zpK_cA3p1yCuSAW835YuSbYt9fz5NR667EgaV_OzZi0pvagmdVyMkEu28IqujcUo9g57OwNM9gHbTHVulQuhRV4kSIJmiXvBcGFOc1DhBjWCVM5gZXSPvLuPuYUZeLPmBn64XpoeQrPuMSZJ2MfRPgu_Q2_Qm4QrfHJx88FTL6FzndJAoCwYIiezyGVuSW1uhGr9elR4yL7Xw0fsRXoVGwBtptQzS6FKTs9gw_rNWYGecKJG8L-9s3pDRMAeFW5GR2euFWPPy3Y0Hf6iAxBsxNCvhwKTo-cXekQmuFQuAmfp0S8ofCa_PY-8H2Ky0KaiMonWb8z4YodjsANWiXnL2R1nB2HyO3kKBvVgXb1Zwdh_qstWyeYb9-EfJPRXv0BdILL59HT01NGg9WYQMLFjI%3D)
---
Here’s the deal, Fellow American.

I’m a straight shooter – always have been always will. You might not like what I have to say but I will _never_ sugarcoat the truth. _Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington._

So, here’s the God-honest truth: **Republicans will lose in November if we don’t start acting like a team.**

**We’ll lose the House, and truly, I don’t think we can handle a single day of total Democrat control in Washington.**

What Democrats want to do to America is clinically insane – _they want to change our foundations, to make our country unrecognizable. They are wasting all of your hard-earned money to fund illegal immigrants, higher prices, defunding the police, forcing parents out of the classroom, and lining their own pockets._

You might be burnt out from the constant stream of news out of Washington, trust me I get it... but if you want things to actually change for the better, _**you have to pay attention.**_

[**We can’t sit back and take this way of life because if we do we’ll see Democrats take our country away.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e05c15ee94ef4a42b7e4b63eea560da4&_e=TcplbtR_RCmlF1abj2oaa2zpK_cA3p1yCuSAW835YuSbYt9fz5NR667EgaV_OzZi1oajvDfBKsdo9cESbVKOaNorKx0yfdVeQ2uqRdoEbtWIsYJc6r8GI_SsehLqvBOhURvw8ZUDg-6gMSbFBy5OZn8undEdWxtRY7d-vFJFTI6J7fEh9C16p9m4AT-3pRD_j809BjOeaD1Sox2s65g-jNbwkjZG9yyAz7h2iF3Kb26fBWFdSlWuRwK9yMAdKxcLUHcydZ7KMLbtEHrMi7vBGipDJd36vfpmXApZwwCDhBxnU8BgCEvJoyoIlcbfnY_haH4nI0w6bDfUeWFZjL58qcWspxGw94Drtv2BhvMy8gf1ZCZZXSd0M5BXrxZGReAIN20we34qcL4y4gaw92OSaNEvrnZsU3nLxNZiXiCSUT_g4HvY872AdKJXyLqh07_j)

[**I need to know you’re on the team who still cares about freedom._I need to know you are on the team who’s willing to stand up and FIGHT back against the woke mob that is infecting our country._**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e05c15ee94ef4a42b7e4b63eea560da4&_e=TcplbtR_RCmlF1abj2oaa2zpK_cA3p1yCuSAW835YuSbYt9fz5NR667EgaV_OzZi1oajvDfBKsdo9cESbVKOaNorKx0yfdVeQ2uqRdoEbtWIsYJc6r8GI_SsehLqvBOhURvw8ZUDg-6gMSbFBy5OZn8undEdWxtRY7d-vFJFTI6J7fEh9C16p9m4AT-3pRD_j809BjOeaD1Sox2s65g-jNbwkjZG9yyAz7h2iF3Kb26fBWFdSlWuRwK9yMAdKxcLUHcydZ7KMLbtEHrMi7vBGipDJd36vfpmXApZwwCDhBwFMTpPSihsXSG2fKPy9UkRQ7itFUHT569-EcqJhysYXuAZEq6p5oNLi0bZqPuDQ19mQmiw9TsZFN6kP_fZHbV4AVUWKHDwnh65XbsWEqUAQDYGjK3aBVpwbHgI9mqMzVTHyHXTZ3eNt9fqWhlLz4DL)

[** JOIN THE TEAM ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e05c15ee94ef4a42b7e4b63eea560da4&_e=TcplbtR_RCmlF1abj2oaa2zpK_cA3p1yCuSAW835YuSbYt9fz5NR667EgaV_OzZi1oajvDfBKsdo9cESbVKOaNorKx0yfdVeQ2uqRdoEbtWIsYJc6r8GI_SsehLqvBOhURvw8ZUDg-6gMSbFBy5OZn8undEdWxtRY7d-vFJFTI6J7fEh9C16p9m4AT-3pRD_j809BjOeaD1Sox2s65g-jNbwkjZG9yyAz7h2iF3Kb26fBWFdSlWuRwK9yMAdKxcLUHcydZ7KMLbtEHrMi7vBGipDJd36vfpmXApZwwCDhByG3w9s7EKYEV_ti8YFIRfNgsT-bI2R_TbCvX80Hs6zAaVuL6EyXsJSV4t7mDHDpiL17TI1WyGW8SI-iSEiqqUJdcezKpvH9LgGR5PGwpzEUHHfImMMZg7nuw9vwyujaYfMkfU_5JPEcNpCJTRTy0Ib)
Think back on your life four years ago – were things better for you under President Trump? _Under a strong Republican majority in the House and the Senate?_

I can tell you for sure that it used to cost less to fill up my car with gas and eggs were 49% cheaper. I can tell you that I used to feel safe walking down the street knowing that our border was closed and there were police to protect me under Republican leadership.

[**We have to work together if we’re going to save our country.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e05c15ee94ef4a42b7e4b63eea560da4&_e=TcplbtR_RCmlF1abj2oaa2zpK_cA3p1yCuSAW835YuSbYt9fz5NR667EgaV_OzZi1oajvDfBKsdo9cESbVKOaNorKx0yfdVeQ2uqRdoEbtWIsYJc6r8GI_SsehLqvBOhURvw8ZUDg-6gMSbFBy5OZn8undEdWxtRY7d-vFJFTI6J7fEh9C16p9m4AT-3pRD_j809BjOeaD1Sox2s65g-jNbwkjZG9yyAz7h2iF3Kb26fBWFdSlWuRwK9yMAdKxcLUHcydZ7KMLbtEHrMi7vBGipDJd36vfpmXApZwwCDhBz3x9IuXc9SMFbS-zqGCKrZ561-ukfwK91mvvr8FNgjEnTban0xnGbHWFuQFNBgmO7DVbqTmOnToVqaIknkgpIsEKahh0JXg5soOG1i-CaQQyu9XBLDOnkEIFPCAbg_WSCtGwdzWEmU-DWGgSYIJtix)

[**Are you going to be on the winning side of freedom?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e05c15ee94ef4a42b7e4b63eea560da4&_e=TcplbtR_RCmlF1abj2oaa2zpK_cA3p1yCuSAW835YuSbYt9fz5NR667EgaV_OzZi1oajvDfBKsdo9cESbVKOaNorKx0yfdVeQ2uqRdoEbtWIsYJc6r8GI_SsehLqvBOhURvw8ZUDg-6gMSbFBy5OZn8undEdWxtRY7d-vFJFTI6J7fEh9C16p9m4AT-3pRD_j809BjOeaD1Sox2s65g-jNbwkjZG9yyAz7h2iF3Kb26fBWFdSlWuRwK9yMAdKxcLUHcydZ7KMLbtEHrMi7vBGipDJd36vfpmXApZwwCDhBweoFrNhjgmYBog5uoaGYK1DqqkYxyK1vTSJFV-vlNeFWl6_-jpMynu0UFgtHsqRDUnJb66ZGVdiHCgXMs72HLQR0Yr-vIqFe1WLLKbQVjQT7ezygfEsTjAF4b8rxlWZgDsI8WiEHUXvzxqlR-rc8wg)

[** STEP UP ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e05c15ee94ef4a42b7e4b63eea560da4&_e=TcplbtR_RCmlF1abj2oaa2zpK_cA3p1yCuSAW835YuSbYt9fz5NR667EgaV_OzZi1oajvDfBKsdo9cESbVKOaNorKx0yfdVeQ2uqRdoEbtWIsYJc6r8GI_SsehLqvBOhURvw8ZUDg-6gMSbFBy5OZn8undEdWxtRY7d-vFJFTI6J7fEh9C16p9m4AT-3pRD_j809BjOeaD1Sox2s65g-jNbwkjZG9yyAz7h2iF3Kb26fBWFdSlWuRwK9yMAdKxcLUHcydZ7KMLbtEHrMi7vBGipDJd36vfpmXApZwwCDhBzxo4bJBADAG8uZVln0NbvvahxBYrbcljazax5VWVbWHnmsaLR9QKrVQPyTdFh79bUH1uPznDLI6F88vbmXW27W_TLVE1thOMGf64pofkhpnSqJZhWiVmS2M5rp-t_VaUk5vXW-gh5-S-njSfUIQyJw)
I know things are tough right now. _Things will be even more tough if you do nothing._

[**Please help.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e05c15ee94ef4a42b7e4b63eea560da4&_e=TcplbtR_RCmlF1abj2oaa2zpK_cA3p1yCuSAW835YuSbYt9fz5NR667EgaV_OzZi1oajvDfBKsdo9cESbVKOaNorKx0yfdVeQ2uqRdoEbtWIsYJc6r8GI_SsehLqvBOhURvw8ZUDg-6gMSbFBy5OZn8undEdWxtRY7d-vFJFTI6J7fEh9C16p9m4AT-3pRD_j809BjOeaD1Sox2s65g-jNbwkjZG9yyAz7h2iF3Kb26fBWFdSlWuRwK9yMAdKxcLUHcydZ7KMLbtEHrMi7vBGipDJd36vfpmXApZwwCDhBzcdLku4n48H5zq5zaAU2E69d7PlxE5O-ixtlxZExAbhlpCoiSsO4tyuggO5GZmpt9FwKywFOp8i_Mor8jlGCTIJadXQpA7xvmzCwUNK7aTzgP7mZeLEkeH827lLb4s79_E39bslPvjpecSNSQWro3a)

Gratefully,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e05c15ee94ef4a42b7e4b63eea560da4&_e=TcplbtR_RCmlF1abj2oaa2zpK_cA3p1yCuSAW835YuSbYt9fz5NR667EgaV_OzZi1oajvDfBKsdo9cESbVKOaNorKx0yfdVeQ2uqRdoEbtWIsYJc6r8GI_SsehLqvBOhURvw8ZUDg-6gMSbFBy5OZn8undEdWxtRY7d-vFJFTI6J7fEh9C16p9m4AT-3pRD_j809BjOeaD1Sox2s65g-jNbwkjZG9yyAz7h2iF3Kb26fBWFdSlWuRwK9yMAdKxcLUHcydZ7KMLbtEHrMi7vBGipDJd36vfpmXApZwwCDhBxRlhd4DestSluz8Ff1o53m6o82zvr8nqZXWwg8xA5rm-kbqHhEtjei30L1sWGq2z_bFH-8mfT5u0k5fF3YsjW2T_b66IwwBzJJL4ZsENmngSIagfDNk311YEEdD1UwlPinrm04ppQuK_8e55KOOyDH)
Nancy Mace

P.S. I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute and the last dollar. So, if you only have a dollar to spare, please know how thankful I am for your support, and I hope to continue to make you proud in Congress.

| |
# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

clean_body: I’m a straight shooter – always have been always will. You might not like what I have to say but I will never sugarcoat the truth. Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington. | Here’s the deal, Fellow American. I’m a straight shooter – always have been always will. You might not like what I have to say but I will never sugarcoat the truth. Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington. So, here’s the God-honest truth: Republicans will lose in November if we don’t start acting like a team. We’ll lose the House, and truly, I don’t think we can handle a single day of total Democrat control in Washington. What Democrats want to do to America is clinically insane – they want to change our foundations, to make our country unrecognizable. They are wasting all of your hard-earned money to fund illegal immigrants, higher prices, defunding the police, forcing parents out of the classroom, and lining their own pockets. You might be burnt out from the constant stream of news out of Washington, trust me I get it... but if you want things to actually change for the better, you have to pay attention. Think back on your life four years ago – were things better for you under President Trump? Under a strong Republican majority in the House and the Senate? I can tell you for sure that it used to cost less to fill up my car with gas and eggs were 49% cheaper. I can tell you that I used to feel safe walking down the street knowing that our border was closed and there were police to protect me under Republican leadership. I know things are tough right now. Things will be even more tough if you do nothing. Gratefully, Nancy Mace P.S. I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute and the last dollar. So, if you only have a dollar to spare, please know how thankful I am for your support, and I hope to continue to make you proud in Congress. | | About Nancy Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. go.txting.io/mEWDMy | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress Nancy Mace for Congress | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186, Charleston, SC 29492

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Is today the day?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1337%2E135344%2EhMScQq)

Friend -
If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make your first online contribution to Elissa Slotkin, we think today should be the day.
Why?
CNN has called this seat one of the most likely to flip in 2024 — and as one of the only competitive open Senate seat in the country, this could be the race that decides whether Democrats maintain control of the Senate majority.
Recent polls show Trump leading by several points in Michigan, which means keeping our state blue will not be easy – proving once again something all Michiganders know: Michigan is NOT a solid blue state, and as a swing state, we have a tendency to swing. But it is possible to hold the line and keep Michigan blue as long as we all stand together in this race.
And finally, Elissa doesn’t take money from corporate PACs. So while the four serious Republicans in this race are relying on dark money and/or their own personal fortunes, she is instead counting on lots and lots of people to chip in to build a winning campaign.
All of this is important because the money we raise and the decisions we make right now are going to have a huge impact on this race down the road. Because it's the early donations that allow our campaign to spend our resources as efficiently as possible. For instance, with money in the bank, we can buy TV and digital ad time early, before rates jack up in the fall.
So we’re asking you directly:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to help send Elissa Slotkin to the U.S. Senate? We wouldn’t ask if your donation wasn’t so important to the success of our campaign.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240412-1-15&t=2&akid=1337%2E135344%2EhMScQq)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-apr24.MPN_eA&refcode=em240412-1-15&t=21&akid=1337%2E135344%2EhMScQq)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-apr24.WaQHpq&refcode=em240412-1-15&t=22&akid=1337%2E135344%2EhMScQq)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-apr24.p-WIIy&refcode=em240412-1-15&t=23&akid=1337%2E135344%2EhMScQq)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-apr24.xlCj6c&refcode=em240412-1-15&t=24&akid=1337%2E135344%2EhMScQq)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-apr24.a-wBJH&refcode=em240412-1-15&t=25&akid=1337%2E135344%2EhMScQq)**

****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-apr24.V4GRCl&refcode=em240412-1-15&t=26&akid=1337%2E135344%2EhMScQq)**
---

\- Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=1337%2E135344%2EhMScQq).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=28&akid=1337%2E135344%2EhMScQq)

Folks,

I'm up a creek without a paddle, and my pirogue just sprung a huge leak.

I'm giving it all I got to stand up for you and our Conservative values, but everywhere I turn, there are more and more of them woke loonies.

subject: It all comes down to Ohio:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Red-state Democrats like Sherrod Brown are in urgent danger of putting our entire Democracy on the line
| **⚠️Folks, control of the Senate is up for grabs in OHIO⚠️**
With a one-seat Senate majority, red-state Democrats like Sherrod Brown are in _urgent danger_ of putting our entire Democracy on the line! [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65707?t=6&akid=13768%2E878179%2EXzlkN_) **[Listen, folks like you could be the tiebreaker for vulnerable Democrats like Sherrod Brown – _especially in red states like Ohio!_ Please: rush $7 before tomorrow’s midnight deadline to save our one-seat Senate majority! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65707?t=7&akid=13768%2E878179%2EXzlkN_)** | [**$10,000 SAVE OHIO FUND GOAL: RUSH $7 TO PROTECT DEMOCRATS LIKE SHERROD BROWN & SAVE OUR SENATE MAJORITY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65707?t=8&akid=13768%2E878179%2EXzlkN_)
---
**FACT #1 →** Democrat Sen. Sherrod Brown is gearing up for a tough race in a state that’s been trending _Republican red_ over the past few election cycles.

**FACT#2 → _Donald Trump carried Ohio twice_** and his backing was KEY in getting JD Vance over the finish line last year!

**FACT #3 →** If Democrats (like you!) don’t commit to supporting vulnerable Democrats like Sherrod Brown in Ohio _today,_ **we WILL lose our one-seat Senate majority — _it’s that simple._**
**[We’ll beg if we have to: Rush $7 to save Democrats like Sherrod Brown — _and our Senate majority_ — from a total MAGA takeover led by Donald Trump and his far-right cronies in November! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65707?t=9&akid=13768%2E878179%2EXzlkN_)**
[**$10,000 SAVE OHIO FUND GOAL: RUSH $7 TO PROTECT DEMOCRATS LIKE SHERROD BROWN & SAVE OUR SENATE MAJORITY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65707?t=10&akid=13768%2E878179%2EXzlkN_)
---
Can’t do this without you!

_Team VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13768%2E878179%2EXzlkN_). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13768%2E878179%2EXzlkN_).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13768%2E878179%2EXzlkN_) to request fewer emails. Peter, we had a bit of a campaign setback last night and I’m hoping I can count on your support to get us back on track.

A huge part of our grassroots outreach efforts is running digital ads, because this competitive primary will be determined by how many persuadable Democratic voters we’re able to reach over the next few weeks.

**Digital ads lets us find and communicate with folks who might not have heard our message yet — _maybe all they’ve seen is a thousand TV ads for my multi-millionaire opponent._**

Those are voters we _need_ to reach, Peter, and that becomes even more challenging when we miss fundraising benchmarks like our Digital Ads goal. I’d hate to have to cut back on our voter outreach plans this week if we can’t turn things around.

**[Raising an extra $5,000 today would do wonders towards getting us back on track and helping us continue to fund our digital ads, so would you please consider pitching in $25 split between my campaign and The Collective PAC right away?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvfdh0fv4-ZWp0d2-eweRJuMJRXVX3qx369iQTQhsBxo1y8ADCFmMifbtZE-WXhxS1EXONt8kuK5RumP3CinH9-g669Q6PwdyFD-0ADf264GjfB8_l3yqSZGEuoboKdnWzDYYy4t0F7CwbwdHhqEEKslyd86e46RouAnExX619WMOQ6ECDpuRFFum68JvwG0-S94pVMGVVKCslt1wr4eRy5i6g61ezC-xTR0cek-XS9-LsWNak8Vm_TW-JTcDpbvCCWTnv1TDR2x6pcEHWnBadSE2n7Ew91uNip9Cfr5-6KuCygjynX6HKxHZhkfp1mkqUa8LeDj6zMRPN1Hyn2NTBUFkBfT0StDYHZhT53cTTF7A/45h/JY0OWBuRQRSREv4s9FCs4w/h2/h001.r9aqauzK8oDFoXT9Ev_tmK4OvfaYvm9E9naEh2p02eI)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately to The Collective PAC.

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, we had a bit of a campaign setback last night and I’m hoping I can count on your support to get us back on track. A huge part of our grassroots outreach efforts is running digital ads, because this competitive primary will be determined by how many persuadable Democratic voters we’re able to reach over the next few weeks. Digital ads lets us find and communicate with folks who might not have heard our message yet — maybe all they’ve seen is a thousand TV ads for my multi-millionaire opponent. Those are voters we need to reach, Peter, and that becomes even more challenging when we miss fundraising benchmarks like our Digital Ads goal. I’d hate to have to cut back on our voter outreach plans this week if we can’t turn things around. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately to The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you, Peter. —Angela The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.
