| **[$6](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=d6a40c7969ec40459f93c2bd509de2fb&_e=OAiXTruwPe7tdFzg8UmXUVUyLifCZ1ar88K77-SOsvN6SCvBmomZFLPfz9nnyAYFofyKPt9XBCY2klcYdz8D4PY9jyD872jg-5JR3RYg-ILAP_REI2uUpBTBdj_U57FeXzjveIb-Le8f7ZDkGkeyenZCQZn7m6ED_hBDf1z68ORP75ckCKtX3ka9Xbhy2kyCdB9sk8hTCsSWre5m46A7zxaldNbOV9YI7is-gNkuN_aOjnWLN3Rv0K53wzJ6LgSqLtcEnSLt22AiQkcaGzhRjFhzcUxXCBRylgsAxRQI7Wk8O_uI4tfQiHAT2jUnsV7GacQzdFdhiYlKM8Qx1KIq1Sic332Aq7Wua0qvNAyYDFG4TuObbMQ2B4shupgb70vj)**

More than 23,000 donations were made to my campaign in March with **an average gift of $6**. And let me tell you that while $6 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.**In fact, our fundraising numbers are down 84% in the first 11 days of April compared to the first 11 days of March.**

This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, **[would you be able to make a contribution of $6](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=d6a40c7969ec40459f93c2bd509de2fb&_e=OAiXTruwPe7tdFzg8UmXUVUyLifCZ1ar88K77-SOsvN6SCvBmomZFLPfz9nnyAYFofyKPt9XBCY2klcYdz8D4PY9jyD872jg-5JR3RYg-ILAP_REI2uUpBTBdj_U57FeXzjveIb-Le8f7ZDkGkeyenZCQZn7m6ED_hBDf1z68ORP75ckCKtX3ka9Xbhy2kyCdB9sk8hTCsSWre5m46A7zxaldNbOV9YI7is-gNkuN_b7B60MU20LmTuQYU2FO4OBvPZo6TAzf3G7FQRkYPuaP1UptGLLss4yl8UcKSwV5z7bHLP-Ne_e8G9jqEnyc2VO1SZXfdGsBXdHtHgFi6ydssUgaytVUBjSNQxUXZF7tnyYu6ZavRVofhpIZoeYi9st)** , our average March donation, to help us kick-start our april fundraising?

[**CHIP IN $6
**](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=d6a40c7969ec40459f93c2bd509de2fb&_e=OAiXTruwPe7tdFzg8UmXUVUyLifCZ1ar88K77-SOsvN6SCvBmomZFLPfz9nnyAYFofyKPt9XBCY2klcYdz8D4PY9jyD872jg-5JR3RYg-ILAP_REI2uUpBTBdj_U57FeXzjveIb-Le8f7ZDkGkeyenZCQZn7m6ED_hBDf1z68ORP75ckCKtX3ka9Xbhy2kyCdB9sk8hTCsSWre5m46A7zxaldNbOV9YI7is-gNkuN_bYvJf2eBz9v4VkL0fwfIo-prNlNFsPwipSBQrQg7v7_tfHiIzy78haF0F0v-Bqp9GDB--DhNhks9DTlrdxbzR6J3KtoxjVEkQ8c1BcvqXOUkc0zYU3XgozrUt0hsEOLe3333Iv6NpQCdRGhYmZmtVl)
Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and **not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to.**

Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. **Not me. Not now, not ever.**

I know a couple of things to be true:
* We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it

* **Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1**

That’s why I’m reaching out today. The stakes are as high now as they were in each of the past two elections, **[yet in just one month we've seen an 84% drop in donations](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=d6a40c7969ec40459f93c2bd509de2fb&_e=OAiXTruwPe7tdFzg8UmXUVUyLifCZ1ar88K77-SOsvN6SCvBmomZFLPfz9nnyAYFofyKPt9XBCY2klcYdz8D4PY9jyD872jg-5JR3RYg-ILAP_REI2uUpBTBdj_U57FeXzjveIb-Le8f7ZDkGkeyenZCQZn7m6ED_hBDf1z68ORP75ckCKtX3ka9Xbhy2kyCdB9sk8hTCsSWre5m46A7zxaldNbOV9YI7is-gNkuN_aqAEYxMOEHegBSwBnWwkUXkbm_YpCRcLdUrtH0G4WOg-Gv-MzCzJFAjRpfzbgy2aZ3oNZc9Qn0SWAqdTbb3xtHV2txmdvgBEqTi8P5e0j_DCJMWR1VtnRotxlbIotthP1IEKhlbYIzcE4fbAwmAq3v)**. If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by **[chipping in $6](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=d6a40c7969ec40459f93c2bd509de2fb&_e=OAiXTruwPe7tdFzg8UmXUVUyLifCZ1ar88K77-SOsvN6SCvBmomZFLPfz9nnyAYFofyKPt9XBCY2klcYdz8D4PY9jyD872jg-5JR3RYg-ILAP_REI2uUpBTBdj_U57FeXzjveIb-Le8f7ZDkGkeyenZCQZn7m6ED_hBDf1z68ORP75ckCKtX3ka9Xbhy2kyCdB9sk8hTCsSWre5m46A7zxaldNbOV9YI7is-gNkuN_aYnPzL5AiohniZnWL3ntg-avYBGvmI8RuG2vIEr8kjXThy9wzHds8cOH68NGlOgl4Ek4HIWrm0idc6tKLa4L9E0d6a44VntxkFmA-7sSpglHEkvBm9QVy2ZXOjt_duSS29dj-0u64TYtSuRa5qqFX2)** or another amount today?

[**CHIP IN $6
**](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=d6a40c7969ec40459f93c2bd509de2fb&_e=OAiXTruwPe7tdFzg8UmXUVUyLifCZ1ar88K77-SOsvN6SCvBmomZFLPfz9nnyAYFofyKPt9XBCY2klcYdz8D4PY9jyD872jg-5JR3RYg-ILAP_REI2uUpBTBdj_U57FeXzjveIb-Le8f7ZDkGkeyenZCQZn7m6ED_hBDf1z68ORP75ckCKtX3ka9Xbhy2kyCdB9sk8hTCsSWre5m46A7zxaldNbOV9YI7is-gNkuN_YfU38ErpX_zeKras3iRpqaawW0kivmghUqkSrWqIphWKbCQBPjnvD8ZV6J5l-grVCHzIH9V7S8pqCOr5MYs_E0EhqKQwwnA-T35JzHo2U6mhfrbAfLPwfLxkqfRDgxMR60lhXEnoM22p3C5ITjJO25)
When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. _**Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it**_.

With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, **putting a damper on our efforts to keep our one-seat House majority**. So, if you’re able to at this time, would you please consider my request for a donation today? **[Whether it’s $5, $15, or the March average of $6, every contribution counts](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=d6a40c7969ec40459f93c2bd509de2fb&_e=OAiXTruwPe7tdFzg8UmXUVUyLifCZ1ar88K77-SOsvN6SCvBmomZFLPfz9nnyAYFofyKPt9XBCY2klcYdz8D4PY9jyD872jg-5JR3RYg-ILAP_REI2uUpBTBdj_U57FeXzjveIb-Le8f7ZDkGkeyenZCQZn7m6ED_hBDf1z68ORP75ckCKtX3ka9Xbhy2kyCdB9sk8hTCsSWre5m46A7zxaldNbOV9YI7is-gNkuN_Z0jk5KjGEmWHIk3U5NB6rUPSkJnff63uD6sqI624VjUXsJTCKu_vQd8vw5PWoR_AuMBSKIXweE2ltw5xEDAOnqW-ptMHXiavcDseirsCDWPEDGoBL2tlWn5JCNtHOqWYfSfk7w_92CWcGJ75Rw3Nq_)** - every single contribution matters.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=d6a40c7969ec40459f93c2bd509de2fb&_e=OAiXTruwPe7tdFzg8UmXUVUyLifCZ1ar88K77-SOsvN6SCvBmomZFLPfz9nnyAYFofyKPt9XBCY2klcYdz8D4PY9jyD872jg-5JR3RYg-ILAP_REI2uUpBTBdj_U57FeXzjveIb-Le8f7ZDkGkeyenZCQZn7m6ED_hBDf1z68ORP75ckCKtX3ka9Xbhy2kyCdB9sk8hTCsSWre5m46A7zxaldNbOV9YI7is-gNkuN_YvT0O2fFJ69u_xahW4KpfqM7ZEHIcTPckrY6Zt1mXohXIcnDFJHw5K0d6ZwcOGEls0UESNWSv5alNucRR0Dcx0loVszPzJ_NME8v2dnRlvlBmyd9VNIJzT32Qv6YXMzqdj05YK-QGltAaS-BzDPTIq)

clean_body: Our support has fallen by more than 84% between today and this time last month. | More than 23,000 donations were made to my campaign in March with an average gift of $6. And let me tell you that while $6 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.In fact, our fundraising numbers are down 84% in the first 11 days of April compared to the first 11 days of March. This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, , our average March donation, to help us kick-start our april fundraising? Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to. Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. Not me. Not now, not ever. I know a couple of things to be true: We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1 That’s why I’m reaching out today. The stakes are as high now as they were in each of the past two elections, . If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by or another amount today? When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it. With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, putting a damper on our efforts to keep our one-seat House majority. So, if you’re able to at this time, would you please consider my request for a donation today? - every single contribution matters. God Bless, Jim Jordan | About Jim Jordan: Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate. As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending. He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio. | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

Mike Lawler is the second-most vulnerable Republican House member in the country. But make no mistake—national Republicans will do and spend anything to hold onto power. That's why we're setting a mid-month fundraising goal of raising $25,000 by Monday at midnight. With your support, we can mobilize our grassroots movement, reach voters across the Lower Hudson Valley, and secure the resources we need to win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Mondaire Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = **= ** PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

Here’s the deal, Fellow American.

I’m a straight shooter – always have been always will. You might not like what I have to say but I will _never_ sugarcoat the truth. _Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington._

So, here’s the God-honest truth: **Republicans will lose in November if we don’t start acting like a team.**

**We’ll lose the House, and truly, I don’t think we can handle a single day of total Democrat control in Washington.**

What Democrats want to do to America is clinically insane – _they want to change our foundations, to make our country unrecognizable. They are wasting all of your hard-earned money to fund illegal immigrants, higher prices, defunding the police, forcing parents out of the classroom, and lining their own pockets._

You might be burnt out from the constant stream of news out of Washington, trust me I get it... but if you want things to actually change for the better, _**you have to pay attention.**_

[**We can’t sit back and take this way of life because if we do we’ll see Democrats take our country away.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e2c8915f87d04c6286cc5e39d27bcfa7&_e=io82I0cfhtPNPr-1DFUiK7O0UyYteZ9S7kufAx2uozy4FF81fj8I6gJnK93y9ehNhwbpb3Nvqg7nU0wLEEuGrGr3gL8BtP_kkcT2uMd_l-1nRdX1pGp5QcuWG66BcKysYk6PqSI05A2Y89S46-kSnjVMihLLMTjWjbh60X2l_tWWNMhiVjmKIrK6PmpCFYptSGOoIlyVqq5OIEgOl1Hoc_v0S41AyQysTVaa9oOQudNmbaFSfrL3eJAzI7Sr9NWWbT8VbT1eo4aUr4bDxnql9jchdBVVfJrGL159-Vxo93mUam6w7p31pPnXV2V3Q4mKIcN81UjGang0770KTnO0mdrhSMkp5psTVgDzMfUr2W1ks7nMezfwSTs7fcFnE9WY8I_0k86D5gOzjOhw032byBeUOpvEhr9aO2avu_2RTUYx_cxBPFTAZS1j0amyLVy6)

Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: In case you missed it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In case you missed it, this Thursday we launched our Protect the Squad
campaign alongside more than ten other progressive organizations uniting
to raise $100,000 for 5 priority races before the Democratic primaries.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email.UHRoyb&refcode=em20240413-34287&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34287%2E1203867%2EfK8K_i ]Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to ensure
we reach our grassroots fundraising goal before April ends? 100% of your
donation will go directly toward the re-election campaigns of Cori Bush,
Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib!

To kick off this effort, we heard directly from organizational leaders in
our progressive movement and Justice Democrats incumbents Jamaal Bowman,
Delia Ramirez, Ayanna Pressley, Cori Bush, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and
Summer Lee.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email.UHRoyb&refcode=em20240413-34287&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34287%2E1203867%2EfK8K_i ]Screenshot of the Protect the Squad live stream with Delia, Jamaal,
Ayanna, Rashida, Ilhan, Cori, and Summer

With right-wing lobby groups like AIPAC, DMFI, and Moderate PAC raking in
massive donations from Trump megadonors and spending at least $100 million
to try ousting the Squad from Congress this year, our progressive movement
is currently facing our biggest challenge yet.

Cori, Jamaal, Summer, Ilhan, and Rashida are some of the few progressive
champions in Washington willing to fight for all of us — we need their
voices and representation now more than ever.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email.UHRoyb&refcode=em20240413-34287&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=34287%2E1203867%2EfK8K_i ]So Peter, will you help us
raise $20,000 for each of these five priority races by splitting a
contribution of $5 or more to their campaigns right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email.UHRoyb&refcode=em20240413-34287&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=34287%2E1203867%2EfK8K_i ]Contribute $5

Our primary fights begin in less than two weeks with Summer’s competitive
Pennsylvania primary coming up on Tuesday, April 23.

Let’s come together and give these Squad members the resources they need
to win and continue fighting for the best version of our country and
world.

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240413-34287-footer&t=1023&refcode2=34287_1203867_fK8K_i&akid=34287%2E1203867%2EfK8K_i

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=34287%2E1203867%2EfK8K_i

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Shame, shame, shame
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
This kind of blatant disrespect makes my blood boil! Read more >>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, You and I both know Colin Allred is no moderate. **Allred supports Biden’s open borders agenda. He holds a radical pro-abortion on-demand position. And he’s in lockstep with Biden’s reckless spending policies, which have led to high inflation. ** _Colin Allred has voted with Joe Biden’s leftist agenda 100% of the time_ in Congress – and now, he’s stooped to a new low, attacking elderly voters. Believe it or not, here’s what Allred said:** “...you wouldn’t let your grandparents pick your playlist for the next six years. Don’t let them pick your Senator.”** Fellow Conservative, I was raised to honor my elders, and this kind of blatant disrespect makes my blood boil! **If you’re an American who believes family and faith are important and elders should be honored – NOT looked down upon – will you please send in a donation to help me defeat Colin Allred in November?**
---
[** CHIP IN NOW TO TEACH COLIN ALLRED A LESSON**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Out-of-state liberals who have no regard for our traditional values are pumping in TENS OF MILLIONS of dollars into Texas to send grand-parent hater Colin Allred to the U.S. Senate. **_It’s going to take ALL HANDS on deck to keep Texas red in November. We need to raise $16,834_**** _ by midnight tomorrow to reach our mid-April goal and stay on track financially. _** **Please use this secure link to rush in a donation right now:[https://secure.winred.com/ted-cruz/donate](http://trk.tedcruz.)** I’m the Democrats’ #1 Target this year, and with just over six months until Election Day, this race is hitting a fever pitch. We need to knock on a lot of doors, make a lot of phone calls, and place a lot of digital ads to get my conservative message out to Texans. So don’t wait – **[rush in your best gift right now](http://trk.tedcruz.-xsjEgE4AgWwM9HSFZKtg)** to fuel my fight to keep the Lone Star State Red and take back our country! Thanks so much for your help. It means the world to me and my team. For Liberty, Ted Cruz

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs87WdSiQN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os87WdSiQN

Dear
Friend,

In the
annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors-material resources, manpower,
pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in
determining the victors and the vanquished.

However,
as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that
surpasses conventional wisdom-a truth of extraordinary
significance.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the
remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated
by the savior generals-visionary leaders displaying unparalleled
expertise.

Today,
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite
your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian
and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has authored a
groundbreaking eBook-Victory and the Savior Generals-a
captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional
leaders.

You can
secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Inside
its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the
defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity,
contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into
seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict,
rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment
with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is
your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most
influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate
even in the present day.

Claim
your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now
through this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Wishing
you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: a personal explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When I dedicated my life’s work to making our communities safer from gun violence, my biggest fear was that we would come up short.
#

Friends -
It’s Gabby. We’re launching an urgent 72-hour fundraising drive today, so I’m reaching out myself to ask you to contribute $3 to my work at GIFFORDS. But before I ask, I want to give you an explanation for why this is so important—especially right now.
When I dedicated my life’s work to making our communities safer from gun violence, my biggest fear was that we would come up short. Sure, I knew friends would help launch our effort, but it required significant grassroots support to prove that the American people were on our side.
I worried because the stakes are high. Lives are on the line. And it scared me because anything less than undeniable success would have been seen as a sign that there was no real support for change, and that would set us back even further.
But I took the leap of faith and put my trust in people like you. Now, look at where we are eleven years later. Hundreds of laws passed in nearly every state. The first federal gun safety legislation in over three decades is now law. Our work—together—has saved countless lives.
But the work is not done. Just like my road to recovery, there are still challenges ahead, and I need you by my side to overcome them.
The gun lobby has deep pockets, and they are targeting our gun safety champions at every level to undo our progress. Every single victory for us—like this week’s background checks rule—is a moment that the gun lobby uses to raise money. That’s why your support is so important right now.
So I’m putting my trust in this team again to do everything we can in these next 72 hours. Whether you can pitch in $3 or any amount you can afford, no donation is too small.
[**Can I count on you to make a donation to GIFFORDS PAC as part of our 72-hour fundraising drive? This is so important. I cannot do this alone.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr24.Y_Rik7&refcode=em240413-1-30&t=1&akid=7939%2E3935704%2EpTmbl6)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr24.0rFmWB&amount=3&t=20&akid=7939%2E3935704%2EpTmbl6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-apr24.bKxxIi&refcode=em240413-1-30&t=21&akid=7939%2E3935704%2EpTmbl6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-apr24.SPsJZF&refcode=em240413-1-30&t=22&akid=7939%2E3935704%2EpTmbl6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-apr24.eQMCOi&refcode=em240413-1-30&t=23&akid=7939%2E3935704%2EpTmbl6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-apr24.9PtIsV&refcode=em240413-1-30&t=24&akid=7939%2E3935704%2EpTmbl6)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr24.0rFmWB&refcode=em240413-1-30&t=25&akid=7939%2E3935704%2EpTmbl6)**
---
****
How many people chip in is just as important as how much we raise. We’ll put each donation to work in the fight to change our gun laws.
From the bottom of my heart, thank you.
Gabby Giffords
[
---](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr24.Y_Rik7&refcode=em240413-1-30&t=26&akid=7939%2E3935704%2EpTmbl6) **[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr24.Y_Rik7&refcode=em240413-1-30&t=27&akid=7939%2E3935704%2EpTmbl6)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Jamie Raskin
subject: Alsobrooks for Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17583?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1393%2E52803%2EY9tddN ][IMG]

Peter, up until this point, I’ve not been actively involved in
the 2024 campaign for Maryland’s soon-to-be-open seat in the U.S. Senate.

I’ve been busy this year debunking the GOP’s fraudulent “impeachment
inquiry” against President Biden and campaigning for strong Democrats all
over America.

But with former Republican Governor Larry Hogan entering the race, it’s an
all-hands-on-deck moment right here in Maryland because we must defend
this seat to maintain our narrow majority in the Senate. Hogan would just
be another brick-in-the-wall for Donald Trump and the MAGA forces that
rule what used to be Abe Lincoln’s party.

That’s why I’m coming out right now for Angela Alsobrooks,
Peter, and proudly endorsing her
campaign to be the next United States Senator from Maryland.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17583?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1393%2E52803%2EY9tddN ]Will you join me in super-charging Angela Alsobrooks’ Senate campaign
by making a grassroots donation right away?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17583?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1393%2E52803%2EY9tddN ]Donate

There are plenty of reasons why Angela is the clear choice to represent
Maryland in the Senate, but here are two big ones in my mind:

1) Angela is a passionate advocate for Maryland. Like outgoing Senator Ben
Cardin, she has worked her way up in our politics by solving people’s
problems, expanding educational opportunity for our kids, protecting the
rights of women and enforcing the law against lawbreakers—people like
Donald Trump.

2) She is the person we need on the Senate floor defending women’s
reproductive freedom and the voting rights of the people against the MAGA
party.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17583?t=1012&amount=25&akid=1393%2E52803%2EY9tddN ]Angela’s running hard all over our beautiful state for the U.S. Senate,
but she can’t do it alone. Can I count on you to help out by sending in
$25 toward her campaign right away?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17583?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1393%2E52803%2EY9tddN ]Chip in $25 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17583?t=1014&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1393%2E52803%2EY9tddN ]Chip in $50

Thanks for taking the time to read this,
Peter. Your support is critical
in the weeks ahead.

—Jamie Raskin

body:
My finance director has been reminding me to reach out

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82953381/466824271/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzQ3NWVkZS1hM2Y5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oiU3QwHNkByIYqYsYDOEG9hxnOHeHJ_pQdhTVBX9ZIE=&emci=86ca1920-9bf9-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=f3475ede-a3f9-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

My finance director has been reminding me to reach out about our upcoming mid-month deadline because Monday will be here before we know it.

Felicia’s got a point. This deadline is _**critical**_ to continuing our success moving into the summer. [**_So I’ve got to ask right now: Please, pitch in. Help us to continue our success as we build out our team in the coming summer months._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82953382/466824272/710125701?refcode=20240413.1_KO_4U&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzQ3NWVkZS1hM2Y5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oiU3QwHNkByIYqYsYDOEG9hxnOHeHJ_pQdhTVBX9ZIE=)

August will be here before we know it, and in the campaign world, August is the month that everything changes. In August, we’ll be fully building out our volunteer outreach program – finishing hiring the organizers who will knock on doors, make phone calls, and reach voters all across Georgia in our effort to keep Georgia blue for Joe Biden this November.

[**_Please – pitch in whatever you can afford right now. Every dollar that we get today goes directly to hiring organizers and staffing up ahead of the summer._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82953383/466824273/710125701?refcode=20240413.1_KO_4U&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzQ3NWVkZS1hM2Y5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oiU3QwHNkByIYqYsYDOEG9hxnOHeHJ_pQdhTVBX9ZIE=)

Monday, our mid-month deadline, will be here before we know it, so don’t be surprised if you hear back from me before the weekend is over. **This deadline is just that important, Peter**.

– Kevin

Kevin Olasanoye
Executive Director
Democratic Party of Georgia

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our campaign is resilient, inspired, and ready to fight like hell for our rights.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240413-3746-footer&t=1&akid=3746%2E420207%2EY9Kiw3)
Peter,
Our campaign has big plans to overcome massive outside spending and elect Democrats across the country. We need to make sure our fundraising can keep pace with our campaign’s vision and mission.
**In order to do so, we’re ramping up our fundraising to reach 300 contributions before the clock strikes midnight on Monday.**[**Can we count on you to chip in any amount to help us reach our 300 contribution goal?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240413.-dB-69&refcode=em20240413-3746&t=2&akid=3746%2E420207%2EY9Kiw3)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240413.-dB-69&refcode=em20240413-3746&t=21&akid=3746%2E420207%2EY9Kiw3)**
Entrenched GOP incumbents rely on billionaire megadonors and dark money groups to bankroll their campaigns — and in turn, those donors expect complete control over these lawmakers.
When we’re up against this unlimited outside spending and outright corruption, grassroots fundraising can prove to be a challenge. But Pramila is ready to show up for the people — _not the corporate special interests working against us._
Our campaign is resilient, inspired, and ready to fight like hell for our rights. Let’s show our competitors the true power of the grassroots. [**Chip in today to help us reach our 300 contribution goal before midnight on monday.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240413.-dB-69&refcode=em20240413-3746&t=22&akid=3746%2E420207%2EY9Kiw3)
Togegther,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240413-3746-footer&t=23&refcode2=3746_420207_Y9Kiw3&akid=3746%2E420207%2EY9Kiw3)**

name: Team Cartwright
subject: GOP leaders are trying to tip the scales
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
Things are heating up, and as we approach the first mid-month deadline of the second quarter of this crucial election year, we wanted to give you a quick update on what's been happening on the ground.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82954869/466828883/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGQ4NjNmMS1hNWY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APkqlZaOvpA3Tfzz8YkQngpiDII2D1baIw0KsCz8Gtk=&emci=af29d683-eef8-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=64d863f1-a5f9-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

Things are heating up, and as we approach the first mid-month deadline of the second quarter of this crucial election year, we wanted to give you a quick update on what's been happening on the ground.

Top GOP leaders are making their rounds in PA-08, throwing their support behind our opponent in an effort to tip the scales in their favor. And if that wasn't enough, **the Congressional Leadership Fund, a super PAC aligned with far-right extremist Speaker Mike Johnson, just endorsed our opponent, pouring even more resources into their campaign.**

Here’s where it gets tough: We're tracking behind on our fundraising goals this month. **With the primary election just around the corner on April 23rd, we need to get back on track, and fast.**

This mid-month deadline is our chance to **show the GOP that they can't buy this seat.** We need every resource we can get to push back against their interference and ensure that our community's voice is heard loud and clear.

[**Will you chip in now to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal, re-elect Matt, and defend PA-08 from outside clean_body: Things are heating up, and as we approach the first mid-month deadline of the second quarter of this crucial election year, we wanted to give you a quick update on what's been happening on the ground. | Peter, Things are heating up, and as we approach the first mid-month deadline of the second quarter of this crucial election year, we wanted to give you a quick update on what's been happening on the ground. Top GOP leaders are making their rounds in PA-08, throwing their support behind our opponent in an effort to tip the scales in their favor. And if that wasn't enough, the Congressional Leadership Fund, a super PAC aligned with far-right extremist Speaker Mike Johnson, just endorsed our opponent, pouring even more resources into their campaign. Here’s where it gets tough: We're tracking behind on our fundraising goals this month. With the primary election just around the corner on April 23rd, we need to get back on track, and fast. This mid-month deadline is our chance to show the GOP that they can't buy this seat. name: Sarah McBride
subject: How $3 can give this campaign a boost
body:
The more we raise now, the more we’ll be able to do later.
#
Yesterday my team emailed you about how important it is that we reach our fundraising goals, including for our April mid-month email goal in just a couple of days **(we’re aiming to raise $5,000 before Monday at midnight)**. And they’re so right!
With the primary just 5 months away, we’re making a lot of decisions about future campaign spending right now. That means the more we raise now, the more we’ll be able to do later.
And because this is a grassroots-powered, people-centered campaign, we’re counting on your help to reach these goals. Which is why I’m reaching out to ask you to [**pitch in just $3 before Monday’s deadline — less than a cup of coffee!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240413-1?refcode=em20240413-1&amount=3&refcode2=30_21716_ozrjhA&akid=30%2E21716%2EozrjhA)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240413-1?refcode=em20240413-1&amount=3&refcode2=30_21716_ozrjhA&akid=30%2E21716%2EozrjhA)
There is so much work to get done in Congress, from expanding health care access to protecting reproductive rights, tackling climate change, and keeping our families safe from gun violence.
**But in order to do any of it, we have to win this campaign first** — and I’m so glad to have you in my corner along the way.
[**It’s crucial that we don’t miss our fundraising goals, so if you can, please pitch in just $3 (or whatever amount that works for you) to help us raise $5,000 before Monday’s midnight deadline:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240413-1?refcode=em20240413-1&amount=3&refcode2=30_21716_ozrjhA&akid=30%2E21716%2EozrjhA)
**[Donate $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240413-1?amount=3&refcode=em20240413-1-30&refcode2=30_21716_ozrjhA&akid=30%2E21716%2EozrjhA)**
Thanks. Your support is what makes this campaign possible!
Sarah McBride
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=1&akid=30%2E21716%2EozrjhA)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=2&akid=30%2E21716%2EozrjhA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=30%2E21716%2EozrjhA)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Nancy Mace
subject: No sugarcoating here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress
body:
I’m a straight shooter – always have been always will. You might not like what I have to say but I will never sugarcoat the truth. Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington. |
[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=566dc69a93544d99af6a1f181ef6365b&_e=q-9Hkcs1hpNrLmkyKMS4iYN8BzcYtVe1xzfM7G0qWhKc1GMrc91mXZXYPMQMiPiPjpSQEjXBZZL4K93VD4fE6oaj6M1DcZlPeYok8qWL-lSbRNW_orNI8WKzxBo3pARbQlhyKBX6jGaAXLKjZbSWG1Du-pnvmzH7eLtZ1kwkAtayxu1LlwEFuavP3UAkSbSFF7EVlS9o3kq1rQlGBlQwkYtpa19SZufDKMaoaZ3apd-0_f1d2_9DQOpGnD83O9alz_hzfQDojQgWkFzRu6QCxFIfo2K3Z3pp3crSTsZJ82BDOAgu6gFr0hXi_apWYP_5B9l87n3i08OfKBsF45AfAa4EbA5-N91wZU1_uD86tdzlrfjbMnykmjRMUh5kZlEmbC70lvJrji6yvKnZGAf-PR4_aou4IF1bhtBSxGY45co%3D)
---
Here’s the deal, Fellow American.

I’m a straight shooter – always have been always will. You might not like what I have to say but I will _never_ sugarcoat the truth. _Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington._

So, here’s the God-honest truth: **Republicans will lose in November if we don’t start acting like a team.**

**We’ll lose the House, and truly, I don’t think we can handle a single day of total Democrat control in Washington.**

What Democrats want to do to America is clinically insane – _they want to change our foundations, to make our country unrecognizable. They are wasting all of your hard-earned money to fund illegal immigrants, higher prices, defunding the police, forcing parents out of the classroom, and lining their own pockets._

You might be burnt out from the constant stream of news out of Washington, trust me I get it... but if you want things to actually change for the better, _**you have to pay attention.**_

[**We can’t sit back and take this way of life because if we do we’ll see Democrats take our country away.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=566dc69a93544d99af6a1f181ef6365b&_e=q-9Hkcs1hpNrLmkyKMS4iYN8BzcYtVe1xzfM7G0qWhKc1GMrc91mXZXYPMQMiPiPMRxU4IW8EKzsdjhjU6lhh6LrtFDzkx7sEbrZudB_oYQ40qsz13WdcQev6m2zHwhK1XcvkhsrTalLmoW_A5Ydqyd5J7j95gLSmHwWGFJLpPQTUEEIfzrbZ2JAnDxDSf5fORTgSDYfuQN-xsIBQBb-pmQRZ6PhszxTk-jMquucL8nqiXLMPEv00Gly6ssD_mGkJbt2kW5vFRsqLGVQ9xuZqTwf6ouWZNSAJCkqsqtS89u66TD-fm8U8qcSsH1AX7IlGRywQK9-_PgfFG3v3oh3QlbMG8aWwrlvQlC-e_zB7Qao5lKIgy93wiq6adONjUM_kMK8htwLjU_2d5dP1IhXEp16u1h2rghTS3uYZONz8zfVw4jHKUJS1yCsF9Qt1dlb)

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

You might not like what I have to say but I will never sugarcoat the truth. Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington. So, here’s the God-honest truth: Republicans will lose in November if we don’t start acting like a team. We’ll lose the House, and truly, I don’t think we can handle a single day of total Democrat control in Washington. What Democrats want to do to America is clinically insane – they want to change our foundations, to make our country unrecognizable. They are wasting all of your hard-earned money to fund illegal immigrants, higher prices, defunding the police, forcing parents out of the classroom, and lining their own pockets. name: JD Vance
subject: Your attention means everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
I understand if some may overlook this message

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5d559424072549d1a8fd49dffef31275&_e=6bo3qzxjkr8i-P--30gKapvsMaVszlBeU1hsHWsGfR1cG2Jfxi7NffuwpaQSCD0gfhON7nNZZCuoFfJYr9Kv3HzEOkdgwAyA0CPyq7ijs_AXgI0CYPDM37x-MjU_p39t0KmlVj7YgkkVhthw0M9nzzmz6-H6p_Jqi7L2rnLhoC3Ts2YkSC6zLgFa6YcWf8osYnhrEGuvTZUFPcrdUT5y-TGSEZNWbNBiBnrv1MsLuQdODtBv0gUBXHR58Lhdc0SPKc0S5aoWdMdzIsMCDX0MzX8BY1dgJlwdBcbaR5_IGlqqRrMTWltphQtXOJY7IgGur8hQvV60WTfCHmdp-BG49yD3XhQR-RN3AY5Vxj1pPVDWIg_E05CDnUuXXu8QkCBVRt2VEfUf0pVwsTEe3XFzRQwLvnCK6dVY-SaB0GG9fgk%3D)

Fellow American,

Thank you for opening this email. In a world where political noise drowns out the voices of hard working Americans like us, **your attention means everything.**

**Did you know that only a fraction of supporters open these emails, and even fewer take action?** Yet, it's individuals like you and me, who understand the challenges our communities face who hold the power to make a difference.

Please read this email through to the end. Your engagement could be the difference-maker. And if, after reading, you're unable to contribute, know that your support in spirit is equally valued.

I'm committed to ensuring that everyday Americans like us fuel our conservative values.

**[Imagine the impact if everyone who opened this email donated just $1](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5d559424072549d1a8fd49dffef31275&_e=6bo3qzxjkr8i-P--30gKapvsMaVszlBeU1hsHWsGfR1cG2Jfxi7NffuwpaQSCD0gfhON7nNZZCuoFfJYr9Kv3HzEOkdgwAyA0CPyq7ijs_AXgI0CYPDM37x-MjU_p39t0KmlVj7YgkkVhthw0M9nzzmz6-H6p_Jqi7L2rnLhoC3Ts2YkSC6zLgFa6YcWf8osYnhrEGuvTZUFPcrdUT5y-TGSEZNWbNBiBnrv1MsLuQdODtBv0gUBXHR58Lhdc0SPXHs6m2qlC3jZ8kLX5ioR1ag37lifogdtHynzy9bUMxo0iRZLjzAVJlWhoqDvzv_MHKxDZhwosGfCMGYnPB1g44M1mlkIU4T5VwDrdqgnb5KuSXqD3haZYEOn4DfXfpC5ifiJU_mvnSn0wjXCOWxM25fv1OHRJK_BxgagT0gvJ0Y%3D)** – a single dollar. With your support, we can surpass all of our goals and make a real difference.

I've witnessed the decline of American manufacturing and the struggles of hardworking families like mine. Despite the challenges, my grandmother, **Mamaw** , was my rock, guiding me with her tough love and unwavering faith.

Mamaw's tough love and unwavering faith shaped my character, instilling values of hard work, perseverance, and family. Despite challenges, her belief in the American dream inspired me to strive for a better future. **Today, as a U.S. Senator for Ohio, I honor Mamaw's legacy by fighting for hardworking families and ensuring opportunities for all Ohioans.**

I've dedicated myself to rebuilding our communities. Now, **[I'm taking action to make a difference and will ask that you join me.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5d559424072549d1a8fd49dffef31275&_e=6bo3qzxjkr8i-P--30gKapvsMaVszlBeU1hsHWsGfR1cG2Jfxi7NffuwpaQSCD0gfhON7nNZZCuoFfJYr9Kv3HzEOkdgwAyA0CPyq7ijs_AXgI0CYPDM37x-MjU_p39t0KmlVj7YgkkVhthw0M9nzzmz6-H6p_Jqi7L2rnLhoC3Ts2YkSC6zLgFa6YcWf8osYnhrEGuvTZUFPcrdUT5y-TGSEZNWbNBiBnrv1MsLuQdODtBv0gUBXHR58Lhdc0SPvjEw7ROMbVnsdEMLXWHvadazU1SMtcRpZRP23dr_NiJnzoPN7VxV1zSD2g8JQwOVK3MUVisBpP-mbDPUt869ajbGyouRdJqjCgzl_887Yp5FmqvMBWbpdi5ydPLgn_3C7ih8Y6Iw8oqQu3CBSPrYsbksFOaZ1D2RRHVgZ_jS02A%3D)**

The opposition hopes we'll lose faith – in ourselves and in the future of our region. But I refuse to give up, and I know you won't either. Our shared heritage and the unique fabric of our American spirit are worth preserving.

I understand if some may overlook this message. But for those who recognize the urgency of our cause, your support is invaluable. If you believe, as I do, that it's time to reclaim our voice and rebuild our communities, **[please consider making a donation before midnight.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5d559424072549d1a8fd49dffef31275&_e=6bo3qzxjkr8i-P--30gKapvsMaVszlBeU1hsHWsGfR1cG2Jfxi7NffuwpaQSCD0gfhON7nNZZCuoFfJYr9Kv3HzEOkdgwAyA0CPyq7ijs_AXgI0CYPDM37x-MjU_p39t0KmlVj7YgkkVhthw0M9nzzmz6-H6p_Jqi7L2rnLhoC3Ts2YkSC6zLgFa6YcWf8osYnhrEGuvTZUFPcrdUT5y-TGSEZNWbNBiBnrv1MsLuQdODtBv0gUBXHR58Lhdc0SPOpyKYxXXYN7mCG8UiiqmC0lezJhUy9LTI1I9wUX5TUQNjSK1nMmkwOEpGmAOjI-v8ysBX8mCapgbb-uwDxREvR2dwaC3Z7TB9JFM4gemgo0BaDgjw0878H9T2dFQkwrYgUNC7eSbKPzyJ7hXCbyLtpW32mrA3o8R5tKH6b9661o%3D)**

#
Peter, can I share something personal with you?

When my wife and I decided to start our family, we had no health insurance. I was a law student at the time and our daughter was born with a serious health problem.

After countless hospital stays and overdue medical bills, we were left with the choice of enrolling in Medicaid or declaring bankruptcy because we couldn’t afford to pay the $10,000 we owed. For the better part of two years, my wife and I visited the hospital’s welfare clinic alongside other uninsured families.

**I'll never forget this experience and I didn't want to go through that again or have anybody else go through it. That’s why the _Affordable Care Act_ was so personal to me.**

But right now, Republicans are attacking our health care, suggesting cuts to Medicare, and threatening the protections for people with pre-existing conditions. If Mitch McConnell and Republicans flip the Senate, they could roll back our progress and take our country back to a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules.

I fought against Republican efforts to repeal the _Affordable Care Act_ before, and I will continue to defend it. But I can't do it alone. I need your help to keep up this fight in the Senate.

**[Will you make a donation so I can keep up this critical work? I need your help to defend our Senate majority and prevent Republicans from rolling back the progress we've made expanding access to affordable health care.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82957332/466834585/1907121430?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.04.13_B1_ACA_30op_RS_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjZhZGJjNy1hN2Y5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x4SLPlbiCb5VFx0r1iVyhjP-VUpP9YN5TUngLxVcCuk=)**

body:
Democrats from all across the country are funneling millions of dollars into conservative races ahead of the 2024 election - and with our first deadline of April 2024 approaching, we need your help now more than ever.

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9ae6d3e50b8c4851904a27c202be291b&_e=ZzOoOsPHyL0e7Xy13K2s6XTO-AXP9vR1MF-kR6-Ke5JhRyS19QKX1I-9hUyHBeSKgeTXmjk_hK5Lskg2Zy_GLUBXL43GIAiODrtsRxv77tZ4a6mmd_n0lhchEOL_T1_BAoBG_eNv3CP_Rs3B4t6DQmEKJseXoxl2tNXDqtX4WwhaFMIXWT8k0V75R0SkNR-e4LdHMP6m1OoYAXBEKUVkBNBG69F0wBfIPe8aXjP5-RX7peoQMrJmIhE2VEN_RLZGM87EBKRfwtMfEY0rUmk3UAo1QCpFvHEvn506B_StAPKVYyLFy4do2XRLY2PaZ9Ya)

Peter,

**JD Vance here, reaching out because I need your help A-S-A-P!**

Democrats from all across the country are funneling **millions** of dollars into conservative races ahead of the 2024 election - **and with our first deadline of April 2024 approaching, we need your help now more than ever**. They know the key is to start early and start strong, and we desperately need your help to counter the effects their spending is having in key conservative districts and states across the nation. Joe Biden, the DNC (Democratic National Committee), the DSCC (Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee), and the DCCC (Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee) have already sent tens of millions of dollars to Radical candidates trying to overturn our freedoms, our Constitution, and our conservative values. These out-of-touch, progressive Leftists are threatening America as we know it, **[and if we don't fight back, our nation will be unrecognizable to our children and grandchildren in years to come. ](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9ae6d3e50b8c4851904a27c202be291b&_e=ZzOoOsPHyL0e7Xy13K2s6XTO-AXP9vR1MF-kR6-Ke5JhRyS19QKX1I-9hUyHBeSKgeTXmjk_hK5Lskg2Zy_GLUBXL43GIAiODrtsRxv77tZ4a6mmd_n0lhchEOL_T1_BAoBG_eNv3CP_Rs3B4t6DQmEKJseXoxl2tNXDqtX4WwjN74gidSeiIQsFDQuA6aA-tDv0S5-GV7U4NLqWZsgaSpUEr4k1O8KhfcIrzbnlg_FLIKUJdlFWjJgI-2upDye8ZABh-7dvAW31EM3mBevMb0DWfQv8EnlRsdN9ULCsfyzjBF74rY-BgJWP2Cb-LEng)**

**Unfortunately, this isn 't stopping here.** _**More and more money will be sent by these radicals to upend every conservative running for office, and it 's not just the big organizations with bottomless bank accounts seeking to hurt the America First movement.**_ These committees are activating their on-the-ground activists and key donors to make a major "blue" impact in 2024. **They hope to completely eradicate the conservative agenda we know and hold dear. **

**[So please, Peter, donate anything you can A-S-A-P.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9ae6d3e50b8c4851904a27c202be291b&_e=ZzOoOsPHyL0e7Xy13K2s6XTO-AXP9vR1MF-kR6-Ke5JhRyS19QKX1I-9hUyHBeSKgeTXmjk_hK5Lskg2Zy_GLUBXL43GIAiODrtsRxv77tZ4a6mmd_n0lhchEOL_T1_BAoBG_eNv3CP_Rs3B4t6DQrhuTbIOPt3NKQi3eRtlHqhpel82SVOfv_eow2MigeI6N77XsMPCaLBHkkKG5eY4rwCPKIMuRc71uj1hn24X91_SbOGFWxWOlJPHgrEfaAv1Uu3fBdXxNetc2I9GoCXZUbHW03gaDUa9oAnW35YCVDixe6MeinhftayAkuifEJch)** Even $5, $10, or $15 will help to ensure Dems aren't outspending us across the country.

**[With a committed team like ours, I KNOW we can make a difference and win in November. But we have to start now. ](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9ae6d3e50b8c4851904a27c202be291b&_e=ZzOoOsPHyL0e7Xy13K2s6XTO-AXP9vR1MF-kR6-Ke5JhRyS19QKX1I-9hUyHBeSKgeTXmjk_hK5Lskg2Zy_GLUBXL43GIAiODrtsRxv77tZ4a6mmd_n0lhchEOL_T1_BAoBG_eNv3CP_Rs3B4t6DQmEKJseXoxl2tNXDqtX4WwikZjTpKi0iijgBPFKHq__pfbBiVejzw71Pn1Grc-1WnJAstiHQChZypdvA-NVpwNtG6ht5SB0d1GIU4LylVgADE2m_NCPLpoqmSea6OAPX20UkGFSz8IS0ErWDPHJ_0BklAv85Ys1PwtxWwH9uJ3M0)**

Please consider donating **TODAY** ahead of our fundraising goal. Thank you, and God Bless you. - JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9ae6d3e50b8c4851904a27c202be291b&_e=ZzOoOsPHyL0e7Xy13K2s6XTO-AXP9vR1MF-kR6-Ke5JhRyS19QKX1I-9hUyHBeSKgeTXmjk_hK5Lskg2Zy_GLUBXL43GIAiODrtsRxv77tZ4a6mmd_n0lhchEOL_T1_BAoBG_eNv3CP_Rs3B4t6DQqMzW3r4b65L0ZYGTg5XkEKeJvJLEco8oDrEtisS8_YINHRyA3b_sG58H3AXQ_UrKNf_LX4yJUk6hYn3OHS_weefqLfRvlqv-Ia97erIJDOyvBNB23hi6rsIYBjd2UQpUvlFMcmBHvaE9is3TOt9rLNoQYcHyVNGVM_MxRIfdukZ) | [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9ae6d3e50b8c4851904a27c202be291b&_e=ZzOoOsPHyL0e7Xy13K2s6XTO-AXP9vR1MF-kR6-Ke5JhRyS19QKX1I-9hUyHBeSKgeTXmjk_hK5Lskg2Zy_GLUBXL43GIAiODrtsRxv77tZ4a6mmd_n0lhchEOL_T1_BAoBG_eNv3CP_Rs3B4t6DQrhuTbIOPt3NKQi3eRtlHqjjlK2nKQ8Bec2uYx8VKFMJoF9jVmYThJhMGKBm8IZIHmGrNGSU45anwePewh141lu7Trfa0PAbRKSQsLaKBUeXACz9BDi7M3kajUov574P0n8U2mxB9QQ8-6IKWdHWMgmTOWZ8l9OtIVE5ToZarl43) | [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9ae6d3e50b8c4851904a27c202be291b&_e=ZzOoOsPHyL0e7Xy13K2s6XTO-AXP9vR1MF-kR6-Ke5JhRyS19QKX1I-9hUyHBeSKgeTXmjk_hK5Lskg2Zy_GLUBXL43GIAiODrtsRxv77tZ4a6mmd_n0lhchEOL_T1_BAoBG_eNv3CP_Rs3B4t6DQmEKJseXoxl2tNXDqtX4Wwi21n3Xhjr4LX6MXCCzVA5uH-59oCM8ZTAYYqZA6LniBlm5tedxVyx8cQfSnUMgmyMdzUoufliITmqFh9cti_a4khJfq8vGt9iv27mqTBQKgf8APAAiSxRE93wQIxIU8hCXiKQem1WiFFZOb2k4plPJ)

name: Team Ohio Dems
subject: Why we’re asking for $5 to help turn Ohio around
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
we’re facing an onslaught of Republican spending
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82957810/466836097/1103856757?refcode=odp_em_240413_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTU4OTY3YS1hOGY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vl8rUbbdp45IGD6sGF7jWWmdLGJSswpTkpT4zdgfok0=) Team, Right now, we want to tell you how your $5 donation can help lead us to victory this year. **[When you pitch in $5,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82957811/466836105/1103856757?refcode=odp_em_240413_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTU4OTY3YS1hOGY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vl8rUbbdp45IGD6sGF7jWWmdLGJSswpTkpT4zdgfok0=)** it fuels our volunteer efforts to knock on doors and call voters in every corner of Ohio. It helps us register new voters who will cast their ballots for the very first time this fall. And it ensures we have the resources we need to fight back against the onslaught of Republican attacks that are well underway. **[Can we count on you to pitch in $5 ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline and show the strength of this grassroots team?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82957812/466836106/1103856757?refcode=odp_em_240413_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTU4OTY3YS1hOGY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vl8rUbbdp45IGD6sGF7jWWmdLGJSswpTkpT4zdgfok0=)** The Ohio Senate race is already shaping up to be one of the most expensive in the country. National Republicans are pouring money in to try and tear down Sherrod Brown’s record of standing up for working Ohioans and our families. Not only that, but we have _three_ judicial races on this fall’s ballot. With Republican politicians gunning for reproductive rights all over the country and pushing to overturn the will of the voters, it’s critical we elect a majority on the state Supreme Court that will stand up for what we voted for. **[We can win – but we can’t lose a single second in this fight. body:
Some political pundits say that small dollar donors are getting less and less involved in politics. For us, the jury still seems to be out
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8dd77de4e4544d45bff670e933d20db7&_e=Y03iPsoMF6jxGn-zfx-X_m7-3xE4px4wGRcjwMaY8hhyKISOEfXqpg41I6pQM7K6n9Gunur-8MR3213-Dw9EWg49SKy_XzwtJrn43M9bJCm9FoIfIPMBAsW_hNCeqg5cBlMu6C9BbFMTAymVXYj9lLqj_IrQKTLEi_ISc1t03-jtwoj8OpD7Ej676CfOxyJSGnnZRsJOcjpF5cmN5QDsDEoAMJNqCio2Q24kcmYLgMVtIpR3SvgqMSDEZSLHtlgPVUzKv2UEK-Dz8ECWdyPpFRfH9QugQalh9MNcI4LWKkdKEtBLdNHPqz7Gq_UAO71X1sM8hvxf9tsW5q1eqEoUzfTyWtyiUCw6LGkc5HllvhvyRvu3X_tkZbEGYqEeiFpRHwH65KN7rvMrSgDvuS3Mmw%3D%3D)
| **$6**

More than 23,000 donations were made to my campaign in March with **an average gift of $6**. And let me tell you that while $6 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.**In fact, our fundraising numbers are down 84% in the first 11 days of April compared to the first 11 days of March.**

This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, **[would you be able to make a contribution of $6](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8dd77de4e4544d45bff670e933d20db7&_e=Y03iPsoMF6jxGn-zfx-X_m7-3xE4px4wGRcjwMaY8hhyKISOEfXqpg41I6pQM7K6n9Gunur-8MR3213-Dw9EWg49SKy_XzwtJrn43M9bJCm9FoIfIPMBAsW_hNCeqg5cBlMu6C9BbFMTAymVXYj9lLqj_IrQKTLEi_ISc1t03-jtwoj8OpD7Ej676CfOxyJSGnnZRsJOcjpF5cmN5QDsDEoAMJNqCio2Q24kcmYLgMVtIpR3SvgqMSDEZSLHtlgPedadydjQCbGm8b5Wp7yYZ-czAKUuO01NYmswonnZhGtuzxHfuFfILwcvnsQ9pf9Bf0NQ8dGJJkPnBqZYw0B5DZOBqfASL7KvKvBKidBaTLRk8KEwzmqsyy7Z_wGh5O2KLXqEw3r0373ACJGVxjuFZg%3D%3D)** , our average March donation, to help us kick-start our april fundraising?

[**CHIP IN $6
**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8dd77de4e4544d45bff670e933d20db7&_e=Y03iPsoMF6jxGn-zfx-X_m7-3xE4px4wGRcjwMaY8hhyKISOEfXqpg41I6pQM7K6n9Gunur-8MR3213-Dw9EWg49SKy_XzwtJrn43M9bJCm9FoIfIPMBAsW_hNCeqg5cBlMu6C9BbFMTAymVXYj9lLqj_IrQKTLEi_ISc1t03-jtwoj8OpD7Ej676CfOxyJSGnnZRsJOcjpF5cmN5QDsDEoAMJNqCio2Q24kcmYLgMVtIpR3SvgqMSDEZSLHtlgPuZZx2kEl2hdwxt2Hf33dQEyRUHfFThDdlIxhEnsn2oGTd7v6SuLn5Kjt5KNSCpbBjsolJCDa_pNbpb4ob3FIZqcQ0XShEm9sFlnkLgG2LgOitwgTK8sOP25TuVlVgfOHDllihYoiSKxXa8DGEQnXWg%3D%3D)
Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and **not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to.**

Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. **Not me. Not now, not ever.**

I know a couple of things to be true:
* We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it

* **Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1**

That’s why I’m reaching out today. The stakes are as high now as they were in each of the past two elections, **[yet in just one month we've seen an 84% drop in donations](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8dd77de4e4544d45bff670e933d20db7&_e=Y03iPsoMF6jxGn-zfx-X_m7-3xE4px4wGRcjwMaY8hhyKISOEfXqpg41I6pQM7K6n9Gunur-8MR3213-Dw9EWg49SKy_XzwtJrn43M9bJCm9FoIfIPMBAsW_hNCeqg5cBlMu6C9BbFMTAymVXYj9lLqj_IrQKTLEi_ISc1t03-jtwoj8OpD7Ej676CfOxyJSGnnZRsJOcjpF5cmN5QDsDEoAMJNqCio2Q24kcmYLgMVtIpR3SvgqMSDEZSLHtlgP_QM2qFl3LysF74eqAMkUEeGCdZjSIOETbQw2LXLHzberi_gGTT4U_skGsOMwz1iGQQUbxYn9vW_QRv5zuLnyZIbTy-McJHiC_5J5Fbth4e7eskz1g3k3tjmvVPnmn86uPq294ibHY_BPxwnbfy5pHw%3D%3D)**. If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by **[chipping in $6](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8dd77de4e4544d45bff670e933d20db7&_e=Y03iPsoMF6jxGn-zfx-X_m7-3xE4px4wGRcjwMaY8hhyKISOEfXqpg41I6pQM7K6n9Gunur-8MR3213-Dw9EWg49SKy_XzwtJrn43M9bJCm9FoIfIPMBAsW_hNCeqg5cBlMu6C9BbFMTAymVXYj9lLqj_IrQKTLEi_ISc1t03-jtwoj8OpD7Ej676CfOxyJSGnnZRsJOcjpF5cmN5QDsDEoAMJNqCio2Q24kcmYLgMVtIpR3SvgqMSDEZSLHtlgPDLh-QyKAyVT5Yp-wP2Xp3AV7GeElrpFX6YZeJykQoeClUdv5cvIcpadgTau9xNfu2q4Ndc9lb4S--u-jcAZxH1lXhvpId5oevPr8cD-zff--XK1-B0wHBBwAjmrUCpRtjHiIndXteOXG6ggtMEVdMg%3D%3D)** or another amount today?

[**CHIP IN $6
**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8dd77de4e4544d45bff670e933d20db7&_e=Y03iPsoMF6jxGn-zfx-X_m7-3xE4px4wGRcjwMaY8hhyKISOEfXqpg41I6pQM7K6n9Gunur-8MR3213-Dw9EWg49SKy_XzwtJrn43M9bJCm9FoIfIPMBAsW_hNCeqg5cBlMu6C9BbFMTAymVXYj9lLqj_IrQKTLEi_ISc1t03-jtwoj8OpD7Ej676CfOxyJSGnnZRsJOcjpF5cmN5QDsDEoAMJNqCio2Q24kcmYLgMVtIpR3SvgqMSDEZSLHtlgPjKHZVkziO7ydx9nzBW52CCG7N15P95APy-W4uSmoMilrWgt4KFlmd_NAtX98OlxSn7WwhhKapBPWdZjSQ7MfLxwNno7Yh_u5A-DWL_YtgyHkdzvFajJCjqeWbCwEiS2B9vu8_u8tHnCVditrtHGYGQ%3D%3D)
When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. _**Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it**_.

With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, **putting a damper on our efforts to keep our one-seat House majority**. So, if you’re able to at this time, would you please consider my request for a donation today? **[Whether it’s $5, $15, or the March average of $6, every contribution counts](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8dd77de4e4544d45bff670e933d20db7&_e=Y03iPsoMF6jxGn-zfx-X_m7-3xE4px4wGRcjwMaY8hhyKISOEfXqpg41I6pQM7K6n9Gunur-8MR3213-Dw9EWg49SKy_XzwtJrn43M9bJCm9FoIfIPMBAsW_hNCeqg5cBlMu6C9BbFMTAymVXYj9lLqj_IrQKTLEi_ISc1t03-jtwoj8OpD7Ej676CfOxyJSGnnZRsJOcjpF5cmN5QDsDEoAMJNqCio2Q24kcmYLgMVtIpR3SvgqMSDEZSLHtlgPvV2fuOHjvhFHTLvr2Sk-LfoipM7FC1nDG39lB4DuoGMQfUyJHvKCzVOY6NII33q0e5-_Igd89jrKFMvVBWl-4foufEupqfnEEcCc0vBqwVuCzUdxvOMBhA3sCOT6cxDh6JHQRTPm4phI1nJgNxqT0g%3D%3D)** - every single contribution matters.

**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8dd77de4e4544d45bff670e933d20db7&_e=Y03iPsoMF6jxGn-zfx-X_m7-3xE4px4wGRcjwMaY8hhyKISOEfXqpg41I6pQM7K6n9Gunur-8MR3213-Dw9EWg49SKy_XzwtJrn43M9bJCm9FoIfIPMBAsW_hNCeqg5cBlMu6C9BbFMTAymVXYj9lLqj_IrQKTLEi_ISc1t03-jtwoj8OpD7Ej676CfOxyJSGnnZRsJOcjpF5cmN5QDsDEoAMJNqCio2Q24kcmYLgMVtIpR3SvgqMSDEZSLHtlgPP9zVhoeRKxPpuaud-8rjKm9gQb5VOh09VWd7SxDFR7ghAdFuNsVjmIkxODW39svhxcW2Iv_ArFwRTT-4SolXLMmslb7u3b61ecLKIsfwQ52AjzbCvcWqMFju4XRfFpxTXIptbRDp5uZ3jXVb4cwemg%3D%3D)

God Bless,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8dd77de4e4544d45bff670e933d20db7&_e=Y03iPsoMF6jxGn-zfx-X_u53vGhoNY1j9NHRy8j1JEYnFMGW0Adar5KzgKcAjrTdWpgKX5E_haQTmG36TVr-ylEJufRFVkznVFTQL5xxpJBxp5YO4CpmPxXvMAQH2RRJ9gZ5-NkZtowPNLrXoXWWCwaHnRYPQ1Fjr1Deyz2uPs13QpqpLu3N95V6z1vuQXtbqnanc3qNuuoa76pu7TgsqA%3D%3D)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Hill Harper
subject: It’s legalized corruption. Plain and simple.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Here’s what I’m pledging to do about it:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1155%2E62735%2EcB3deG)
Peter, it’s an open secret that our broken campaign finance system allows for **legalized corruption** in Washington:
❌ Special interests like Big Pharma and Big Oil can donate unlimited amounts of money
❌ The ultra-wealthy enjoy outsized influence at the expense of working families
❌ Our politicians _actively_ vote in favor of groups that fund their reelection campaigns
That’s why overturning the disastrous _Citizens United_ decision and getting dark money out of politics is one of our campaign’s TOP priorities. But I won’t lie to you — it’s going to be an uphill climb to win this race. Until then, every congressional candidate has a choice to make about how they’ll fund their 2024 campaigns.
**That’s why I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs on our way to the Senate.** I’m not beholden to any federal lobbyists or Washington insiders. I meant it when I said this is a campaign of, by, and for working Americans — and it’ll stay that way through Election Day.
That’s where you come in, Peter.
**_You_ can help reduce the toxic role of big money in politics by voting for and supporting people-powered candidates like me.** Frankly, your donations mean the world precisely _because_ I rely on grassroots supporters like you to fuel this campaign. **[So, I have to ask: Can I count on you to chip in today and help us fight against the influence of big money in politics?](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1279?t=5&akid=1155%2E62735%2EcB3deG)**
**[RUSH A $5 GRASSROOTS DONATION »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1279?t=6&akid=1155%2E62735%2EcB3deG)**
**[RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1278?t=7&akid=1155%2E62735%2EcB3deG)**
I pledged that I wouldn’t be bought, bossed, or bullied into compromising my campaign’s promise for a new type of leadership. With your help, we’ll deliver it on Election Day and finally get to work on our priorities.
Thank you,
Hill Harper
Democrat for U.S. Senate
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1278?t=8&akid=1155%2E62735%2EcB3deG)
* * *

clean_body: Here’s what I’m pledging to do about it: Peter, it’s an open secret that our broken campaign finance system allows for legalized corruption in Washington: ❌ Special interests like Big Pharma and Big Oil can donate unlimited amounts of money ❌ The ultra-wealthy enjoy outsized influence at the expense of working families ❌ Our politicians actively vote in favor of groups that fund their reelection campaigns That’s why overturning the disastrous Citizens United decision and getting dark money out of politics is one of our campaign’s TOP priorities. But I won’t lie to you — it’s going to be an uphill climb to win this race. Until then, every congressional candidate has a choice to make about how they’ll fund their 2024 campaigns. That’s why I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs on our way to the Senate. I’m not beholden to any federal lobbyists or Washington insiders. I meant it when I said this is a campaign of, by, and for working Americans — and it’ll stay that way through Election Day. That’s where you come in, Peter. You can help reduce the toxic role of big money in politics by voting for and supporting people-powered candidates like me. Frankly, your donations mean the world precisely because I rely on grassroots supporters like you to fuel this campaign. I pledged that I wouldn’t be bought, bossed, or bullied into compromising my campaign’s promise for a new type of leadership. With your help, we’ll deliver it on Election Day and finally get to work on our priorities. Thank you, Hill Harper Democrat for U.S. Senate

name: Jon Tester
subject: It happens all the time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
When you pitch into this campaign, we immediately use that investment to fight back against a mountain of super PAC attacks headed my way.
Derek, I see it happen all the time. A lot of campaigns and politicians waste your money when you contribute to them.
Not us. When you pitch into this campaign, we immediately use that investment to fight back against a mountain of super PAC attacks headed my way, and organize and turn out Montanans.
**I don’t take a single dollar for granted. I still get my flattop haircut at my local barbershop—and all it costs me is $12, including tip!**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240413?refcode=em20240413-1&amount=5&refcode2=8920_434096_-cKEtX&akid=8920%2E434096%2E-cKEtX)
My finance team just told me that we’re running short of our mid-month fundraising goal, and that can make a huge difference in whether or not we have what it takes to win.
These super PACs are ramping up their plans for Montana. **They’ll spend upwards of $50 million to try and change me into something I’m not with misleading attacks.** We need your help to gather the resources to fight back.
[**Derek, they’ll spend and say anything to defeat me. But my word is my bond—if you can split $10 between my campaign and John Fetterman’s today, it’ll go a long way. I promise we’ll put your money to good use.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240413?refcode=em20240413-1&amount=5&refcode2=8920_434096_-cKEtX&akid=8920%2E434096%2E-cKEtX)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240413?amount=5&refcode=em20240413-8920&refcode2=8920_434096_-cKEtX&akid=8920%2E434096%2E-cKEtX)**
Thanks,
Jon Tester

Fellow Conservative,

It’s former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. Above, you'll see my Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, **threatening President Trump on national television.**

Recently resurfaced footage shows my Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, appearing on MSNBC’s **_Morning Joe_** program, telling the hosts how bad Donald Trump is for the United States, then encouraging someone to **“punch him in the face.”**

Jon Tester apparently thinks anyone who is able should "punch" Donald Trump. We're definitely NOT going to take his advice, but we are trying to **kick him OUT of the Senate** - can you help us with that?

[**CHIP IN $5
HELP ME kick TESTER OUT OF THE SENATE->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dc5643ad038e4b1d81b7bc97b90076e6&_e=LPUIb-cWaa2GU027pZFp_E4BCwWPEf2SQTbTMD9CmyKfJT-6c72-bhoGhraSsQQlgkDgUZ87M5rHf37dfwfHAR2Ik06pb40gNcGQGYPHOd7mSVzAnLpSGYsYiqCVTP9PEUNX0kWU4YimdgbteFfVEn4ofhqHMqJbamqo7fYg0fykNsch6ZSRDqXUpYy9VJWkYZIrWhIcSC_k-DsPkxCdwSKp3L8_Qx9B9T3GazGK_9cAp8ADXkHcSht79VfUfDq54EefStc2AbsBAAsa4JlNd4lD-iRofXqoG7uGEKR2pjnhzm--cRV1ycU7fXxas2Y_5QWdXiA2Msociq9ZuujAh8JLQRI7L3EEzzlq9Zl2LdPT6nHWPdLmrlKXQc_pTXlWROdg19-fMtAkK0MQs6JEew%3D%3D)
We all know the term “Trump Derangement Syndrome” by now. A significant portion of the country’s Democrats fell ill to it after Donald Trump won in 2016, and they still haven’t recovered.

While we’ve all had to deal with their collective anger in some way or another, most folks with TDS aren’t given the platform to make threatening remarks against the 45th President, but my Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, was given an opening on MSNBC, and boy did he take it.

clean_body: "Punch Trump in the face? Do those sound like the words of a United States Senator? If you ask me, absolutely not. New Senate Rankings just released. Open to see where our race landed on the list" | Fellow Conservative, It’s former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. Above, you'll see my Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, threatening President Trump on national television. Recently resurfaced footage shows my Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, appearing on MSNBC’s Morning Joe program, telling the hosts how bad Donald Trump is for the United States, then encouraging someone to “punch him in the face.” Jon Tester apparently thinks anyone who is able should "punch" Donald Trump. We're definitely NOT going to take his advice, but we are trying to kick him OUT of the Senate - can you help us with that? We all know the term “Trump Derangement Syndrome” by now. A significant portion of the country’s Democrats fell ill to it after Donald Trump won in 2016, and they still haven’t recovered. While we’ve all had to deal with their collective anger in some way or another, most folks with TDS aren’t given the platform to make threatening remarks against the 45th President, but my Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, was given an opening on MSNBC, and boy did he take it. A poll released recently found our campaign leading Jon Tester's by 3 points. Our lead fell within the margin of error, meaning this race if effectively TIED. I want to know what you think.
