name: Lucas Kunce
subject: We’ve seen what the status quo gets us in Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain.
#
Peter — for decades, the top measures for success in DC have been: Getting re-elected, enriching corporate donors, and controlling people’s lives.
We’ve seen what that gets us in Missouri. **Now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to change who has power in our country — to put working people in charge.**
So before I ask you to **[chip in $10 to my campaign,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45349?refcode=em20240413-5266&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk) please let me explain.**
**[CHIP IN $10 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45349?refcode=em20240413-5266&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk)**
For decades, lying politicians have let the massive corporations bankrolling their careers strip our communities for parts — and Missouri has had a front row seat.
Here, we’ve got a status quo where politicians who take massive donations from Big Ag tell us it’s normal for billionaires in China and Brazil to buy up our farmland and put hard-working family farmers out of business.
These are the same politicians who campaign year in and year out on making life-saving drugs more accessible, but still turn around and tell us — thanks to their Big Pharma donors — that we have to accept a world where people die because they have to ration their medicine.
Out-of-touch elites like Josh Hawley have spent decades wasting our money on tax breaks and subsidies for Wall Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, and just about everything else that’s gutting our country. They’re willing to lie, cheat, and steal from the American people to protect the corporate PACs and mega-donors who own their careers.
**We don’t need any more frauds in Congress.** That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. It’s why I’m not taking a single cent from corporate PACs. **[And it’s why today, I’m asking you to make your first donation of $10 or whatever you think is best toward my grassroots campaign. Can I count on you to help us defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back for working people?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45349?refcode=em20240413-5266&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45350?refcode=em20240413-5266&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45350?refcode=em20240413-5266&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45350?refcode=em20240413-5266&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45350?refcode=em20240413-5266&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45350?refcode=em20240413-5266&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45350?refcode=em20240413-5266&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45349?refcode=em20240413-5266&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk)
---
This message of taking power back for everyday people has earned our movement national media attention. And our commitment to running this campaign the right way, without a cent from corporate PACs, has given us the ability to run the boldest campaign in Missouri history — taking on corrupt political elites like Hawley without hesitation about some shady elite being upset.
More than just fighting to codify protections for abortion access — **I’m running to end the filibuster so we can actually get it done.**
More than just banning insider trading among members of Congress and their families — **I’m running to put them in jail if they steal from us.**
More than just breaking up Big Pharma — **I’m running to prosecute the insulin cartels who are killing people.**
And more than just rejecting corporate PAC money — **I’m running to abolish corporate PACs altogether.**
This campaign is powered by the people because that’s exactly who I’ll work for in the U.S. Senate — I'll be accountable to real, everyday Americans, not some corporate executive or political machine. We’re throwing out their rulebook and building a grassroots movement to put working people in charge of our country. **And I need you on this team, Peter:**
**[So if you’re ready to help us take back power for everyday people in Missouri and across the country, please add a donation of $25, $10, or whatever you can toward my grassroots campaign today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45349?refcode=em20240413-5266&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk)**
**[ADD A DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45349?refcode=em20240413-5266&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk)**
For too long, our country’s corrupt politicians have bought their way into power and maintained a broken status quo. That cycle stops with our movement.
Thanks for being part of it,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240413-5266-footer&t=13&refcode2=5266_614464_lORqvk&akid=5266%2E614464%2ElORqvk)**

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: This message of taking power back for everyday people has earned our movement national media attention. And our commitment to running this campaign the right way, without a cent from corporate PACs, has given us the ability to run the boldest campaign in Missouri history — taking on corrupt political elites like Hawley without hesitation about some shady elite being upset. More than just fighting to codify protections for abortion access — I’m running to end the filibuster so we can actually get it done. More than just banning insider trading among members of Congress and their families — I’m running to put them in jail if they steal from us. More than just breaking up Big Pharma — I’m running to prosecute the insulin cartels who are killing people. And more than just rejecting corporate PAC money — I’m running to abolish corporate PACs altogether. This campaign is powered by the people because that’s exactly who I’ll work for in the U.S. Senate — I'll be accountable to real, everyday Americans, not some corporate executive or political machine. We’re throwing out their rulebook and building a grassroots movement to put working people in charge of our country. And I need you on this team, Peter: For too long, our country’s corrupt politicians have bought their way into power and maintained a broken status quo. That cycle stops with our movement. Thanks for being part of it, Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

But we can’t stop now. We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats are facing majority-defining special elections in Michigan this month. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. By activating your 2024 DLCC membership today you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extremist agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. subject: This sets the tone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| In the biggest campaign news since Donald Trump secured the GOP nomination, all FEC contribution reports must be filed and our numbers will be made public soon after.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6232%2E5257348%2EhpehmP)
Derek, in just two days, we’ll reach our first mid-month fundraising deadline of the quarter. Before we share why that’s important and what your donation can power, we have to ask:
**[Will you chip in $10 to support Adam’s campaign right now?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2024_abs_em.I2BRAI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240413_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=6232%2E5257348%2EhpehmP)**
[DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2024_abs_em.I2BRAI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240413_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=5&akid=6232%2E5257348%2EhpehmP)
---
Mid-month fundraising goals set the tone for the rest of the month (and quarter!) and help our team evaluate _just how far_ we can go to organize against MAGA extremists like Steve Garvey and Donald Trump.
**This one is especially important** — in the biggest campaign news since Donald Trump secured the GOP nomination, **_all_ FEC contribution reports must be filed and our numbers will be made public soon after.**
Here’s exactly what $10 can help us do:
* Launch ads explaining Adam’s priorities for the U.S. Senate
* Provide water and snacks for volunteers knocking doors and making phone calls
* Educate and mobilize voters about the dangers of MAGA extremism

And that’s just the beginning. With your continued support, we can continue to build this campaign to defend the Senate, retake the House, and defeat Donald Trump in November.
**[Your donation has a real impact, Derek. Can you contribute $10 today to help us reach voters, and defeat MAGA extremism?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2024_abs_em.I2BRAI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240413_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=6&akid=6232%2E5257348%2EhpehmP)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: a dark day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
Earlier this week, the Arizona Supreme Court decided to enforce a law from long before any of us were born, before even our grandparents were born

[|
---](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/3f86h8rQb4KBynMNxTQPVA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRn_SzpP0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZhDppxpmi6sODlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | Peter, I am incredibly disappointed. Earlier this week, the Arizona Supreme Court decided to enforce a law from long before any of us were born, before even our grandparents were born. They are enforcing a near-total ban on abortion that was originally passed before Arizona was even a state, in 1864, during the Civil War. **No exceptions for rape. No exceptions for incest.** As a father, I am fearful for my daughter. As an Arizonan, I am fearful for the people of my state. And as an American, I am absolutely furious that this has come to pass. It’s not lost on me that this happened because of the Supreme Court that Donald Trump built, and because the Senate failed to act to protect abortion rights when they had the chance. It was a dark day, but this is **NOT** over. If I make it to the Senate I will do everything I can to pass legislation that will make the protections provided by _Roe v. Wade_ the law of the land — including reforming the filibuster if that’s what it takes. I’m a Marine, and I’ll fight alone if I have to. But we’ll accomplish a lot more together. So please, if you’re looking for a way to channel your anger into action, consider supporting my campaign. **Split a donation between my campaign and Eric Sorensen’s today and we will direct every dollar you send to us towards defeating Kari Lake and Donald Trump in Arizona. Any amount helps.** [**We need your help amplifying our efforts. Can you send in an urgent $ 10 to help us fight back against the flood of outside spending coming our way and help keep IL-17 blue?**](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/6Yz3N4vABZXHuzkT6kAWvA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRn_SzpP0RNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLWdhbGxlZ28tcTItMjAyND9yZWZjb2RlPWVtLTQuMTMuMjQtYWxsLWFXA3NwY0IKZhDppxpmi6sODlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue__ __Express, your split donation to Eric Sorensen and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately:__**____** | ****[$10](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/JMIVH9cJWjgRGZnXvOjxrA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRn_SzpP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLWdhbGxlZ28tcTItMjAyND9yZWZjb2RlPWVtLTQuMTMuMjQtYWxsLWEmZXhwcmVzc19sYW5lPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTEwVwNzcGNCCmYQ6acaZourDg5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAb)**** | ****[$35](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/KOOo5HKZgRrP3AHmJNFRDA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRn_SzpP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLWdhbGxlZ28tcTItMjAyND9yZWZjb2RlPWVtLTQuMTMuMjQtYWxsLWEmZXhwcmVzc19sYW5lPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1VwNzcGNCCmYQ6acaZourDg5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAb)****

That means not only do we have to help our incumbents win, but we have to pick up every possible seat we can. We can’t take a single seat for granted. The biggest mistake we can make right now is to sit on the sidelines and wait until closer to Election Day to give Democrats the support and resources they need to win their races. The GOP is already hard at work, spending millions to turn out voters across the nation and launch attack ads against Democrats. We have to fight back now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for standing with me, Mark Warner ******=**** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wilson for Wisconsin
body:
you might relate to this

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82961857/466847404/-112884332?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=2024_ws1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Y2ZWI5YTktYWVmOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=arG71OmwC3nebAG4d08S0dhiNlMbZcJSQTCyX_jGtMU=)

Hi Peter, I'm Eric, and I'm a Democrat, a project manager, and a housing professional by trade. I've got real-world experience working in health insurance and real estate - and have seen how our current system has let so many down, I'm a candidate running for Wisconsin's 3rd to bring a fresh perspective and fight for those who've been left behind. [_**You'll learn more about me in a second, but if you don't have time to spare, could you pitch in $13 or any amount right now to power our mission for affordable housing, accessible health care, LGBTQ+ rights, quality education, economic growth, sustainable farming practices, reproductive rights, climate action, and more? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82961859/466847406/-112884332?refcode=2024_ws1_l1&ms=2024_ws1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Y2ZWI5YTktYWVmOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=arG71OmwC3nebAG4d08S0dhiNlMbZcJSQTCyX_jGtMU=) Born in Menomonie, I grew up in rural Wisconsin as the youngest of six siblings in a close-knit family of teachers, coaches, small business owners, and manufacturing workers. They raised me with the belief that everyone deserves to receive education and the healthcare they need without fear of losing their quality of life. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82961861/466847408/1938203091?refcode=2024_ws1_img&ms=2024_ws1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Y2ZWI5YTktYWVmOS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=arG71OmwC3nebAG4d08S0dhiNlMbZcJSQTCyX_jGtMU=)**_Me in the middle with my parents, Lon and Pat._ **Our family, like most Americans, has dealt with the heartbreaking consequences of a broken healthcare system.** I'm helping my father manage stage four prostate cancer right now, and I previously cared for my aunt and grandfather who passed away from breast and prostate cancer in 2015. I would move mountains for the people I love, and dealing with our healthcare system feels like climbing Mount Everest most days. Growing up, I had a concave chest and couldn’t breathe properly, especially when playing basketball and running. In my sophomore year of college, I finally had the chest reconstructive surgery I needed to live a normal life. **Like so many people, I came out of the surgery in serious medical debt.** It's time to catch up to every other modern nation by implementing a single-payer universal healthcare system and eliminate networks, premiums, co-pays, deductibles, and surprise bills. **The truth is, Peter, no one is fighting for rural America and the community that I love. No one is coming to save us, either. Big money has corrupted politics. We're seeing healthcare continue to deteriorate. We're seeing education defunded. We're seeing people's rights taken away as Republicans attack reproductive freedoms, LGBTQ+ rights, and more. ** It's always been my motto to step up when called upon. I'm proud to be doing just that for the Wisconsin communities that I love. **[That's why I'm running for Congress to bring a fresh perspective to our rural communities, bring clear-eyed solutions to our toughest problems, and fight for hardworking Wisconsin families one day at a time. Will you join me by pitching in $13 or more to boost our campaign and win this race for ## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2988f418d59940be8e7bd77c4195592e&_e=Vr9WViHGlKifzE3hMHzlBdIksq3annnsZO-pQpRr7BreuN-uDwzVybs3D-lEE6pD0A2TDc47pWq-gpRY7jYHPY09IO_fQZPqSyv5RVnwvJ2pEcKc1KSgzetBMJ0rqEgq3UuPjXLYAnuXE5ZNHVBdLijyEeGp_EBnDtbITpVTop5mnhpr5ENgxMTEqbsEvXDh15Y5u3MK5vc-i9gowmnTGvf1hL5JUU4gaYS1u_fjdDPRNpqLUpiVYAJvq7lwWRa-FxlQvDbieCmfMmdBNYR0Z1aM1CqsmGu2wJNV0DgEs2gh-Zj4a0d6PPUNln8I89IyYsCGUwFvqdVdIEqGKmX8CUBvdJu586ntTs1KEXecbT85i-u3RJxzXXwpSF3R5zjqHw-nexbBqDaTWcjfDxhVI9PgWr6QSgJqPN2Ow7al-a8%3D) [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2988f418d59940be8e7bd77c4195592e&_e=Vr9WViHGlKifzE3hMHzlBdIksq3annnsZO-pQpRr7BreuN-uDwzVybs3D-lEE6pD0A2TDc47pWq-gpRY7jYHPY09IO_fQZPqSyv5RVnwvJ2pEcKc1KSgzetBMJ0rqEgq3UuPjXLYAnuXE5ZNHVBdLijyEeGp_EBnDtbITpVTop5mnhpr5ENgxMTEqbsEvXDh15Y5u3MK5vc-i9gowmnTGvf1hL5JUU4gaYS1u_fjdDPRNpqLUpiVYAJvq7lwWRa-VKQlqh2yLxfAVamOBlvsCpj_u4lkuzUXdBq7tMjS7nuZKrsW0vWITrZDq68kF76rP1h5JeIoBS6mU0Vt_TZIU3e89n_HX4aYz7isNudfsxCg7L76m96SAN4X5kX9xdGbf8pXsZKKxPAZpk_ibdiFoOw-2dU0D73Ihsckdns1bBk%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2988f418d59940be8e7bd77c4195592e&_e=Vr9WViHGlKifzE3hMHzlBdIksq3annnsZO-pQpRr7BreuN-uDwzVybs3D-lEE6pD0A2TDc47pWq-gpRY7jYHPY09IO_fQZPqSyv5RVnwvJ2pEcKc1KSgzetBMJ0rqEgq3UuPjXLYAnuXE5ZNHVBdLijyEeGp_EBnDtbITpVTop5mnhpr5ENgxMTEqbsEvXDh15Y5u3MK5vc-i9gowmnTGvf1hL5JUU4gaYS1u_fjdDPRNpqLUpiVYAJvq7lwWRa-mt4LpSb7TnMXORzHFtAZNSkhuYWImOQT5ZBS0UGxm_1mCvBQRivj33bkN-BDuQ9QYM7iL89hQDVSn9aP_iYYjJ2a34ekno1uZvwHXhhyH3Dr6bNr3xy9Bq5xMMAapYSwypfWdDKAIy0zlgoMFfZrFw9PLeSpnjvzA6aBoTn7-Y4%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

We can not afford to fall behind as we make our way through the early stages of the General Election. What we do now will lay the path to November, and every dollar you donate will go toward making sure that the families of OH-13 get the resources and representation they deserve.

Thank you,
_Emilia Sykes_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

Friend, As President Ronald Reagan famously said, “Democrats believe every day is April 15th.” And as millions of Americans all over the country finish filing their taxes, we can’t help but wonder... where is all this money going? **[The truth is, a lot of it is going toward paying out left-wing special interests and rewarding Joe Biden’s buddies.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=26947c62704b4d48b9686db40465e36c&_e=ZtC67jTyyat7TedG5oXYOHl5UkXYE4BKKmD-ZLkqln24MXsEHY13Jc9qN9DQAsn8BSaXIpkvhkd77LWYVv_d_j4ZYv1FM-PDaWx350QB-Qn5bQ-rKCrUZtzc_DvU9iv9A4Cf-6ZtVJ7YEPggoGsj-RJYMX73X6ulsl26o6r3neGDjuPYMxqAWciXO41RwCRdwND-b-38xqxSPNlEjodr_IT872eoPvIRkVwe39YLfPNbPWpPG8phuid-L3lXie2HCaxTHBzVXG6m2s26bRhgDxphzbNJNxxA76gK4Wm1_MIJKCOnD5pJvmFDF4xobTZ-mnzy6IFnPlqoiUkNaPtRdPaho0B728EsT4pxVHxGpSt9P7JEY241uGU8Cqvt1hqSXkylMkLMO2ggTxQtoX9J5__YMfjPWdzc9PnM9XKDeSEHtSIO_VGG3LszXKR4Wvrk)** I don’t know about you, but I don’t want my hard earned money or yours to go toward radical political organizations that hate our country and our values. [**And I**** _REALLY_****don’t want our taxpayer dollars going to the pockets of hostile foreign entities like Hamas, Iran, or the Chinese Communist Party.**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=26947c62704b4d48b9686db40465e36c&_e=ZtC67jTyyat7TedG5oXYOHl5UkXYE4BKKmD-ZLkqln24MXsEHY13Jc9qN9DQAsn8BSaXIpkvhkd77LWYVv_d_j4ZYv1FM-PDaWx350QB-Qn5bQ-rKCrUZtzc_DvU9iv9A4Cf-6ZtVJ7YEPggoGsj-RJYMX73X6ulsl26o6r3neGDjuPYMxqAWciXO41RwCRdwND-b-38xqxSPNlEjodr_IT872eoPvIRkVwe39YLfPNbPWpPG8phuid-L3lXie2HCaxTHBzVXG6m2s26bRhgDxphzbNJNxxA76gK4Wm1_MLXmzvPpDRIwLLfJbgejZtUBBHgGxhdO3JL6kZKUpSb9ud4yi3pZ2jH9VFQls174Gk8z7Ac00umDynh4A6SVx6EfVJdOiHbUMhk5hWU7iQ2ke3rfn3VGYLZhwkD7zRTKo8vyoOnYgrHq12ssCQbHt8a) But that’s where our money’s going under Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer’s insane policies as millions of Americans struggle financially. I know that times are tough right now, but for my team and I, April 15th is more than just Tax Day: **[it’s also our mid-month fundraising deadline.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=26947c62704b4d48b9686db40465e36c&_e=ZtC67jTyyat7TedG5oXYOHl5UkXYE4BKKmD-ZLkqln24MXsEHY13Jc9qN9DQAsn8BSaXIpkvhkd77LWYVv_d_j4ZYv1FM-PDaWx350QB-Qn5bQ-rKCrUZtzc_DvU9iv9A4Cf-6ZtVJ7YEPggoGsj-RJYMX73X6ulsl26o6r3neGDjuPYMxqAWciXO41RwCRdwND-b-38xqxSPNlEjodr_IT872eoPvIRkVwe39YLfPNbPWpPG8phuid-L3lXie2HCaxTHBzVXG6m2s26bRhgDxphzbNJNxxA76gK4Wm1_MIbIGVyUSIPnGU2vJ_StS_vyLGvrm70DJenClVMYBU7cUrKdmVPVUokDu40pX57oVyLC4nXvc_XSshDsOxTSJakh3BuXs1sad6Z2QBJrcBDPA97aj-YkOFPQlgFW4qfxooBe6hvE5LwS9eqAE5mO9az)**

Here’s the deal, Fellow American.

I’m a straight shooter – always have been always will. You might not like what I have to say but I will _never_ sugarcoat the truth. _Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington._

So, here’s the God-honest truth: **Republicans will lose in November if we don’t start acting like a team.**

**We’ll lose the House, and truly, I don’t think we can handle a single day of total Democrat control in Washington.**

What Democrats want to do to America is clinically insane – _they want to change our foundations, to make our country unrecognizable. They are wasting all of your hard-earned money to fund illegal immigrants, higher prices, defunding the police, forcing parents out of the classroom, and lining their own pockets._

You might be burnt out from the constant stream of news out of Washington, trust me I get it... but if you want things to actually change for the better, _**you have to pay attention.**_

[**We can’t sit back and take this way of life because if we do we’ll see Democrats take our country away.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2e5fd1376e7e4196a1106e4bcecf6cde&_e=k4Ai4OQbqW5ITqhWUM-CQ1pKwdXzwKOPBjevjFceyTbvUdbNCaJ9OQ3papwfqdaqLeTGGHuctspprAaMPls9VKqYQo-kGe7v42esRgrFiq9ldQMr8G_lqjCZCVvj6rfK_1wjUaOR9qxSMwtHJ452LA7v6JQRfWI3na9gQTl3Cj5adv-O1b_id9fDADgo5GKcf6S7qdwErjvQeu9wap00P-YP_HYAECWMbUQdUmeRj0CSlFGv2Qoaz5RZgjui9a3PC851AnGfiYHlypsN-FtPpGXfZHjzPUCoiZlSr47ra2Rj-5eh9Ge9RSf_CyQg5P5Fg6CbWJtjeCYDBa0aOSFf0C8XDt-lybZ8BGvyOTispp91cNxVb5_T_HspszjTNQMS6514PGJqf7F_g8GRE803Pxh6s8G-cQDbe08RyrHK3OPIm7lqC_jxSpjqvaB5Pc6w)

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

_Y’all, you’ve heard a lot from us about Gloria’s campaign to defeat Marsha Blackburn, and just how she’ll represent our interests in the Senate. Today, we want to share 5 things that you might not know about Gloria...** _[and then, we need you to give just 5 bucks to power her to victory in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82962622/466849872/209297649?amount=5&refcode=ea.e267afe7-aef9-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.e267afe7-aef9-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjY3YWZlNy1hZWY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJ5lnBD7n2mT5308XuKHbNxCtwlYa9SjW17WbmGX3dM=)_**_ | 1️⃣ Gloria spent nearly three decades working in special education to give students a level playing field. She knows firsthand just how important education access is for creating opportunity and equality for every child. 2️⃣ Her parents were Republicans, but Gloria credits them for her Democratic values of justice, fairness, and service. At times, they hosted kids who needed help in their home while Gloria was growing up. 3️⃣ Gloria’s first foray into politics was volunteering on President Obama’s campaign in 2008. She was inspired by his commitment to ensuring health care access and affordability, so she decided to step up and get involved. 4️⃣ Gloria ran for state legislature in 2012 because no other Democrats stepped up to run in her district — one that the TN GOP thought was a safe Republican seat. She won her race by 288 votes. 5️⃣ In her decade in the legislature, Gloria’s managed to piss some people off — namely Tennessee’s far-right Republican leadership. That’s because she’s consistently fought to expand health care access, secure women’s reproductive rights, and expand access to the ballot box. _She’s not afraid to stand up to ANYONE to deliver for Tennessee._

clean_body: She’s got the courage to serve. | Y’all, you’ve heard a lot from us about Gloria’s campaign to defeat Marsha Blackburn, and just how she’ll represent our interests in the Senate. Today, we want to share 5 things that you might not know about Gloria... = | 1️⃣ Gloria spent nearly three decades working in special education to give students a level playing field. She knows firsthand just how important education access is for creating opportunity and equality for every child. 2️⃣ Her parents were Republicans, but Gloria credits them for her Democratic values of justice, fairness, and service. At times, they hosted kids who needed help in their home while Gloria was growing up. 3️⃣ Gloria’s first foray into politics was volunteering on President Obama’s campaign in 2008. She was inspired by his commitment to ensuring health care access and affordability, so she decided to step up and get involved. 4️⃣ Gloria ran for state legislature in 2012 because no other Democrats stepped up to run in her district — one that the TN GOP thought was a safe Republican seat. She won her race by 288 votes. 5️⃣ In her decade in the legislature, Gloria’s managed to piss some people off — namely Tennessee’s far-right Republican leadership. That’s because she’s consistently fought to expand health care access, secure women’s reproductive rights, and expand access to the ballot box. She’s not afraid to stand up to ANYONE to deliver for Tennessee. Gloria has the experience, courage, and commitment to serve. She’s the kind of leader Tennesseans deserve — and the right candidate to take on Marsha Blackburn. =_ = = Let’s do this, Team Gloria | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Team Keir
subject: We’re so close to our goal!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEIR FOR AG
body:

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Delivering results for Northern Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
We accomplished so much in March, friend, and I'm proud to share these victories with you.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82963344/466851732/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240413_mk_mar_recap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjI2OTM5Ny1hZmY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_EDkEwPZwrqDWWYkxWVRRCmFjVHZ98vAUb4CzJBwv0=)
---
Hi there, I grew up right here in our corner of Northern Ohio, and the people in our community work harder than just about anyone else. I think you deserve a Congresswoman who works just as hard as you do, which is why I've made it my mission to never stop fighting for the people who call our district home. Last month was no exception, friend. We got some major things done in March, and I want to share these victories with you! name: David Hogg
subject: The gun show loophole is closed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
President Biden just closed the gun show loophole.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240413-1&t=1&akid=558%2E587540%2Eap0nDY)
Check this out, Peter:
**President Biden finally closed the gun show loophole! 🎉**
For far too long, people have been able to purchase firearms at gun shows to avoid background checks and other safety measures. But that is about to change.
This new rule will affect tens of thousands of gun sales and will undoubtedly save lives. And make no mistake: This progress is possible because of folks like you.
This is what happens when we organize, and it’s exactly why we need to keep up the fight to finally deliver real action on gun reform, climate solutions, and more.
Our organization Leaders We Deserve is fighting to keep up this momentum by electing young progressives in Congress and state legislatures across the country.
[**I need you with me in the fight to elect the next generation of leaders so we can keep making a positive impact on our future. Will you contribute $5 now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240413-1?refcode=em20240413-1&amount=5&refcode2=558_587540_ap0nDY&akid=558%2E587540%2Eap0nDY)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240413-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240413-1-558&refcode2=558_587540_ap0nDY&akid=558%2E587540%2Eap0nDY)**
Thanks for everything, Peter!
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *

clean_body: President Biden just closed the gun show loophole. Check this out, Peter: President Biden finally closed the gun show loophole! 🎉 For far too long, people have been able to purchase firearms at gun shows to avoid background checks and other safety measures. But that is about to change. This new rule will affect tens of thousands of gun sales and will undoubtedly save lives. And make no mistake: This progress is possible because of folks like you. This is what happens when we organize, and it’s exactly why we need to keep up the fight to finally deliver real action on gun reform, climate solutions, and more. Our organization Leaders We Deserve is fighting to keep up this momentum by electing young progressives in Congress and state legislatures across the country. Thanks for everything, Peter! David Hogg Leaders We Deserve

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Why I’m running for reelection
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Yesterday was the one year anniversary of my reelection campaign’s launch.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2408%2E35263%2EkmY56F)
Hi Peter, Yesterday marked one year since I launched my reelection campaign for Wisconsin’s Senate seat. So, I wanted to reach out today to tell you a little more about why I’m running for reelection, and why your support is so important to our campaign. I decided to run for reelection to keep fighting for our working families. To restore abortion rights. To make quality health care and prescription drugs more affordable. To ensure our economy works for all Americans, not just the wealthy few. To prevent far-right Republicans from advancing their extreme agenda. Thousands of grassroots supporters _(like you!)_ have stood by me because you believe in what we’re fighting for, too. Over the last year, folks from every corner of our state and even across the country have chipped in, personally endorsed this campaign, and signed up to volunteer. I’m honored to have you on this team, and I can’t begin to tell you the difference your support makes for our campaign. **The truth is, I’m in the reelection fight of my life.** I’m up against a self-funding megamillionaire who has already poured $5 million into this race to tilt the scales in his favor. His spending has closed the polling gap in this race to within a statistical tie. I know I don’t need to tell you what’s at stake this year. But I won’t neglect to remind you just how impactful your support is. Your donations allow us to run ads, hire staff, and contact voters across the state. They prevent my GOP opponent’s virtually unlimited campaign war chest from entirely drowning us out. We can’t defend the Senate without keeping Wisconsin blue this November, so I’m asking you today: **[Will you add a donation to my reelection campaign in honor of our one-year anniversary? Your support has never been more critical as we fight back against my GOP opponent’s flood of spending.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240413_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2408%2E35263%2EkmY56F)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-apr24.Xs9pUr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240413_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2408%2E35263%2EkmY56F)

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Can you make your first donation to Ruben Gallego today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We are going to work day and night to make sure that Ruben Gallego wins in Arizona. We will not back down. We are more committed than ever to defeating Kari Lake.
#

Peter, we’re coming up on our mid-month deadline this Monday.
It’s coming after a tough start to April, especially here in Arizona.
After the news that the Arizona Supreme Court ruled in favor of one of the most extreme abortion bans in the entire country — taking rights and protections away from countless women with a law originally written 160 years ago — we were all shocked.
Shocked... and angry.
For us, it’s a reminder that campaigns matter. Elections matter. Who wins really, **really** matters.
We are going to work day and night to make sure that Ruben Gallego wins in Arizona. We will not back down. We are more committed than ever to defeating Kari Lake.
Peter, Kari Lake ran as one of the most vocal opponents of abortion in the entire country in her last campaign. For months she praised this ban, she called it a **“great law”** and was **“thrilled”** it would be on the books.
Today, she is running as fast as she can from that same law.
She will say whatever she thinks she has to if it means it’ll help her win. And she’s betting that the people of Arizona won’t notice that she’s made a 180 degree turn on this issue over the last few months.
We will not let that happen, but we need your help to do it.
More than 150,000 people have donated to this campaign. Ruben needs you to join them.
[**Can Ruben count on you to make your first donation today? Anything helps, and every dollar makes a difference.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240413-1-120&t=1&akid=2201%2E734936%2E7s4Fpg)

If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=26&akid=2201%2E734936%2E7s4Fpg). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2201%2E734936%2E7s4Fpg). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&refcode2=2201_734936_7s4Fpg&akid=2201%2E734936%2E7s4Fpg)
clean_body: We are going to work day and night to make sure that Ruben Gallego wins in Arizona. We will not back down. We are more committed than ever to defeating Kari Lake. Peter, we’re coming up on our mid-month deadline this Monday. It’s coming after a tough start to April, especially here in Arizona. After the news that the Arizona Supreme Court ruled in favor of one of the most extreme abortion bans in the entire country — taking rights and protections away from countless women with a law originally written 160 years ago — we were all shocked. Shocked... and angry. For us, it’s a reminder that campaigns matter. Elections matter. Who wins really, really matters. We are going to work day and night to make sure that Ruben Gallego wins in Arizona. We will not back down. We are more committed than ever to defeating Kari Lake. Peter, Kari Lake ran as one of the most vocal opponents of abortion in the entire country in her last campaign. For months she praised this ban, she called it a “great law” and was “thrilled” it would be on the books. Today, she is running as fast as she can from that same law. She will say whatever she thinks she has to if it means it’ll help her win. And she’s betting that the people of Arizona won’t notice that she’s made a 180 degree turn on this issue over the last few months. We will not let that happen, but we need your help to do it. More than 150,000 people have donated to this campaign. Ruben needs you to join them. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for your help, Team Gallego Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| | Hi,

You probably know me from my work with the conolidine pain reliever and professional athletes.
**I need you to go to a quiet place and read this carefully...**
If you are a man over 40, This is a BIG revelation!
You are now learning about the **future of testosterone enhancement.**
_Now, close your eyes and imagine this..._
**Clinical grade testosterone support without painful needles, terrible side effects or expensive doctors visits.**
Seriously, I'm talking support you could administer from your couch.
... And NO, I'm not talking about some store bought booster, I'm talking about actual testosterone, just like you would inject.
Impossible, right?
Wrong!
Allow me to show you the FUTURE of testosterone enhancement.
[_This form of naturally extracted testosterone_](http://emails.dcdailyjournal.com/ct/63051339:sc8PhSiNC:m:1:2664259406:057876E6CF07113E5519721A0C684511:r) has been fully legalized and NOW available over the counter (no script needed).
You simply place it under your tongue daily (literally takes seconds).
... And you are adding 80 nanograms of pure testosterone to your system every single day.
Heck, that is enough to reach "prime of life" levels in less than 10 days.
Here is the crazy part, men that don't qualify for TRT due to health concerns can STILL use this form without worry.
**Best of all, it is 1/10th the cost of TRT (with no documented side effects)**
... And is has been clinically tested on over 50,000 aging men with incredible results.
_So, why haven't you heard about it?_
Two words.. BIG PHARMA
They are doing all the can to keep this out of the headlines.
This single innovation is set to cost them BILLIONS in testosterone revenue.
Luckily, I can link you directly to the report.
>>> [_Here is everything you need to know about naturally occuring testosterone_](http://emails.dcdailyjournal.com/ct/63051339:sc8PhSiNC:m:1:2664259406:057876E6CF07113E5519721A0C684511:r)
I would read it and screen shot it in case we are forced to take it down.
Clint Winters, _Medical Scientist_
_P.S. I forgot to mention my personal results. Well, I never miss a day._

name: Katie Porter
subject: This is a longer message about the child care crisis in our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
Earlier this week I attended a Congressional Hearing about our country’s investment (or lack thereof, really) in early childhood education
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=38830%2E3422442%2ExThN-f)
Derek,
Earlier this week I attended a Congressional Hearing about our country’s investment (or lack thereof, really) in early childhood education. **As a single parent, I was extremely frustrated with some of my colleagues' continued inability to take the issue of child care seriously.**
Congressional Republicans are opposed to investing in child care because they claim it’s a “government takeover.” **In this week’s hearing, Senator JD Vance cited stats that most married mothers would prefer to stay home with their kids, implying that their preference means we shouldn’t invest in child care.** It’s a load of BS, and completely ignores the reality for many families. When conservatives block the government from investing in child care to give families "choice," they take away choice from single parents and low-income parents.
Let’s be real: Republicans don’t want to invest in child care because it would mean taxing billionaires and ultra-profitable corporations, or siphoning funding from their defense industry friends.
As a result, we’re losing $122 billion annually in our economy because of unaffordable child care. **But for every $1 we invest in child care, it yields $4 in return.** Investing in child care is smart economic policy and the only way we’ll have a strong and stable workforce.
Congress as a whole has put the issues of women, children, and families on the back burner for too long. That’s in part because Congress, where the median age in the Senate is 65 and just 28% of Congresspeople are women, does not look like our country. **Too many of my colleagues are frankly wealthy, older, men who have never had to worry about affording quality child care.**
**As Senator Vance talked about the preferences of married couples, I reminded the room—there are nearly 10 million single parents in this country.** But there’s only one of us in Congress. That’s why I’m going to use my remaining months in office to do everything I can to fight for affordable child care.
**[Can you join me by signing my petition? Tell Congress we must act now to address the child care crisis.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-childcare/?source=em20240413-38830&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=38830%2E3422442%2ExThN-f)**
[Add your name](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-childcare/?source=em20240413-38830&akid=38830%2E3422442%2ExThN-f)
Thanks for reading,
Katie

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20240413-38830&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=38830_3422442_xThN-f&akid=38830%2E3422442%2ExThN-f)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=38830%2E3422442%2ExThN-f).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.
_[Click here to stop receiving emails about Jon Tester's Senate campaign in Montana from us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82967892/466863264/-305636696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDU2NTQ1ZS1iNWY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-RjUWhvq8i2gSfM83ayXHAvBVhJMboBT5ubmRSFhQ6M=&emci=44100717-b5f9-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=4056545e-b5f9-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=19445147)_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82967893/466863265/417329036?refcode=em20240413am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=4056545e-b5f9-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDU2NTQ1ZS1iNWY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-RjUWhvq8i2gSfM83ayXHAvBVhJMboBT5ubmRSFhQ6M=)
Can I explain something, folks?
I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.
**In fact, I’m very proud to be the U.S. Senate’s only working dirt farmer.**
Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.
I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.
The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy—but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.
**And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.**
**[That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $10 between my campaign and Adam Frisch's today to help us defend Montana’s Senate seat and win in Colorado. Anything you can give makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82967894/466863268/417329036?refcode=em20240413am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=4056545e-b5f9-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDU2NTQ1ZS1iNWY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-RjUWhvq8i2gSfM83ayXHAvBVhJMboBT5ubmRSFhQ6M=)**

clean_body: I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents. = Can I explain something, folks? I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents. In fact, I’m very proud to be the U.S. Senate’s only working dirt farmer. Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive. I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand. The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy—but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded. And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Adam Frisch will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you so much for sticking by me. I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families (when I’m not out in the field, of course). — Jon ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Team AOC
subject: Alexandria just made history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We must do everything we can to take back the House and push our Party forward.
#
There isn’t just one election happening this November — there are hundreds.
So yesterday, Alexandria made her first ever contribution to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee after successfully pushing them to dedicate her dues entirely to the Voter Protection Program.
Democrats will now have the resources to protect every vote in every state from the MAGA movement actively trying to overturn our democracy this November.
“The entire country saw a terrorist attack on the Capitol,” Alexandria explained. **“If anybody thinks that was not a dress rehearsal for what they may attempt in January 2025, I’m sorry to say I think that’s a very naïve assumption.”**
[Will you split a $5 contribution today between our campaign and Courage to Change — Alexandria’s leadership PAC — so that we can keep building our coalition in Congress and win back the House in November?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240413.bW2w_U&refcode=em20240413-6188-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6188%2E2526796%2EcPHOiq)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240413.bW2w_U&refcode=em20240413-6188-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=6188%2E2526796%2EcPHOiq)**
Alexandria made waves for refusing to pay dues to the D.C.C.C. when she was first elected, which for a time blacklisted vendors who worked with progressives that challenged establishment incumbents — like AOC.
In turn, Alexandria started Courage to Change, a leadership PAC to support people-first progressive candidates who fight tooth and nail for social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.
The entirety of House leadership has changed since 2018, and now this year the left must win as many elections as possible to halt the immediate threat of fascism _and_ expand our strength in Congress to chart a path of policy transformation.
[We can, and must, do both. Your support will have an immediate impact on progressive campaigns, their ability to organize, and their shot at victory. Can you split a contribution between Alexandria and Courage to Change today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240413.bW2w_U&refcode=em20240413-6188-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=6188%2E2526796%2EcPHOiq)
This is the first time in history that a candidate has specified that their dues be used for voter protection.
Thank you for your help. None of this would be possible without you.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240413?refcode=em20240413-6188-P_FND_RES_GND&t=22&refcode2=6188_2526796_cPHOiq&akid=6188%2E2526796%2EcPHOiq)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240413-6188-P_FND_RES_GND&t=23&akid=6188%2E2526796%2EcPHOiq)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=6188%2E2526796%2EcPHOiq) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=6188%2E2526796%2EcPHOiq) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=6188%2E2526796%2EcPHOiq)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=6188%2E2526796%2EcPHOiq)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=6188%2E2526796%2EcPHOiq)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: Prog Platform Push at DNC, Peace Vote tally grows, plus new endorsements for Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: 2024 Progressive Platform Launch: Prep for DNC Showdown | New
Endorsements! Defend & Grow Progressive Power in Congress | Protest Votes
for Peace Tally Growing | Next Up: Maryland Uncommitted | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

OUR NEXT LIVE EVENT!

Our Revolution is launching our campaign to Defend and Grow Progressive
Power in Congress with a National Town Hall event co-hosted by US Rep.
Pramila Jayapal, chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, and joined
by US Reps. Jamaal Bowman and Ilhan Omar, congressional candidate Susheela
Jayapal, and more special guests to be announced!

The LIVE event kicks off Monday, April 22nd at 8:30pm EST/5:30 PST — so,
invite your friends and tune in to meet our exciting new candidates for
Congress and rally to elect - and re-elect - strong progressive allies to
be voices for peace and justice on Capitol Hill.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16673?t=1011&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]RSVP HERE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16333?t=1012&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Our Revolution is holding a member drive right now to make sure we have
the resources to: Mobilize protest votes for Peace in Gaza; Defend and
elect pro-Peace candidates in 2024; and Organize delegates to advocate for
our progressive platform at the Democratic Convention. Help fuel this work
with a monthly donation today!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution has teamed up with Progressive Democrats of America and the
State Democratic Party Network to launch a comprehensive 2024 Progressive
Power Platform to push at the Democratic Convention in Chicago in August.

We are organizing delegates to advocate that the DNC include in the party
platform progressive priorities like filibuster reform, taxing
billionaires, campaign finance reform — and, of course, a ceasefire and
conditioning aid to Israel.

“We’re gearing up for a fight and drawing a line in the sand,” Our
Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16730?t=1013&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]NBC News. “It’s
in the re-election campaign’s interest to minimize disruption and
protests, and the only way to do that is meaningful policy shifts.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16731?t=1014&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Sign on to show the DNC that you support the 2024 Progressive Power
Platform.

At this point, more than 600,000 protest votes for Peace have been cast in
the Democratic primaries — including critical swing states like MI WI MN
and NC -- sending a warning to President Biden that he must realign his
foreign policy with the values of the base if he hopes to defeat Trump.

“Despite President Biden’s slim margin of victory in 2020, his recent
policy decisions, including the approval of weapon sales to Israel, have
not aligned with his stated commitments, causing concern among our
voters,” Joseph told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16843?t=1015&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Newsweek.

Bernie also shared with MSNBC that he’s worried about how Biden will fare
in the presidential election in November. “The polling is very clear: The
Democratic base wants to stop funding Netanyahu’s war machine,” he said.

“I think some people will sit out the election because of their moral
revulsion to what's happening abroad,” Joseph told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16844?t=1016&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]ABC News this week.
But, he noted, Biden may be able to win back some voters if he listens to
progressives and changes course and pursues Peace for Gaza.

★ ★ ★

NEXT UP: MARYLAND UNCOMMITTED!

Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese spoke at the Maryland
Uncommitted coalition launch in Annapolis last week encouraging pro-Peace
voters to use their ballot to pressure President Biden to change course
and call for an immediate and permanent ceasefire in Gaza.

“Progressive Democrats in Maryland will not stand by idly as the White
House uses American taxpayer dollars to fund Netanyahu’s horrific bombing
campaign,” Joseph told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16896?t=1017&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Maryland Matters.

Our Revolution will be mobilizing our 137,000 members in Maryland by
phone, text, and email, encouraging them to vote “uncommitted” in the
Democratic presidential primary on May 14th.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16897?t=1018&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]DONATE NOW to help us keep up the momentum and Get Out the Uncommitted
Vote! Every dollar you give allows us to communicate with a Maryland voter
3x about our pro-Peace movement.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

OUR LATEST ENDORSEMENTS!

Our movement worked hard to elect the largest Congressional Progressive
Caucus in history. Now, we must defend these seats against rightwing
lobbyists like AIPAC, set to spend $100 million trying to unseat some of
our strongest voices for Peace in Congress.

That’s why Our Revolution is proud to re-endorse US Reps. Pramila Jayapal
(WA-7), Rashida Tlaib (MI-12), Delia Ramirez (IL-3), Ayanna Pressley
(MA-7), Jamaal Bowman (NY-16), Summer Lee (PA-12), Ilhan Omar (MN-05), and
Cori Bush (MO-1) in 2024!

Holding these seats will be critical to our inside-outside strategy for
change. These progressive leaders have been champions, not only for Peace
in Gaza, but for climate, housing, immigration, racial justice and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16898?t=1019&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Together, we have more work to do! Chip in to our 2024 Progressive
Power Fund to help us out-organize big money and re-elect our top
progressive allies in Congress.

★ ★ ★

You already know Our Revolution has Summer Lee’s back, but did you know
that Election Day is coming up one week from Tuesday?

Our grassroots movement helped lift Rep. Lee to victory in 2022, when she
overcame millions of dollars in spending in the final stretch, and we can
do it again!

If you have friends or family near Pittsburgh, let them know that early
voting is open and we have a chance to re-elect Summer Lee to Congress.

★ ★ ★

Not only are we on a mission to Defend Progressive Power, but we also have
some great opportunities to GROW Progressive Power by electing new allies
to Congress this year!

Our Revolution is excited to announce our official endorsement of CA State
Senator Dave Min for Congress in California’s 47th District.

In the State Senate, Dave focused on gun violence prevention, economic
development and innovation, and investing in public education.

As Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee, he has
worked to protect California’s public lands and coastline, regulate oil
and gas, and preserve biodiversity.

A son of Korean immigrants and the only Korean American in the
Legislature, Senator Min serves as Vice Chair of the California Asian and
Pacific Islander (API) Legislative Caucus which has been instrumental in
the passage of the historic AAPI Equity Budget.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is proud to stand with Raquel Terán for U.S. Congress in
Arizona’s 3rd District.

As State Senator, and in the State House, Raquel has been a voice for
working families, immigrant rights, and good jobs. She supports Medicare
for All and has a record of tackling climate change.

Raquel is running for the open seat vacated by Ruben Gallego for his U.S.
Senate run against Trump ally Kari Lake to replace Kyrsten Sinema. This is
a deep blue district open for a true progressive to win, and Raquel Terán
has emerged as a front runner.

“I’ve spent my career organizing in our community for higher wages, health
care for our families, and better schools. I’ve taken on far-right
extremist bullies and won. Now, I’m running to represent our community in
Congress,” said Sen. Terán.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is all-in to elect Sarah McBride to the U.S. Congress seat
in Delaware.

McBride has already made significant strides in the Delaware State Senate
to advance LGBTQ+ rights, affordable child care, the cost of living,
abortion rights, gun safety, and health care access.

McBride became the first transgender state senator in U.S. history in
2020. With her campaign for Congress, she aims to make history once again
as the first openly transgender member of Congress.

Sarah is running for the open seat vacated by Lisa Rochester for her U.S.
Senate run. This is a blue district open for a true progressive to win,
and Sarah McBride has emerged as a front runner and is leading in the
polls!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16898?t=1020&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Donate any amount to our 2024 Progressive Power Fund to make sure we
can mobilize our grassroots activists to get out the vote in each of these
key races!

★ ★ ★

AIPAC and its rightwing funders are starting to spend up to $100 MILLION
against Pro-Peace progressives in Congress, targeting Our Revolution
allies like Summer Lee, Rashida Tlaib, Pramila Jayapal, Ilhan Omar and
others.

As a leader in the nationwide Reject AIPAC coalition, Our Revolution is
marshaling our resources and our movement to defend our progressive
candidates, elect more progressives to Congress, and get the word out
about AIPAC’s toxic behavior.

Organized people can defeat Big Money. Chip in today to help us mobilize
our GOTV army and ramp up our digital strategy to Defend and Expand
Progressive Power in 2024.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16335?t=1021&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]When you support our work with a donation of $10 or more, we’ll send
you a “Reject AIPAC” sticker to spread solidarity in the fight against
this toxic right-wing lobbying group!

★ ★ ★

NEW VICTORY!

Thanks to the grassroots, Our Revolution-endorsed Flo Cofer won the
primary and is headed to the general election, where she is likely to
emerge as the next mayor of Sacramento, California!

Flo Cofer has been a strong voice for social change and worked as a senior
policy advisor for public health, helping to pass legislation for
marijuana legalization, community safety, nutrition, diabetes prevention,
and racial equity.

“I’ve seen firsthand how corporate lobbyists influence government to drive
up healthcare costs. I’ve also seen how people can stand up together to
make government work for all of us,” she said.

As mayor, Flo Cofer will provide the leadership to help solve the
affordable housing and homelessness crises, protect our climate, and
create quality jobs.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16898?t=1022&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Help Our Revolution fund our phone bank and texting force to elect
more great progressives like this across the country in 2024!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

RSVP NOW!

Our Revolution is launching our campaign to Defend and Grow Progressive
Power in 2024 with a National Town Hall event co-hosted by US Rep. Pramila
Jayapal, chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, and joined by US
Rep. Jamaal Bowman and Ilhan Omar, congressional candidate Susheela
Jayapal, and more special guests to be announced!

The LIVE event kicks off Monday, April 22nd at 8:30pm EST/5:30 PST — so,
invite your friends and tune in to meet our exciting new candidates for
Congress and rally to elect - and re-elect - strong progressive allies to
be voices for peace and justice on Capitol Hill.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16673?t=1023&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]RESERVE YOUR SPOT HERE!

★ ★ ★

As the country’s largest grassroots-funded progressive political action
group, Our Revolution relies on our members to power our work. In 2024, we
must defend our top progressive leaders and elect new ones to join the
fight against the far right and corporate extremists trying to hijack our
democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16333?t=1024&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Sign up TODAY with a $10 monthly donation and you’ll get our 2024
sticker pack. For $27 a month, you’ll also get a handy tote bag. And, for
$50 a month, we’ll send you both plus the official Our Revolution T-shirt!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?refcode=revreport&amount=&t=1025&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?refcode=revreport&amount=&t=1026&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=revreport._Ro8z9&t=1007&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport.T4WXik&t=1008&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=revreport.Wps0N4&t=1009&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=revreport.HCFlph&t=1010&akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=5795%2E5885482%2Egs0F83

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

Our Revolution will be mobilizing our 137,000 members in Maryland by phone, text, and email, encouraging them to vote “uncommitted” in the Democratic presidential primary on May 14th. [ ]DONATE NOW to help us keep up the momentum and Get Out the Uncommitted Vote! Every dollar you give allows us to communicate with a Maryland voter 3x about our pro-Peace movement. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ OUR LATEST ENDORSEMENTS! Our movement worked hard to elect the largest Congressional Progressive Caucus in history. Now, we must defend these seats against rightwing lobbyists like AIPAC, set to spend $100 million trying to unseat some of our strongest voices for Peace in Congress. That’s why Our Revolution is proud to re-endorse US Reps. Pramila Jayapal (WA-7), Rashida Tlaib (MI-12), Delia Ramirez (IL-3), Ayanna Pressley (MA-7), Jamaal Bowman (NY-16), Summer Lee (PA-12), Ilhan Omar (MN-05), and Cori Bush (MO-1) in 2024! Holding these seats will be critical to our inside-outside strategy for change. These progressive leaders have been champions, not only for Peace in Gaza, but for climate, housing, immigration, racial justice and more. [ ]Together, we have more work to do! Chip in to our 2024 Progressive Power Fund to help us out-organize big money and re-elect our top progressive allies in Congress. ★ ★ ★ You already know Our Revolution has Summer Lee’s back, but did you know that Election Day is coming up one week from Tuesday? Our grassroots movement helped lift Rep. Lee to victory in 2022, when she overcame millions of dollars in spending in the final stretch, and we can do it again! If you have friends or family near Pittsburgh, let them know that early voting is open and we have a chance to re-elect Summer Lee to Congress. ★ ★ ★ Not only are we on a mission to Defend Progressive Power, but we also have some great opportunities to GROW Progressive Power by electing new allies to Congress this year! Our Revolution is excited to announce our official endorsement of CA State Senator Dave Min for Congress in California’s 47th District. In the State Senate, Dave focused on gun violence prevention, economic development and innovation, and investing in public education. As Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee, he has worked to protect California’s public lands and coastline, regulate oil and gas, and preserve biodiversity. A son of Korean immigrants and the only Korean American in the Legislature, Senator Min serves as Vice Chair of the California Asian and Pacific Islander (API) Legislative Caucus which has been instrumental in the passage of the historic AAPI Equity Budget. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is proud to stand with Raquel Terán for U.S. Congress in Arizona’s 3rd District. As State Senator, and in the State House, Raquel has been a voice for working families, immigrant rights, and good jobs. She supports Medicare for All and has a record of tackling climate change. Raquel is running for the open seat vacated by Ruben Gallego for his U.S. Senate run against Trump ally Kari Lake to replace Kyrsten Sinema. This is a deep blue district open for a true progressive to win, and Raquel Terán has emerged as a front runner. “I’ve spent my career organizing in our community for higher wages, health care for our families, and better schools. I’ve taken on far-right extremist bullies and won. Now, I’m running to represent our community in Congress,” said Sen. Terán. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is all-in to elect Sarah McBride to the U.S. Congress seat in Delaware. McBride has already made significant strides in the Delaware State Senate to advance LGBTQ+ rights, affordable child care, the cost of living, abortion rights, gun safety, and health care access. McBride became the first transgender state senator in U.S. history in 2020. With her campaign for Congress, she aims to make history once again as the first openly transgender member of Congress. Sarah is running for the open seat vacated by Lisa Rochester for her U.S. Senate run. This is a blue district open for a true progressive to win, and Sarah McBride has emerged as a front runner and is leading in the polls! [ ]Donate any amount to our 2024 Progressive Power Fund to make sure we can mobilize our grassroots activists to get out the vote in each of these key races! ★ ★ ★ AIPAC and its rightwing funders are starting to spend up to $100 MILLION against Pro-Peace progressives in Congress, targeting Our Revolution allies like Summer Lee, Rashida Tlaib, Pramila Jayapal, Ilhan Omar and others. As a leader in the nationwide Reject AIPAC coalition, Our Revolution is marshaling our resources and our movement to defend our progressive candidates, elect more progressives to Congress, and get the word out about AIPAC’s toxic behavior. Organized people can defeat Big Money. Chip in today to help us mobilize our GOTV army and ramp up our digital strategy to Defend and Expand Progressive Power in 2024. [ ]When you support our work with a donation of $10 or more, we’ll send you a “Reject AIPAC” sticker to spread solidarity in the fight against this toxic right-wing lobbying group! ★ ★ ★ NEW VICTORY! Thanks to the grassroots, Our Revolution-endorsed Flo Cofer won the primary and is headed to the general election, where she is likely to emerge as the next mayor of Sacramento, California! Flo Cofer has been a strong voice for social change and worked as a senior policy advisor for public health, helping to pass legislation for marijuana legalization, community safety, nutrition, diabetes prevention, and racial equity. “I’ve seen firsthand how corporate lobbyists influence government to drive up healthcare costs. I’ve also seen how people can stand up together to make government work for all of us,” she said. As mayor, Flo Cofer will provide the leadership to help solve the affordable housing and homelessness crises, protect our climate, and create quality jobs. [ ]Help Our Revolution fund our phone bank and texting force to elect more great progressives like this across the country in 2024! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ RSVP NOW! Our Revolution is launching our campaign to Defend and Grow Progressive Power in 2024 with a National Town Hall event co-hosted by US Rep. Pramila Jayapal, chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, and joined by US Rep. Jamaal Bowman and Ilhan Omar, congressional candidate Susheela Jayapal, and more special guests to be announced! The LIVE event kicks off Monday, April 22nd at 8:30pm EST/5:30 PST — so, invite your friends and tune in to meet our exciting new candidates for Congress and rally to elect - and re-elect - strong progressive allies to be voices for peace and justice on Capitol Hill. [ ]RESERVE YOUR SPOT HERE! ★ ★ ★ As the country’s largest grassroots-funded progressive political action group, Our Revolution relies on our members to power our work. In 2024, we must defend our top progressive leaders and elect new ones to join the fight against the far right and corporate extremists trying to hijack our democracy. [ ]Sign up TODAY with a $10 monthly donation and you’ll get our 2024 sticker pack. For $27 a month, you’ll also get a handy tote bag. And, for $50 a month, we’ll send you both plus the official Our Revolution T-shirt! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

| | Hey, Peter,

Our organization is dedicated to ensuring **EVERY** child in **EVERY** state has access to a high-quality education, regardless of their zip code or family’s income.

**Peter, you can help us give the gift of education to every child nationwide.** **[**All it takes is a moment of your time to complete our School Choice Listening Survey.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1277240c37454c43b13a5f0630bbd114&_e=p0qBF8Rfp5xGSnfLuFA5nfoedytxgCMjBPlydbZJ4rQonHoeQzaQa-YVkyPBWI8Q7s_GfKidz8NPM8JFoh8y_CjQrg8RDoAAHhV4ZUuMcx6hhYXRd-bLMelmjzsvBr18AV9DK_Iv44OwuF85gvImcDbzhLDTYB7Df5IqAefQeQZllU0G22fw779uc1UTN8Ft82ttnKmUtE7SgnUUmMbNeYQGwSQQM9crPm3vRfi7LifGBat5bcfJSSgqyI6PlG3Q2nMDdqXLvCQq4kZtnnQnoOk6GyIfF7wlXySw6tt8FD-Lr_jPqkVzIbn6U3s1ynxC5qXgJgOJOm28yIiZlZQV0woznlfYpo_exrwiKF9oZFw8aNU4mJ8BcW8usmOtwonIh-0Slx8P3Ese-znb_fG8RtZfYJj6np1t8xdFWA1vP9fQGV9bccxtj0xj4Jl7Lg-gl3eBUjp0iy6wwSNkTga7jjgwFOwZ-oA0J57aqmYJVW2A2kgADvEtCteXhGY8o68Z_k50C1N9e4pDTK-NL_w8Mw%3D%3D)**
