[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1277240c37454c43b13a5f0630bbd114&_e=p0qBF8Rfp5xGSnfLuFA5nfoedytxgCMjBPlydbZJ4rQonHoeQzaQa-YVkyPBWI8Q7s_GfKidz8NPM8JFoh8y_CjQrg8RDoAAHhV4ZUuMcx6hhYXRd-bLMelmjzsvBr18AV9DK_Iv44OwuF85gvImcDbzhLDTYB7Df5IqAefQeQZllU0G22fw779uc1UTN8Ft82ttnKmUtE7SgnUUmMbNeYQGwSQQM9crPm3vRfi7LifGBat5bcfJSSgqyI6PlG3Q2nMDdqXLvCQq4kZtnnQnoOk6GyIfF7wlXySw6tt8FD-Lr_jPqkVzIbn6U3s1ynxC5qXgJgOJOm28yIiZlZQV0woznlfYpo_exrwiKF9oZFw8aNU4mJ8BcW8usmOtwonIohBfW4FMEMb3i5kXX7aAQaIwGOt3K7e1pFPlhpWw8wWZeLaW330LIDYubJHHZxT3Y-qApY9GrQPdWOlyePSMJ1D_pfWBe6tMAnA7ZaCM9cWenymHL1vD7BajRSQVNkMfP_J0sWDNzWTU5i-w2oegnw%3D%3D)

We’re gathering responses to our [**School Choice Listening Survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1277240c37454c43b13a5f0630bbd114&_e=p0qBF8Rfp5xGSnfLuFA5nfoedytxgCMjBPlydbZJ4rQonHoeQzaQa-YVkyPBWI8Q7s_GfKidz8NPM8JFoh8y_CjQrg8RDoAAHhV4ZUuMcx6hhYXRd-bLMelmjzsvBr18AV9DK_Iv44OwuF85gvImcDbzhLDTYB7Df5IqAefQeQZllU0G22fw779uc1UTN8Ft82ttnKmUtE7SgnUUmMbNeYQGwSQQM9crPm3vRfi7LifGBat5bcfJSSgqyI6PlG3Q2nMDdqXLvCQq4kZtnnQnoOk6GyIfF7wlXySw6tt8FD-Lr_jPqkVzIbn6U3s1ynxC5qXgJgOJOm28yIiZlZQV0woznlfYpo_exrwiKF9oZFw8aNU4mJ8BcW8usmOtwonIivRzK14Dd5Tc7V7RTGdUoN4sm66OHFVmfi41tcw_BTEj8p3NFuZnogvIxNPAXNa1Rle5BCV-J3oSG-tXEisK-Sofg4HzfaJW8-z6q3s6OJE4t5nC3-FwDwp3Qqd2WhGnuJTDVMT4pGC-qZDSJphNqg%3D%3D) to ensure our mission and goals align with school choice advocates like you.

_**Will you take a moment to complete the short survey? ⬇️**_

[**COMPLETE THE SURVEY NOW**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1277240c37454c43b13a5f0630bbd114&_e=p0qBF8Rfp5xGSnfLuFA5nfoedytxgCMjBPlydbZJ4rQonHoeQzaQa-YVkyPBWI8Q7s_GfKidz8NPM8JFoh8y_CjQrg8RDoAAHhV4ZUuMcx6hhYXRd-bLMelmjzsvBr18AV9DK_Iv44OwuF85gvImcDbzhLDTYB7Df5IqAefQeQZllU0G22fw779uc1UTN8Ft82ttnKmUtE7SgnUUmMbNeYQGwSQQM9crPm3vRfi7LifGBat5bcfJSSgqyI6PlG3Q2nMDdqXLvCQq4kZtnnQnoOk6GyIfF7wlXySw6tt8FD-Lr_jPqkVzIbn6U3s1ynxC5qXgJgOJOm28yIiZlZQV0woznlfYpo_exrwiKF9oZFw8aNU4mJ8BcW8usmOtwonIn8LFCAb9cInpj3NcjYQzRYPdZKBc8vZ4M-YkP1R9CJgzHQZ1gnzy4GwyVtHzp8hMUWkU91M7fP9FRzzMovH6LjBK-vdbb9vaa4quoEjWcI0SuQDAJhrZGPnLOnLYwATIHkXarPAfPcd3932W7ZNjiQ%3D%3D)

Thank you for being part of the school choice revolution, Peter. We couldn’t do what we do without strong grassroots supporters like you.

Elizabeth BeShears
---

National Director of Communications Strategy
American Federation for Children Growth Fund
---
|
---
| | **Who is the American Federation for Children Growth Fund? **
---
We’re an organization of parents, activists, and policy professionals all united under one mission: _bringing school choice to parents and students in every state._

We believe:
📚 Every child deserves access to a high-quality education
🏫 Parents should have a say in what school their child attends
✏️ Education tax dollars should follow students, whether the child attends public or private school

**And 72% of Americans agree.**

Yet, not every state offers even one alternative to traditional public schools. That’s not fair to students or parents – _and we’re fighting to make that change._
---
[**JOIN THE SCHOOL CHOICE REVOLUTION**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1277240c37454c43b13a5f0630bbd114&_e=p0qBF8Rfp5xGSnfLuFA5nfoedytxgCMjBPlydbZJ4rQonHoeQzaQa-YVkyPBWI8Q7s_GfKidz8NPM8JFoh8y_DboxjnP6JJohr6hRIJovSoPeJi3KBvAdNR7uGbyyXQdYFzP29AzMv6UniHTkHVNnWHk4nkNWXEuDrevmle53ke7k42ZNoXRnGFIgTGGO8tfQihPTvYrCtUNxjcwbBVGOOZ-hM0Hcz3PuEFpo4qtvmT4MAtszOrhcRKTYvhYDhySiEKVs77ryFYu_ylgqayQUzO44xwWOBztV6PxdUSTGWRrgK-xN4CbKxTXXmvSB0I-ymINEf-aBno7kRbRFstG6a1OzDuBdZFpkaGrWqVctTWN5Cy6aN_RJ0Ga8Rf28mXVe2R8jsjHdZakTRxMkFhAqysW-I_uCeSaHb1yUgkYDv3jpGSj8DZec6cdF36tO42NMboQB606regHnrKKugckoNqVMVoSxtpyEgzea-YFiao%3D)

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82969219/466865889/1226795598?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTEyYTM0Ny1iN2Y5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wUXj0Nve1xV7PmgEmJSSTXd8PneI967ZRVypr8TF79g=)
Folks -- I want you to think back to how you felt in the days after the 2020 election when it was clear that Donald Trump lost, but was pushing conspiracies and lawsuits to stay in power. Exhausted, right? Now, imagine how you’d feel if Democrats didn’t have the resources to fight Trump’s Big Lie in the courtroom. Terrifying. Election Day might be 206 days away, but we’re preparing now for the coming onslaught of bogus lawsuits designed to delay election results and undermine the democratic process – because we know they’re coming. That’s why I’m personally reaching out for your support: [Can you make a donation to the DASS Legal Fund today? Your support will help us fight for our democracy in the Courtroom and stop the attacks on our elections.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82969220/466865890/205158685?refcode=em-4.12.24-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTEyYTM0Ny1iN2Y5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wUXj0Nve1xV7PmgEmJSSTXd8PneI967ZRVypr8TF79g=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82969221/466865891/205158685?refcode=em-4.12.24-all&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTEyYTM0Ny1iN2Y5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wUXj0Nve1xV7PmgEmJSSTXd8PneI967ZRVypr8TF79g=)**

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c505fc9d9cba4c62beda9752ab2a22c9&_e=GKO0T3olUMq4Oa8p5zLlwckK4uCMSm1izxMbVyIqkaCQAoXVOoyp8A92bZ-xpCErvnY9ZgOceyN0OttkObS9SA86Lwnu42X7Dhr399whJ4J7GBhsVVRXQqEbuYcYi60JzfqudGYveKt7IViDqNrx6CSkuRQ3tvXHiyiAibQVqjJ3runZLckp8v_B2jlK-c_tGjaiRxjl2vTIXOV3-PfcaR2aBvnUoGiR6QyxfxK8AZ-LgQ29QpGFYK8us0C_BMKb-HmsGnK9bH8hvsgAhSMihr1Q90mp5XClp2Wye81pGxtOynOnREwi_AheXQ8q0QsvR8OBcnCSxnpT7G0VfJ7qDDqsrPjY2UoyEIH7G4U9QBDXEZZBeI67Gw1PI1kCzb31iRO7hX0n21bwGRKoQOK3Xzvwxc12UfETjwObE-6GCNs%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'll take this option any day of the week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
This is exactly the type of campaign I want to run

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2083%2E4032634%2Egmhpv0)
---
I want to thank you so much for being a part of this grassroots movement. As you may remember, we report our fundraising performance with the FEC every three months. The statistic that caught my eye — and meant so much — on our most recent report was that 99% of the $1.3 million we raised were from donations of $100 or less, and our average donation was $22. That’s a testament to the strength of this truly grassroots-powered movement. And that's exactly the type of campaign I want to run — one that centers working people, fights for working people, and puts power in the hands of working people. As you also may remember, a Republican from Rhode Island announced that he’s running against me for Senate this past quarter — very shortly after he changed his mailing address to a Massachusetts residence. **Now that his fundraising numbers are public too, we can see that he invested $1 million of his own money into his campaign — and raised funds from special interest donors and former Trump officials.** Look, I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else. I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. I’m running for re-election because there’s still more work to do — and we can’t get it done with leaders who rely on cozying up to wealthy donors or buying themselves into public office. Thousands of supporters chipping in $22 at a time is a lot more powerful than one guy writing a million dollar check for himself. I'll take this team any day of the week. But this type of grassroots fundraising model only works if everyone keeps pitching in whatever they can, whenever they can. **[This is the difference between a government that works great for those at the top and a government that can work for everyone. So if you're able to keep powering our grassroots campaign today, please make a donation of $22 or any amount so that we can compete and continue fighting for working people.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2100?t=8&akid=2083%2E4032634%2Egmhpv0)** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |

clean_body: This is exactly the type of campaign I want to run | | | I want to thank you so much for being a part of this grassroots movement. As you may remember, we report our fundraising performance with the FEC every three months. The statistic that caught my eye — and meant so much — on our most recent report was that 99% of the $1.3 million we raised were from donations of $100 or less, and our average donation was $22. That’s a testament to the strength of this truly grassroots-powered movement. And that's exactly the type of campaign I want to run — one that centers working people, fights for working people, and puts power in the hands of working people. As you also may remember, a Republican from Rhode Island announced that he’s running against me for Senate this past quarter — very shortly after he changed his mailing address to a Massachusetts residence. Now that his fundraising numbers are public too, we can see that he invested $1 million of his own money into his campaign — and raised funds from special interest donors and former Trump officials. Look, I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else. I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. I’m running for re-election because there’s still more work to do — and we can’t get it done with leaders who rely on cozying up to wealthy donors or buying themselves into public office. Thousands of supporters chipping in $22 at a time is a lot more powerful than one guy writing a million dollar check for himself. I'll take this team any day of the week. But this type of grassroots fundraising model only works if everyone keeps pitching in whatever they can, whenever they can. | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2024 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We'll miss you, but you can always .

**_Like many Hoosiers, I remember when this wasn’t always the case._** Growing up, our state elected Democratic governors like Evan Bayh and Frank O’Bannon, and there was much more balance in the Statehouse and in our Congressional delegation across the state.

**[This year, we can steer Indiana back toward sanity and common sense by electing Jennifer McCormick and breaking the GOP supermajority. Friend,

Tamie Wilson here, and I’ll cut straight to the point.

As the Democratic nominee running AGAINST Jim Jordan, I’ve crisscrossed this district talking to voters about the issues that matter the most to them. Rising cost of living, lack of affordable healthcare, and protecting our reproductive rights are common refrains, but here’s another fact:

**Voters are sick and tired of Jim Jordan’s petty partisan politics - and they want an elected official who will put in the work to deliver RESULTS, not headlines.**

**_[As the hardest-working candidate in this race, I’m ready to deliver on Day One for my constituents. But first? I need your help to BEAT Jim Jordan. Rush a contribution today to help us win>>](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTg1MTg5NzU1MTI0NDY0NTUsXCJyXCI6MTE4NTE5MDA3MjgzMjUwOTYxfSIsInMiOiIwODdlM2ZkNjRlNTk4YTUzIn0)_** [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTg1MTg5NzU1MTg3Mzc5MTIsXCJyXCI6MTE4NTE5MDA3MjgzMjUwOTYxfSIsInMiOiJhMWYzMjgxOTUxZDIxOTAyIn0)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign on to support the Resolution Recognizing the Human Right to Utilities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Cutting off water and other essential services is a form of violence. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWzUOzUNdQEA5K3octjBN0Yh587ofz4ItSDHE9z5J__YHnIsz70NWYJW7Vx9kkemPbHfDhSz8O_BKW4dpKsUeZfbiZ-miV5HOFaAlbUdwcS3umitiyGte_DOzwHn5NvsisyFdJrXVPUQB09sz62eoSuv4m3Uy6o6_4Oy_h7LV8H9LD0orNoKBSAXT_0e4RHIAuxaARQ_S1ip9PruCdQ1KCVKU-oGTlmc0VkXJzsj_VC25hGj0HBnVTv5DHwmbvxRMlJhjpV1c8kAwOTc3caswlSQ/45h/2D1LD1zxQQuqRScj-AyheA/h0/h001.ugvJ9yv-D9QGlgXTTDdnmUn_IyBySkgRnzI4lcvBMeM)
---
Friend, From Detroit to Palestine, access to reliable and affordable utility services is a human right. Wherever you live in the United States, we are seeing large increases in our basic utilities, including water that has gone up by 400%. In my state of Michigan, we saw our costs skyrocket while power outages increased throughout our community. Despite charging some of the highest rates in the nation, Michigan’s investor-owned utility monopoly DTE Energy provides some of the most unreliable service. **After securing a new rate hike in December, DTE Energy just filed to raise rates again on people in my district who cannot afford to pay. Now, DTE has requested an additional rate hike that will cost our residents $450 million.** The vast majority of Americans live paycheck to paycheck, and can’t afford skyrocketing rates for essential services. **Millions of people have fallen behind on ever-increasing utility bills and face possible shutoffs of their power, water, and gas.** **Utility companies treat these life-sustaining needs as commodities** , which disproportionately impacts communities of color and low-wealth communities, who spend a greater portion of their income on energy bills. I’m leading efforts in Congress to stop utility shutoffs, including introducing legislation with Reps. Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman to assert that affordable and reliable utilities are a human right, and to demand an end to utility shutoffs for nonpayment, as well as cancellation of household utility debt. [**Please add your name to support our**** _Resolution Recognizing the Human Right to Utilities_****, which calls on lawmakers to stop utility companies from shutting off essential public services.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5Gynh1iRUvNsxDTyelD_1Bi3Wk_GNjOyM5ZdKiMsiDlW1adjxtjXDvdOsCAlxrTssjm4j5xXeoyBQOoO0qu9doQ-qoy0JJV8ybS10OjftDkXH5nJS-EYav5rXut-9JCKKvZj-EQzU8P8afsjSc0gvgs4J-pKmflVTWY3vnRwm-UONcodu8hI6EHoKsJ3DDcp7kI0s9lZkni9874gxKVZ9OXXf0tsmzMAEPvT4W7pIIO65bjxOxf8lsotEmKZOLA_HpRJoZvlqkTaBJsFe_rU37anUTFIaageCJ7jyTce4DM2G_Zjzl1dJukEEcshux5YQPHxwP3Q5aSrqh_UKmDR7Lj6gUdyCLD6CtW94HHFi5bWBRIkhNHxGakpPFzG4ToHNd9TY7HiPG7tD6aOc3Uk8RLrZLv4IH4D-TbsRdaCxk1Jd8w_gwi8F6VTgu8E8U9TG/45h/2D1LD1zxQQuqRScj-AyheA/h1/h001.qniTqSCK0i8i8_NE8On2Z3p0qYUR5pjvqHA2aJJp83g) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5Gynh1iRUvNsxDTyelD_1Bi3Wk_GNjOyM5ZdKiMsiDlW1adjxtjXDvdOsCAlxrTssjm4j5xXeoyBQOoO0qu9doWwVuf-SWGGqrYrPbaJBxHvWaehg1vM3ixqmvgUlzDQPA_ZPs9I3jCMuo_Dfg19I0qJYtZYlDbaiSR0kiUumRxy-OtrzlAcc9PRV3_NJcynAc6VKNL1wJiGSWQJABdjysL2yg9Nss9Lsib7wnQ7WgsK3l2OVWoHotIWfc3OXx4-hfdCS3KXT3BMSt4rWLjQWL1wrPpC4yhRy-AcuQr1iBOjRiRmCoh4Z0uipYDB4PXxUfD8Uq-FdHngjn6mmkFgRl88uuvAiSUe17pNF5u5eUUkFmK6IbQP93miIJrmxX8QXbtmsqY-eQmOl_zWPYqjaapzKcf0h5z12O1rEdS8mi57ae4xr-2LHaIKq1J-q8dig/45h/2D1LD1zxQQuqRScj-AyheA/h2/h001.kuocWAtkayFB3UFHYFL_PdECr6Su5Jxv1bXuorE4TV8)

In addition to pushing in Congress to guarantee our right to affordable and reliable utility services, I’ve joined local grassroots groups to protest DTE Energy’s rate hikes and to hold them accountable.
Instead of investing in needed infrastructure to prevent outages, DTE Energy enriches their executives and shareholders and spends millions on campaign contributions to avoid real accountability.
Meanwhile, DTE cruelly disconnects life-sustaining service for hundreds of thousands of households each year, and even sells residential customers’ debt to a predatory debt collection firm.
And customers who can afford to pay still end up suffering. During the recent extreme cold, over 100,000 DTE customers in Southeast Michigan were forced to go days without power and heat this winter.
[**Basic human needs should not be treated as commodities for profit. If you agree, please sign on to support the**** _Resolution Recognizing the Human Right to Utilities_****, which asserts that affordable and reliable utilities are a human right, and demands an end to utility shutoffs and the cancellation of household utility debt.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5Gynh1iRUvNsxDTyelD_1Bi3Wk_GNjOyM5ZdKiMsiDlW1adjxtjXDvdOsCAlxrTssjm4j5xXeoyBQOoO0qu9doZ6X8jn-IbYHyxd9trqId2FoSLMAPCDT0D0AHsyb15ArNjJdOY5RGzdkJGdfuMNFUdXyx3QlVvF2d9yRHOaMMyATproge-HQngzD9ICCFoM1srGz2zH_Zy2j4q4ChNV_PxIRLIh5cr2bSjP8ojqu3GMmXci1B_3CScb01aSt4ss6-TEQxxAoJnLys_IA7ybZaMXFFVswOZxzb5YBWQ3gB4vbJD_IcF-pRJd3s1gYzOY4SkM2qjTObqjUHtamF7Ji7WTNtxQ1lZc38796EoEJQ9I_fSHKJRLJ0Y2HNMhfy0mLGtItF_2h0doUA0raseco7MadJo0mDmmrb_cN0lOAYDtiWUZykL6477ly-dA3CVds/45h/2D1LD1zxQQuqRScj-AyheA/h3/h001.a99pORYl5Ezt-Ppv8fSn_3gB7Hwhdv1f8Nf66UlU9HA)

clean_body: Cutting off water and other essential services is a form of violence. | | | Friend, From Detroit to Palestine, access to reliable and affordable utility services is a human right. Wherever you live in the United States, we are seeing large increases in our basic utilities, including water that has gone up by 400%. In my state of Michigan, we saw our costs skyrocket while power outages increased throughout our community. Despite charging some of the highest rates in the nation, Michigan’s investor-owned utility monopoly DTE Energy provides some of the most unreliable service. After securing a new rate hike in December, DTE Energy just filed to raise rates again on people in my district who cannot afford to pay. Now, DTE has requested an additional rate hike that will cost our residents $450 million. The vast majority of Americans live paycheck to paycheck, and can’t afford skyrocketing rates for essential services. Millions of people have fallen behind on ever-increasing utility bills and face possible shutoffs of their power, water, and gas. Utility companies treat these life-sustaining needs as commodities , which disproportionately impacts communities of color and low-wealth communities, who spend a greater portion of their income on energy bills. I’m leading efforts in Congress to stop utility shutoffs, including introducing legislation with Reps. Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman to assert that affordable and reliable utilities are a human right, and to demand an end to utility shutoffs for nonpayment, as well as cancellation of household utility debt. | In addition to pushing in Congress to guarantee our right to affordable and reliable utility services, I’ve joined local grassroots groups to protest DTE Energy’s rate hikes and to hold them accountable. Instead of investing in needed infrastructure to prevent outages, DTE Energy enriches their executives and shareholders and spends millions on campaign contributions to avoid real accountability. Meanwhile, DTE cruelly disconnects life-sustaining service for hundreds of thousands of households each year, and even sells residential customers’ debt to a predatory debt collection firm. And customers who can afford to pay still end up suffering. During the recent extreme cold, over 100,000 DTE customers in Southeast Michigan were forced to go days without power and heat this winter. Thank you for taking action. I promise I will keep fighting for the rights we all deserve, so our communities can thrive. In Congress, I helped create a fund totalling $1.1 billion to stop water shutoffs during the pandemic, and secured a ban on utility shutoffs in a bill that passed the U.S. House of Representatives. Our right to utilities includes the right to access clean water. I have passed historic amendments that would provide $23 billion to fully replace dangerous lead pipes, moved the EPA to replace lead service lines, and created the bipartisan Get the Lead Out Caucus in the House of Representatives where I’m continuing to push for urgent action to remove toxic lead pipes. In service, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Ban men from competing in women’s sports
body:
The National Association of Intercollegiate Athletics (NAIA) just banned men who pretend to be women from competing in women’s sports.

| |
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZQIN0iewP9WQKk_CZHSQgw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_UlCP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvMzc2ZjE3YTctZjFiNi00YjQxLWJkODktZDk3NzA1ZWEzYzU5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDQxM19CREdfQ0ZBTF9OQ0FBX1JFTl9QQS1BRlJXA3NwY0IKZhCpwBpmbJ5wzFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, The National Association of Intercollegiate Athletics (NAIA) just banned men who pretend to be women from competing in women’s sports.Now I’m asking you to sign this emergency petition demanding the National Collegiate Athletic Association – widely known as the NCAA – do the same. **[Will you take 30 seconds right now to add your name to the BAN MEN FROM WOMEN’S SPORTS Petition?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZQIN0iewP9WQKk_CZHSQgw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_UlCP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvMzc2ZjE3YTctZjFiNi00YjQxLWJkODktZDk3NzA1ZWEzYzU5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDQxM19CREdfQ0ZBTF9OQ0FBX1JFTl9QQS1BRlJXA3NwY0IKZhCpwBpmbJ5wzFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** My goal is to collect 1,000,000 signatures to send to NCAA President Charlie Baker in the next few weeks. As the attorney of three young women who were coerced by medical professionals into taking puberty-blocking drugs, pumping their bodies full of cross-sex hormones, and amputating their healthy breasts when they were barely teenagers......**I know just how dangerous it is for an influential organization like the NCAA to glorify medically transitioning children.** As a woman, I understand how unsafe it can be to force girls to share a locker room and other vulnerable spaces with men.And as a conservative, I recognize that it’s a violation of our constitutional freedoms for the “transgender” movement to ignore obvious distinctions between men and women —erasing equal opportunities that real women fought so hard to achieve and pass to future generations of women. **[This is why I’m urgently asking you to add your name to the BAN MEN FROM WOMEN’S SPORTS Petition right away.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZQIN0iewP9WQKk_CZHSQgw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn_UlCP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvMzc2ZjE3YTctZjFiNi00YjQxLWJkODktZDk3NzA1ZWEzYzU5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDQxM19CREdfQ0ZBTF9OQ0FBX1JFTl9QQS1BRlJXA3NwY0IKZhCpwBpmbJ5wzFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I’m the CEO and Founder of the **_Center for American Liberty_** – a conservative not-for-profit law firm that is leading the charge against the woke transgender agenda.
---
* We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and the child mutilators who medically transitioned Chloe Cole to a “boy” when she was just 13 years old. **_Chloe did not give informed consent and now faces a lifetime of serious medical issues because of the drugs, hormones, and surgeries forced on her._**
* We just sent a demand letter on behalf of a grandmother who was banned for life from her local YMCA because she confronted a man in the ladies’ locker room – who was wearing a women’s bathing suit and watching two little girls undress. **_The YMCA called the police on Julie, demonized her in the community, and banished her from the pool she frequented for 40 years._**
* And we’re headed to the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals for a major hearing in the case of a California mother whose daughter was secretly transitioned to a “boy” at school. The fifth-grade child was given a new name, new pronouns, and new bathroom—all without so much as a phone call to mom for her permission. **_This radical school district robbed her mother, Aurora Regino, of her God-given parental rights to raise her child the way she sees fit._**

---

clean_body: The National Association of Intercollegiate Athletics (NAIA) just banned men who pretend to be women from competing in women’s sports. | | | | ~ | | Dear Fellow American, The National Association of Intercollegiate Athletics (NAIA) just banned men who pretend to be women from competing in women’s sports.Now I’m asking you to sign this emergency petition demanding the National Collegiate Athletic Association – widely known as the NCAA – do the same. ~ My goal is to collect 1,000,000 signatures to send to NCAA President Charlie Baker in the next few weeks. As the attorney of three young women who were coerced by medical professionals into taking puberty-blocking drugs, pumping their bodies full of cross-sex hormones, and amputating their healthy breasts when they were barely teenagers......I know just how dangerous it is for an influential organization like the NCAA to glorify medically transitioning children. As a woman, I understand how unsafe it can be to force girls to share a locker room and other vulnerable spaces with men.And as a conservative, I recognize that it’s a violation of our constitutional freedoms for the “transgender” movement to ignore obvious distinctions between men and women —erasing equal opportunities that real women fought so hard to achieve and pass to future generations of women. ~ My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I’m the CEO and Founder of the Center for American Liberty – a conservative not-for-profit law firm that is leading the charge against the woke transgender agenda. We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and the child mutilators who medically transitioned Chloe Cole to a “boy” when she was just 13 years old. Chloe did not give informed consent and now faces a lifetime of serious medical issues because of the drugs, hormones, and surgeries forced on her. We just sent a demand letter on behalf of a grandmother who was banned for life from her local YMCA because she confronted a man in the ladies’ locker room – who was wearing a women’s bathing suit and watching two little girls undress. The YMCA called the police on Julie, demonized her in the community, and banished her from the pool she frequented for 40 years. And we’re headed to the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals for a major hearing in the case of a California mother whose daughter was secretly transitioned to a “boy” at school. The fifth-grade child was given a new name, new pronouns, and new bathroom—all without so much as a phone call to mom for her permission. This radical school district robbed her mother, Aurora Regino, of her God-given parental rights to raise her child the way she sees fit. | | I won’t mince words... Robbing women of equal opportunities in college athletics AND forcing them to share locker rooms and showers with males is unacceptable. But that’s exactly what the NCAA is doing.It’s an attack on the God-given rights and constitutional freedoms of every American.And it’s up to you and me to stop it. Right here, right now. ~ Your generous support will ensure we have the resources to win our groundbreaking litigation on behalf of Chloe, Julie, Aurora, and many others.More importantly, your signature on this vital petition will send a clear message – not just to the leaders in college athletics but to every radical leading a school district, hospital, or athletic facility in America – that you won’t tolerate this lunacy a moment longer.~** If the NAIA can protect women’s sports, so can the NCAA. Let’s build off this momentum. Thank you in advance for your support. God Bless, | | ~ Harmeet K. As regional campaign Chairs of Eugene’s campaign, we’ve talked with thousands of Democratic voters from across the Commonwealth — **and throughout PA, voters understand just how important this race for Attorney General will be.**
After all, the Attorney General is the last line of defense to protect Pennsylvanians from the GOP’s extreme MAGA agenda. If Democrats fall short in November, there will be nothing to stop the extremists from attacking reproductive rights, undermining our democracy, and prioritizing right-wing special interests over regular PA families.
**That’s why it’s so important to elect Eugene.**
Eugene is the only candidate in this race that has won statewide before and we know that he is an unrelenting advocate for regular PA families and local communities. As Auditor General, he saved taxpayers **over $2 billion** in waste, fraud, and abuse, took on anti-choice organizations that abused taxpayer money, and defended our elections from far-right MAGA attacks.
**Eugene is the candidate we can count on to defeat the extremists on Election Day and deliver progress and results for our communities — _and that’s why we’re reaching out to you asking for you to support Eugene too._**
[_**In order for Eugene to defeat the extremists in November, we need to maximize Democratic turnout for the April 23rd primary. name: Team Engel
subject: So what now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://engelforarizona.com [https://engelforarizona.com]
Peter,
On Tuesday, the Arizona Supreme Court reinstated a Civil War-era abortion ban.
This law is beyond inhumane. It criminalizes doctors and doesn’t make any exceptions in cases of rape or incest. It’s a complete violation of a woman’s most fundamental rights.
Winning this November just became even more critical. If elected, Kirsten will fight nonstop in Congress to pass nationwide protections for reproductive rights. You can help her flip this ultra-competitive seat blue by chipping in here >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_041324_AZAbortion_C_act]
We’ll be working until November to flip this seat — but there are elected officials in Arizona now who can and should be acting to stop this archaic ban.
Our opponent, who cheered the overturning of Roe v. Wade and paved the way for this decision, is now trying to act shocked by the ban.
Ciscomani released a statement calling on Arizona legislators to “fix this” — but has done absolutely nothing to protect Arizonans’ abortion rights himself. This should come as a surprise to no one, given that he has voted to restrict reproductive freedom across the country multiple times in Congress.
Democrats in the Arizona Legislature tried to repeal the 1864 ban this week — but the Republican leadership cut them off and adjourned for the week.
The cowardly behavior and inaction of GOP leaders is a disgrace to every Arizona woman.

Peter,

I’m very disturbed by the news out of Arizona this week. **In case you missed it, the Arizona Supreme Court ruled that a 1864 law banning abortion in nearly all cases, with no exceptions for rape or incest, could go into effect.**

This law predates Arizona statehood when women didn’t have the right to vote. It also threatens to jail anyone who aids in an abortion, whether a doctor or a loved one.

Republicans, including my opponent Mike Garcia, have been plotting for a national abortion ban for years. Now, they’re inching closer to their goal.

It’s absolutely critical that we win CA-27 to secure the House majority for Democrats and protect reproductive freedom. It will be my priority in Congress to enshrine _Roe v. Wade_ into law and protect access to abortion and other health care nationwide.

I refuse to silently stand by while we’re pulled back to an era where my daughter has fewer rights than my wife did at her age. It’s sickening, but the GOP has made it clear that this is what’s at stake nationwide.

**[Please, if you’re with me, chip in $3 now to help me defeat Garcia and safeguard abortion rights. name: Terese Casey
subject: Sign Bob’s birthday card
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2674%2E552475%2ECKW49M)
Hi Peter,
Birthdays in a family as big as ours are a great excuse to get everyone together. As our family grew, so did the celebrations: first, with the addition of our four daughters, Elyse, Caroline, Julia, and Marena; later, our son-in-law Michael; and our two grandsons, Max and Aiden. Now, we happily celebrate three birthdays in April – Bob’s, Caroline's, and Max's!
Bob is always busy working for Pennsylvania and traveling across our Commonwealth, and we want to make today’s celebration extra special for him.
We're planning to give Bob a card to show him how much we all appreciate him and his hard work for the people of Pennsylvania – and we're hoping you'll add your name.
[**Will you do me, Elyse, Caroline, Julia, Marena, Michael, Max, and Aiden a favor by signing Bob's birthday card?**](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-birthday-card-email/?t=2&akid=2674%2E552475%2ECKW49M)
[](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-birthday-card-email/?t=3&akid=2674%2E552475%2ECKW49M)
Nobody cares more about improving the lives of Pennsylvanians than Bob. I've seen firsthand just how hard he fights for families like ours in the Senate. I know he'll be especially touched to know that you appreciate him and all he does for the Commonwealth.
[**So please, before we give Bob his card, join me in wishing him a very happy birthday by adding your name.**](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-birthday-card-email/?t=4&akid=2674%2E552475%2ECKW49M)
– Terese Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=2674%2E552475%2ECKW49M)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2674%2E552475%2ECKW49M)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: I’m not easily insulted, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:

body:
As Chicago committeemen plan to convene Sunday to replace Boulton, the disgraced Chicago GOP Chair calls IR's reporting a "Smear Campaign."

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/c0ee57584b67/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10299252?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=4613fa242f) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=4613fa242f)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to hear the latest developments facing Chicago GOP Chair Stephen Boulton. Follow Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) as this story continues to unfold.

** Chicago GOP Chair Steve Boulton Calls IR Reporting a “Smear Campaign,” as IL GOP Leaders Don Tracy, Richard Porter Ignore his Comments Comparing Trump to Hitler (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/chicago-gop-chair-steve-boulton-calls-ir-reporting-a-smear-campaign-as-il-gop-leaders-don-tracy-richard-porter-ignore-his-comments-comparing-trump-to-hitler.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/chicago-gop-chair-steve-boulton-calls-ir-reporting-a-smear-campaign-as-il-gop-leaders-don-tracy-richard-porter-ignore-his-comments-comparing-trump-to-hitler.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

By Illinois Review

Disgraced Chicago Republican Party Chairman Steve Boulton is digging in his heels and attacking this publication for reporting (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/chicago-gop-chair-steve-boulton-endorsed-a-never-trumper-in-2016-and-compared-trump-to-hitler-now-trying-to-facilitate-a-trump-visit-secure-campaign-money.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that in 2016, he compared (https://www.facebook.com/stephen.boulton.5/posts/pfbid02EHGauEppxojzi9qznkj8efshEf4qDNAs3opg7qucdTJjVsQ5wFQjCULjCUXQgknkl?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) Donald Trump to Adolf Hitler, calling the revelations a “smear campaign” as party officials, including state party chairman Don Tracy and Illinois Republican National Committeeman Richard Porter remain silent – refusing to address their friend’s vile comment.
https://www.facebook.com/stephen.boulton.5/posts/pfbid02EHGauEppxojzi9qznkj8efshEf4qDNAs3opg7qucdTJjVsQ5wFQjCULjCUXQgknkl?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/chicago-gop-chair-steve-boulton-calls-ir-reporting-a-smear-campaign-as-il-gop-leaders-don-tracy-richard-porter-ignore-his-comments-comparing-trump-to-hitler.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Porter, who endorsed Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis for president and spent time in Florida raising money for his failed campaign, is quietly trying to weasel his way into Trump’s inner circle at the Republican National Committee after his close friend Ronna Romney-McDaniel was forced out as RNC chairwoman by Trump. Porter has yet to endorse Trump publicly and during Republican Day at the Illinois State Fair last August, Porter took the bait – feeding the Democratic narrative that Trump is running for president to avoid going to jail during an interview (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/il-gop-official-echoes-the-democrats-suggests-trump-is-running-for-president-to-avoid-jail-in-an-interview-during-gop-day-at-the-state-fair.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) with the Chicago Tribune.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/chicago-gop-chair-steve-boulton-calls-ir-reporting-a-smear-campaign-as-il-gop-leaders-don-tracy-richard-porter-ignore-his-comments-comparing-trump-to-hitler.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

IL GOP Chairman Don Tracy’s family-owned business Dot Foods, where he is an owner, have made some political donations (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-chair-don-tracys-family-owned-business-donated-to-biden-never-trumpers.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that tell an interesting story. In 2020, owners of Dot Foods made a $6,193 donation to presidential candidate Joe Biden.

When President Trump visited Illinois in June of 2022, neither Porter or Tracy bothered to show up – choosing to skip the event altogether – despite serving as the Republican national committeeman for Illinois and chairman of the Illinois Republican party.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/chicago-gop-chair-steve-boulton-calls-ir-reporting-a-smear-campaign-as-il-gop-leaders-don-tracy-richard-porter-ignore-his-comments-comparing-trump-to-hitler.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Boulton, who remains close friends and an advisor to Porter and Tracy, isn’t denying his 2016 comments comparing Trump to Hitler – choosing to attack this publication instead – telling his very few friends that “nobody is buying” this “smear campaign” against him.

Chicago GOP officials have called a special meeting for this Sunday after
IR’s reporting (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/chicago-gop-chair-steve-boulton-endorsed-a-never-trumper-in-2016-and-compared-trump-to-hitler-now-trying-to-facilitate-a-trump-visit-secure-campaign-money.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on the Hitler comment to replace Boulton as chairman. But as expected, Boulton is deploying fear and intimidation tactics to try and prevent a quorum on Sunday where they hope to replace him as chairman.
https://www.mypillow.com/ir?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4613fa242f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Follow Illinois Review () as this story continues to unfold. Chicago GOP Chair Steve Boulton Calls IR Reporting a “Smear Campaign,” as IL GOP Leaders Don Tracy, Richard Porter Ignore his Comments Comparing Trump to Hitler () By Illinois Review Disgraced Chicago Republican Party Chairman Steve Boulton is digging in his heels and attacking this publication for reporting () that in 2016, he compared () Donald Trump to Adolf Hitler, calling the revelations a “smear campaign” as party officials, including state party chairman Don Tracy and Illinois Republican National Committeeman Richard Porter remain silent – refusing to address their friend’s vile comment. CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () Porter, who endorsed Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis for president and spent time in Florida raising money for his failed campaign, is quietly trying to weasel his way into Trump’s inner circle at the Republican National Committee after his close friend Ronna Romney-McDaniel was forced out as RNC chairwoman by Trump. Porter has yet to endorse Trump publicly and during Republican Day at the Illinois State Fair last August, Porter took the bait – feeding the Democratic narrative that Trump is running for president to avoid going to jail during an interview () with the Chicago Tribune. CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () IL GOP Chairman Don Tracy’s family-owned business Dot Foods, where he is an owner, have made some political donations () that tell an interesting story. In 2020, owners of Dot Foods made a $6,193 donation to presidential candidate Joe Biden. When President Trump visited Illinois in June of 2022, neither Porter or Tracy bothered to show up – choosing to skip the event altogether – despite serving as the Republican national committeeman for Illinois and chairman of the Illinois Republican party. CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () Boulton, who remains close friends and an advisor to Porter and Tracy, isn’t denying his 2016 comments comparing Trump to Hitler – choosing to attack this publication instead – telling his very few friends that “nobody is buying” this “smear campaign” against him. Chicago GOP officials have called a special meeting for this Sunday after IR’s reporting () on the Hitler comment to replace Boulton as chairman. But as expected, Boulton is deploying fear and intimidation tactics to try and prevent a quorum on Sunday where they hope to replace him as chairman. body:
Friend –
I can’t thank this team enough for your support.
Not only have we announced our first slate of 2024 Leaders We Deserve endorsed candidates — we even won an early victory when Christine Cockley won her primary in Ohio!
Friend , the outpouring of support from this grassroots team is providing an enormous boost to each of our candidates. We need to keep up our momentum as we get closer to the November election. Split a $15 donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America now >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
We are proud to be working with our first round of 2024 endorsed candidates:
*
Sarah
McBride
for
U.S.
Congress
(Delaware)
*
Christine
Cockley
for
Ohio
House
*
Bryce
Berry
for
Georgia
House
*
Ashwin
Ramaswami
for
Georgia
Senate
*
Anna
Thomas
for
Pennsylvania
House
*
Anja
Wookey-Huffman
for
Montana
House
From now until November, we’ll be doing everything we can to elect these young progressive leaders to fight for our generation’s values and defend our future.
And, just like we did in Virginia last year, we’re preparing to make significant investments in each of these campaigns to help them win big this November.
We’re going to be on the ground supporting all of our 2024 endorsed candidates by running ads, managing effective volunteer and canvassing programs, and helping them reach the voters they will need on their side to win these races.
I’ll be blunt: Winning these races isn’t cheap. These campaigns require serious resources — and that’s why the support from this grassroots team is so vital.
Friend , will you make a $15 contribution to Leaders We Deserve and Serve America right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Thank you for your support!
David Hogg

Earlier this week, the extreme Arizona Supreme Court revived an archaic law from 1864, predating Arizona's statehood and the right of women to vote. This cruel law criminalizes and bans abortion in the state.

This is a warning sign we can't ignore. It's more important than ever that Democrats retake the House majority so Kim and her Democratic colleagues can continue fighting to protect abortion access nationwide. But we can't do it alone, that's why we need your support as Republicans continue their extreme attacks on our reproductive freedoms.

To prepare, we've set a goal to raise $20,000 by our mid-month deadline on Monday at midnight to ensure we have resources to defend Kim's seat and retake the House majority.

**[Will you rush a donation right away to help keep Kim in Congress fighting on behalf of women everywhere by chipping in $5 or whatever you can? clean_body: | = Arizona can enforce an 1864 law criminalizing nearly all abortions, court says = | = The attacks on reproductive rights just keep coming, Peter. Earlier this week, the extreme Arizona Supreme Court revived an archaic law from 1864, predating Arizona's statehood and the right of women to vote. This cruel law criminalizes and bans abortion in the state. This is a warning sign we can't ignore. It's more important than ever that Democrats retake the House majority so Kim and her Democratic colleagues can continue fighting to protect abortion access nationwide. But we can't do it alone, that's why we need your support as Republicans continue their extreme attacks on our reproductive freedoms. To prepare, we've set a goal to raise $20,000 by our mid-month deadline on Monday at midnight to ensure we have resources to defend Kim's seat and retake the House majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat this November and take back the House. = ** Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

Fellow American,

We might not know each other personally, but you probably know someone with a story like mine - or maybe my story looks like yours. My parents were refugees who escaped from Communist Cuba to America in search of freedom. We didn’t have a lot growing up, but my parents worked incredibly hard and instilled in me the values of faith, gift, and dedication to the country that gave us everything. **Now, I’m carrying on my parents legacy by making sure America NEVER goes the way of Communist Cuba and fighting socialism.** I’m a proud Latina woman, a daughter of refugees, and an unapologetic conservative. It goes against everything the Democrats’ woke narrative says. And that means they’re determined to take me down. **[I’m fighting like hell to protect the American Dream from socialism, and I need your help. Will you join our team today?](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=9a7f02f3b12c48c8a481b01fa5de169e&_e=xCXOISLYS2zMzGcjEH6hsWfdqrVXCZ0SpgTIIwxw4l33HbScVQkG4ihJcSegUD88HipdxeEMU60aYqre996GXDfTqcqv2k1IO4VWiHUSi8FD9s_Ee-GUTBCO2BGLYxwYuruPIJhTzNPI9WH6sli5gyny0N4xrD-4Y1G4RqRDt9DgfdMKtrJN72zTp90kwn3U6ZfcRWPCHQUQHMZinGGvH4hBgSgIS9eF59T3TA8OoMhYNcsL2YtvyGpbmT_kXNkxvN_poNoM9cgPjN3qoclhUdZLWrZqgHWKT7iNFXxBqtCVWG-Daz9n3zFGGN8JxT6LU2Qds8NDkQ3LXudjRmEKS3VHJZGhkKft8DwXWs9Nkl0%3D)**

**Peter, the housing crisis is _personal_ to me.** Personal enough that I just went to the Florida State Capitol myself to demand action – and I’m not stopping there.

Listen, I was priced out of my home while running for Congress, and was houseless for two months. When I made it to Congress and moved to D.C, I was denied from multiple apartment buildings because unfair housing policies tanked my credit. There was no way to win.

And it isn’t just me – this crisis is impacting my entire generation. Americans used to literally buy homes at my age. _Now, we can’t even afford to rent an apartment._

**Our housing system is clearly broken. But we don’t have to accept broken systems, or wait for Republicans who clearly don’t give a damn to change their tune. Housing IS a human right, and I won’t stop fighting until our basic needs are met.**

Trouble is, the same special interests behind this crisis are desperate to keep people like me out of Congress, where we can actually fight back with policy. **I need your help to hold this seat and hold them back, so I have to ask:**

[**_Will you donate $27 right now to help hit my weekly fundraising goal? Every dollar has the power to keep me fighting for all of us in Congress, and I know we can make actual change together. name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: Do you think I am loyal to my country?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
HINT: look at my legs

|
---
Patriot,

[ ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3710ca607df240dbb925dd084a7400ba&_e=2erS89W8MRA36J_pKSL-xvIkSs6xgXKmaRw98cvAmnEKaAdspbFT4Ir9O2ThZywmcUf8AYT5xZANzAWeRip127XfrSP2F9Gg3o_AC4nwz86qLXSQhJCzpsq6iCTZKQ1l4xqKAc4tMainBugJzSxYiN0VPt62JLNFN0bzjxXSObdnhisY8REojcQsQjsVki834_sCfgti_OvoAyCXdk3kD-oGfoGsgDJ-h6qG2s4CRnUhBdEdWI50e7u3BCg34u2pQOjUkO2LjJgt2RKRfzcI8wOVwwbafQZV-Nh8stGRIGWK-gyID6bfvJnZsJIc6bVoZRNkPrjCyk7iD7hHkV6ot3xeVaMwcICVWq8SvoRBip4vKbDRAfXIJZ5vMhBFP6yi)
**_Do you think I am loyal to my country?_**
[ ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3710ca607df240dbb925dd084a7400ba&_e=2erS89W8MRA36J_pKSL-xvIkSs6xgXKmaRw98cvAmnEKaAdspbFT4Ir9O2ThZywmcUf8AYT5xZANzAWeRip127XfrSP2F9Gg3o_AC4nwz86qLXSQhJCzpsq6iCTZKQ1l4xqKAc4tMainBugJzSxYiN0VPt62JLNFN0bzjxXSObdnhisY8REojcQsQjsVki834_sCfgti_OvoAyCXdk3kD-oGfoGsgDJ-h6qG2s4CRnU1nBSlcWVIO0NIZEH9SkRKdAZC17yNkiovcrH6oAf6Ie7tA0M5SQH-UwB1MhOJiNDh_cEYxcgU5qLlH0jHMEPmIgQr8w-caByP7_1uLKfPydl5mutRRoeByAIYfpzGuqL4KKG9mMpSgzZ7yOCtEYbh)
**The Liberal media is questioning my loyalty!

_They are questioning where my allegiance lies after I sacrificed both my legs and nearly my life in service to the United States of America._**
I served in the U.S. Army for more than 12 years. I lost both of my legs on the battlefield fighting terrorists in Afghanistan. I then learned how to walk again and continued fighting for freedom in the halls of Congress. I also volunteered alongside the Israeli Defense Forces. So, if someone thinks that my showing support for our ally Israel is a display of anything other than absolute patriotism and American loyalty, **[they are dead wrong.](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3710ca607df240dbb925dd084a7400ba&_e=2erS89W8MRA36J_pKSL-xvIkSs6xgXKmaRw98cvAmnEKaAdspbFT4Ir9O2ThZywmcUf8AYT5xZANzAWeRip127XfrSP2F9Gg3o_AC4nwz86qLXSQhJCzpsq6iCTZKQ1l4xqKAc4tMainBugJzSxYiN0VPt62JLNFN0bzjxXSObdnhisY8REojcQsQjsVki83q03Fg441kEhqG6OnTMjS5Jmey5zloDMg6IwDMcndIsSXKFOS4aEEoz7bNc9OHMcsL35GJDrtbP0CkxliRXLfm-qsTEdB3os9LbtNiAlatQ4HkJxzQXNH6xOcOvjXqw0ZymXsbBS8EfmGJcbLLTLV-XctAbcuNqR4dJn2q1eLilz2hAL9IAFDcLdj7aDciYHsqvmntCuLr8hM5Vr6LTEl4w%3D%3D)**

**[HELP SPREAD THE MESSAGE:](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3710ca607df240dbb925dd084a7400ba&_e=2erS89W8MRA36J_pKSL-xvIkSs6xgXKmaRw98cvAmnEKaAdspbFT4Ir9O2ThZywmcUf8AYT5xZANzAWeRip127XfrSP2F9Gg3o_AC4nwz86qLXSQhJCzpsq6iCTZKQ1l4xqKAc4tMainBugJzSxYiN0VPt62JLNFN0bzjxXSObdnhisY8REojcQsQjsVki834_sCfgti_OvoAyCXdk3kD-oGfoGsgDJ-h6qG2s4CRnVjxBsiqgHo_nujDtkZkiUtkLkQd1L_94q8indUygdCpZwcfnnAOdcG5w7wH0SccmVlE5Esfzl8nXY5BJH5vx9BDJuQD1XbtpMg1afhW6mIA9_B3gCr1S7ljtXXD2KRyYa0mpmRRWPZeldT-LGbugET)** I am under attack once again from radicals. This time, it is the far-left activist groups and the radical-leaning media.

They even came after me on my two prosthetic legs — demanding that I stand with Palestinian terrorists against Israel. I responded that the **only place I stand on terrorists is _[on their throats.](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3710ca607df240dbb925dd084a7400ba&_e=2erS89W8MRA36J_pKSL-xvIkSs6xgXKmaRw98cvAmnEKaAdspbFT4Ir9O2ThZywmcUf8AYT5xZANzAWeRip127XfrSP2F9Gg3o_AC4nwz86qLXSQhJCzpsq6iCTZKQ1l4xqKAc4tMainBugJzSxYiN0VPt62JLNFN0bzjxXSObdnhisY8REojcQsQjsVki83q03Fg441kEhqG6OnTMjS5Jmey5zloDMg6IwDMcndIsSXKFOS4aEEoz7bNc9OHMcs-IzbH5LBRLaNrIC5CHZoAklJokXSyM4YpyvGYfvH0Wi2tHw53ukI1A4hm5b1f62ckPvEqAHk2cNh1kQi9B4CcOpFnxXeO5LWjiQoh_0aQ8x7K-iKO3WVpKxnK4XZbmg5CAGdpk5Pc4-HTnGKZefWlw%3D%3D)_**

| [**LET THEM KNOW WHERE YOU STAND**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3710ca607df240dbb925dd084a7400ba&_e=2erS89W8MRA36J_pKSL-xvIkSs6xgXKmaRw98cvAmnEKaAdspbFT4Ir9O2ThZywmcUf8AYT5xZANzAWeRip127XfrSP2F9Gg3o_AC4nwz86qLXSQhJCzpsq6iCTZKQ1l4xqKAc4tMainBugJzSxYiN0VPt62JLNFN0bzjxXSObdnhisY8REojcQsQjsVki834_sCfgti_OvoAyCXdk3kD-oGfoGsgDJ-h6qG2s4CRnUGbxUw7mwZq66jdJzPeoN3Yig9KfHTRJB5mmuU8QaXM5sRBwmVQRGaitcehtauTQT2JC6WHz6ZX9fk30eS3ZuYqS3vt7bsCYzR7MQWKRJxvvryuYew2KF_2UE0O4QukrJa_GUEeOdSUdeEo55Z5dBz)
---

**They can call me heartless, soulless, or anything else they want, but if they think they know more than I do about the impacts of radical Islamic terrorism, they’re flat-out delusional.** Every day I wake up and look where my legs used to be is a vivid reminder of exactly what’s at stake in the fight against terrorism.

Clearly, though, they are not going to stop coming after me or questioning my loyalty — **the loyalty of a double-amputee Purple Heart veteran with more than 12 years of American military service!** The Radical Left truly is a [disgrace](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3710ca607df240dbb925dd084a7400ba&_e=2erS89W8MRA36J_pKSL-xvIkSs6xgXKmaRw98cvAmnEKaAdspbFT4Ir9O2ThZywmcUf8AYT5xZANzAWeRip127XfrSP2F9Gg3o_AC4nwz86qLXSQhJCzpsq6iCTZKQ1l4xqKAc4tMainBugJzSxYiN0VPt62JLNFN0bzjxXSObdnhisY8REojcQsQjsVki834_sCfgti_OvoAyCXdk3kD-oGfoGsgDJ-h6qG2s4CRnW00_TfZLd5sMqbRMgLpCuNp7sXFnnwt-3Qo7DMBgP8FgPYbcNDP98wI2CuqZ-WnxduEETVSP134BEnoetyywbZixRgRiplrnQoBCA1_rNP03w4efg6ne1dWWGh1C61mxXnMtfGWWBBEC3ExO8wz03r) in our great nation.

clean_body: HINT: look at my legs | Patriot, Do you think I am loyal to my country? The Liberal media is questioning my loyalty! They are questioning where my allegiance lies after I sacrificed both my legs and nearly my life in service to the United States of America. I served in the U.S. Army for more than 12 years. I lost both of my legs on the battlefield fighting terrorists in Afghanistan. I then learned how to walk again and continued fighting for freedom in the halls of Congress. I also volunteered alongside the Israeli Defense Forces. So, if someone thinks that my showing support for our ally Israel is a display of anything other than absolute patriotism and American loyalty, I am under attack once again from radicals. This time, it is the far-left activist groups and the radical-leaning media. They even came after me on my two prosthetic legs — demanding that I stand with Palestinian terrorists against Israel. I responded that the only place I stand on terrorists is | They can call me heartless, soulless, or anything else they want, but if they think they know more than I do about the impacts of radical Islamic terrorism, they’re flat-out delusional. Every day I wake up and look where my legs used to be is a vivid reminder of exactly what’s at stake in the fight against terrorism. Clearly, though, they are not going to stop coming after me or questioning my loyalty — the loyalty of a double-amputee Purple Heart veteran with more than 12 years of American military service! The Radical Left truly is a in our great nation. I hope you never have to suffer the same indignity of the radicals questioning where your loyalties lie. I know you are a proud American patriot, just like me, and I am honored to have you on my team. Thank you, SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.) name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Tough call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Public service is a position of public trust. A Veteran like Tim Sheehy should know that.
#
Derek, we don’t make a decision to drop $200,000 in digital ads lightly.
It’s a lot of money. It takes a lot of supporters to raise that much, and these emails are one of the single biggest sources of donations that VoteVets has.
But we knew we had to do something when we saw that Tim Sheehy in Montana couldn’t get his record straight on whether the bullet in his arm was from a war wound or an accidental discharge in the parking lot of a National Park.
Public service is a position of public trust. A Veteran like Tim Sheehy should know that.
That’s why we went online in Montana with our newest ad, “Self-Inflicted Wound.” You can watch it here:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-april24-sheehy.wMaeMy&refcode=em240413-1-30&t=1&akid=25045%2E3013755%2EHDsgDU)
Like we said, $200,000 is a pretty big buy. But as Veterans, we knew we had to call this out.
And in the fight for control of the U.S. Senate, we have to win in Montana.
It was a tough call. But we’re hoping you understand why we made it.
If you do, and if you want to see us continue to push back and take the fight to guys like Tim Sheehy, do you think you could help us cover a small amount of our ad buy?
[**Make a donation of $15 or whatever you can and help us keep these ads up. Would mean a lot for our chances in Montana.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-april24-sheehy.wMaeMy&refcode=em240413-1-30&t=2&akid=25045%2E3013755%2EHDsgDU)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-c4-em-april24-sheehy.tpNrlc&refcode=em240413-1-30&t=21&akid=25045%2E3013755%2EHDsgDU)**

clean_body: Public service is a position of public trust. A Veteran like Tim Sheehy should know that. Derek, we don’t make a decision to drop $200,000 in digital ads lightly. It’s a lot of money. It takes a lot of supporters to raise that much, and these emails are one of the single biggest sources of donations that VoteVets has. But we knew we had to do something when we saw that Tim Sheehy in Montana couldn’t get his record straight on whether the bullet in his arm was from a war wound or an accidental discharge in the parking lot of a National Park. Public service is a position of public trust. A Veteran like Tim Sheehy should know that. That’s why we went online in Montana with our newest ad, “Self-Inflicted Wound.” You can watch it here: Like we said, $200,000 is a pretty big buy. But as Veterans, we knew we had to call this out. And in the fight for control of the U.S. Senate, we have to win in Montana. It was a tough call. But we’re hoping you understand why we made it. If you do, and if you want to see us continue to push back and take the fight to guys like Tim Sheehy, do you think you could help us cover a small amount of our ad buy? subject: I hope I’ve made you proud
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82975500/466884733/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTlhYmE2NS1jNWY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n1ILlNDdUi89MiGaVlVdAZWOeCROVP_Otht3D0xJxh4=) It’s no secret that Congress is a pretty dysfunctional place. Far too often, partisan politics takes precedence over what’s best for the American people. You would think, then, that when something real gets accomplished, it would be big news. But in reality, some of the most important accomplishments end up flying under the radar. So when I helped save seniors across Kansas hundreds of dollars in insulin every year, there weren’t exactly wall-to-wall cable news headlines. When the bipartisan infrastructure law I fought for kickstarted over 300 construction projects here in Kansas, it didn’t trend on Twitter. And when we brought in millions of dollars to fund rural broadband expansion in rural communities, no, the New York Times didn’t send a camera crew to our office to cover it. **The fact is, I’m proud of my record of cutting through the partisanship and delivering real progress for Kansas families. But we can’t expect anyone to get that message out for us — it’s up to us, this team, to reach every single voter and show them what we’ve gotten done.** [_**Can I count on you to pitch in a few dollars today and help us do exactly that? We need to show the people of KS-03 what this campaign is about — before our well-funded opponents try to define us first. body:
2024 is shaping up to be one of the most consequential election years in history. Over 44 states have legislative elections, and there will be hundreds of competitive races nationwide. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**We’re reaching out with an important request:** [Will you split a donation of $10 or more between the Biden-Harris campaign and DLCC PAC as we work to elect Democrats from the statehouse to the White House? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvBi_Xvy-fLs9Fg49SlevToyB97yRV0VE8-91FFqEDQZ8cHwWkrj_F2qbXAUve86msGpYWuFJsrC_co0QRoZ7HPWGPoR6F3SE6arjBIFpaVEG-CjO3W3Z7J_0tEHpB0hCUCR19e8IGgZKWyNJ4yUihGHH7LzvJSozFzAomjL0h-rk-nyPSF3f4zzMDm6GBQlXbsv1zGg8vvTtmKX-0KB9EOjvmql3WIenNJYIOnrSjChjTL283E86lNVJ54KRypz0YL9pZq3Byzwz3BSoxpNvnNYnsksSWIpYKmJ66kpvOCzwaqnWBgostyJSU4_c5UvG0GQKCf1D8cPRWXb_n81NxR2BX_MAR9DVFYH2yCm1Dy9-vcaHOIMNZYWfmXitIaCVDA7LbtNlzwNxfa013huAYi6m0e9QifnGpFhShpYIzBE7vHIvMawiVa3oFN7ntv_Q-ZLiIVsY-PDdV4FykxvL1_JumNKrC_GCx4dwNJm4BJhQuuO7I7N_edvchMDrjFV4N8pp_5Pyz-n8Rh2fHtKY0V2Tgyty5CNItM-eup9zV6NNhHA-2rLJFrexvboBQUlSc/45h/fHY_H7Q6SouFBWg_uh1j3A/h0/h001._DZiN7hQKyR-DlwnplGyAv8yUnFQHu6VnxeUp4me2fE) 2024 is shaping up to be one of the most consequential election years in history. Over 44 states will have legislative elections on the ballot, and there will be hundreds of competitive races nationwide. Reproductive freedoms, LGBTQ+ rights, and access to the ballot box are all on the ballot this fall. We need to win in November to continue this progress, break Republican strongholds, and empower Democrats up and down the ballot. When Larry Hogan jumped into Maryland's open U.S. Senate race, it shifted the entire Senate landscape and shifted Maryland from safely blue to a battleground state.

A lot of Hogan's momentum comes from the false perception that he's a "moderate" voice in an otherwise extremist, out-of-touch GOP.

**_But Hogan's veto record tells a very different story, Peter._**

In fact, we're about to give you five clear examples proving that Larry Hogan would be just one more rubber stamp for the GOP's agenda in the Senate, but before we do that: [**Will you please chip in a split donation of $25 — _just $5 for each reason listed below_ — to help us and EMILYs List take on Larry Hogan and win this critical battleground race?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82976342/466887987/188368918?amount=25&refcode=WTEFHP20_20240413_AlsobrooksSplit_ND_v1s3&sourceid=1053432&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWM4ZjMwYy1jOGY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wjx6gGf_ySmDoadyUpBP4OJyr23FHucIewDXVCr1jLs=) | [DONATE $25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82976347/466888019/188368918?amount=25&refcode=WTEFHP20_20240413_AlsobrooksSplit_ND_v1s3&sourceid=1053432&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWM4ZjMwYy1jOGY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wjx6gGf_ySmDoadyUpBP4OJyr23FHucIewDXVCr1jLs=)

Here are five examples proving that Marylanders deserve better than Larry Hogan:
* _He vetoed a $15 minimum wage._

* _He undercut workers by vetoing legislation that would have allowed them to deduct union dues from state income taxes._

* _He vetoed a bill to restore voting rights to more than 44,000 previously incarcerated Marylanders._

* _He vetoed commonsense gun legislation mandating background checks._

* _He vetoed legislation to increase access to reproductive care by increasing the number of abortion providers in Maryland._

**Larry Hogan isn't fooling anyone, Peter, and we can't afford to let him represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate.** [**Will you please pitch in a $25 split between our campaign and EMILYs List so we can boost our Maryland-first message, win this critical election, and defend our narrow Senate majority?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82976353/466888025/188368918?amount=25&refcode=WTEFHP20_20240413_AlsobrooksSplit_ND_v1s3&sourceid=1053432&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWM4ZjMwYy1jOGY5LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wjx6gGf_ySmDoadyUpBP4OJyr23FHucIewDXVCr1jLs=)

He vetoed a bill to restore voting rights to more than 44,000 previously incarcerated Marylanders. He vetoed commonsense gun legislation mandating background checks. He vetoed legislation to increase access to reproductive care by increasing the number of abortion providers in Maryland. Larry Hogan isn't fooling anyone, Peter, and we can't afford to let him represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate.** = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks! — Alsobrooks HQ EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. = = Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Folks,

There's no beating around the bush.

This has been a tough month for Republicans.

We've lost a lot of ground fighting back against the radical ideologies and manifestos from my far-left colleagues, and it seems as if every time they open their mouths, money pours in from their base.

We've been presented with a serious opportunity to make up some ground...._I 'm talking as seriously as the business end of a .45._

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dc2a4895fe2345dc9640442812a61c47&_e=7tCAB3Cu4YkLOPLiOKCS0BMmNpXH41YrjZOtcSIxctiiU9c2XsSDKwdAImDuRSQmlSsx6jGxd8LbyAqG9HCBqD2CEguLKlhM99D0Ic_olOeWtkNXmULJxsO-4sJNPefC-DTiDo1sxQX_EONLGNyMVXgxBrFy_p12iuxb1tRxrCodJkKsd8a8-x10ho9ey22T9kZXcnEEJ7o8CM_9zHouEUJ7Jy8aRsyvmmbjNIdJJk0neFaOdT0drIAZMBYZTykzxJ7e8CaC28aPPV8RdS5NLXkvKWdpym2xpvz6NaBsKfYTQH86xHqnaami30mZq-fiiHAB0JnrRKWPIiy3KV7XfjeOTqJYdJlxFBx4PekP59IQ-IXSD2AIDUvPZe-9WNnXwacfCJXWL6S7SpQpSk_iOHa1R1oumyS85eUuUdH9j1A%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.
