name: Alsobrooks HQ
subject: Your Latest Team Alsobrooks Newsletter!
body:
Greetings #TeamAlsobrooks!

What a week it has been on the campaign trail! Our people-powered movement
is growing stronger and stronger everyday thanks to our incredible support
across Maryland. We are 31 days away from the election, and now is the
perfect time to start telling all your friends about Angela and joining us
to make calls and knock on doors.

In case you missed it, here’s what’s been happening for the past week on
the campaign trail and beyond:

[1]🚨NEW POLL ALERT - RACE IS DEAD HEAT[2]🚨

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17675?t=1001&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]A new poll out yesterday afternoon confirms what two recently released
polls have shown, which is that despite his continued and massive
spending, Trone's support has stalled. Our latest poll shows that Trone is
leading 43-40%, with 17% undecided.

Our grassroots, people-powered campaign has been steadily making progress
in the face of David Trone's massive personal spending (now surpassing $43
million). With enough resources, we are poised to overtake him.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17708?t=1040&amount=25&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ][IMG]

[5]🚨NEW AD ALERT[6]🚨

Marylanders deserve a Senator who will fight tooth and nail to protect a
woman’s right to choose and who has never compromised on that belief for
their own personal gain. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17677?t=1002&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Check out our new ad [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17677?t=1003&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]here!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17708?t=1044&amount=25&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ][IMG]

We spent time meeting with Anne Arundel County faith leaders! Thank you
Apostle Antonio Palmer for organizing this group to come together, your
spirit of kindness and activism has truly uplifted the community.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17708?t=1045&amount=25&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ][IMG]

What an excellent time participating in church services at Carter Memorial
Church of God in Christ in West Baltimore. Great to see Senator Antonio
Hayes, Delegate Jeffrie Long, and Delegate Marlon Amprey. Thank you to
Bishop Carl A. Pierce Sr. for hosting us in your house of worship.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17708?t=1046&amount=25&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ][IMG]

Thank you to all the folks who came out in Dundalk to discuss how we can
build a better Maryland for every single community across the state.
Marylanders deserve a Senator who will fight for better jobs, safer
communities, lower healthcare costs, and economic opportunity. Angela
will do exactly that.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17708?t=1047&amount=25&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ][IMG]

#TeamAlsobrooks had a fantastic time at the Baltimore Farmers Market,
Maryland’s largest Farmers Market. Way to kick off the season with
Comptroller Brooke Lierman, Senator Cory McCray, and Towson University
fellow Shawn, telling folks about our race.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17708?t=1048&amount=25&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ][IMG]

It was great to visit Woodlawn and Cameron Grove Senior Communities. Our
Seniors deserve to enjoy their retirement, unburdened by extreme costs.
Angela will fight for them in the US Senate.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17708?t=1049&amount=25&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ][IMG]

Angela had a great time in La Plata meeting with folks to talk about what
we’re gonna get done together in the U.S. Senate. It is always so great to
be in Charles County. Thanks to Ed Holland for gathering an amazing group!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17708?t=1050&amount=25&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ][IMG]

Thank you to everyone who came to Waldorf for the first stop of our All in
for Angela Tour!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17708?t=1051&amount=25&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ][IMG]

Great to be in Greenbelt for our latest stop on the All in Angela Tour.
The support we’ve received from Prince Georgians has been incredible!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17708?t=1041&amount=25&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ][IMG]

It was amazing to have such a great crowd of students show up to hear
Angela’s vision for our state, at the University of Maryland in College
Park! She will fight to create economic opportunity for young people,
while fiercely defending our fundamental rights.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17708?t=1042&amount=25&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ][IMG]

UPCOMING EVENTS

Join us on our All in for Angela Tour at a stop near you! Come get
involved in our Get Out The Vote efforts!

Monday, April 15 (Columbia) – All in for Angela: Howard County – [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17578?t=1004&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]RSVP
Here

Saturday, April 20th (Towson) — All in for Angela: Baltimore County —
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17678?t=1005&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]RSVP Here

Sunday, April 21st — All in for Angela: Anne Arundel County — [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17706?t=1006&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]RSVP
Here

Wednesday, April 24th — All in for Angela: Silver Spring — [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17679?t=1007&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]RSVP Here

Friday, April 26th — All in for Angela: Southern Prince George’s County —
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17680?t=1008&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]RSVP Here

Saturday, April 27th – All in for Angela: Baltimore City — [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17681?t=1009&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]RSVP Here

Saturday, April 27th — All in for Angela: Gaithersburg — [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17682?t=1010&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]RSVP Here

IN THE NEWS

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17683?t=1011&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Endorsement Announcement: Progressive Neighbors

MSNBC:

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17684?t=1012&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Catch the clip of Angela on the Weekend on MSNBC

Fox5:

ICYMI Political Science scholar John Dedie shared on Fox5 that he is
betting on Angela Alsobrooks as the winner of this race. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17685?t=1013&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Watch it
here.

My MCM: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17686?t=1014&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Alsobrooks, Trone Agree to Televised Senate Democratic Primary
Forum

“Democratic Senate candidates Prince George’s County Executive Angela
Alsobrooks and Rep. David Trone are set to participate in the first
televised forum of the primary on April 19, after months of smaller
community candidate forums across the state.”

Baltimore Fishbowl: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17687?t=1015&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]With Trone absent, Alsobrooks makes her case to
take on Hogan in Maryland Senate race

WTOP News: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17688?t=1016&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]‘We got it all’: Why Prince George’s Co. leaders are
celebrating Maryland’s new state budget

“As a sometimes difficult negotiation in Annapolis culminated with a
compromise that didn’t require overtime, leaders from Prince George’s
County said the session ended with nearly every financial ask tucked into
the budget heading to Gov. Wes Moore’s desk.

‘I think we got it all,’ said County Executive Angela Alsobrooks, who
gathered with leaders from the county’s legislative delegation after the
session came to a close.

‘It is an astonishing number of successful outcomes that we’ve seen for
Prince George’s. This is a winning year in a really tough, tough economic
environment,’ Alsobrooks said.”

Maryland Matters: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17689?t=1017&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Dunn, Alsobrooks, Vogel touting fundraising numbers
ahead of deadline

“Meanwhile, in the hard-fought Democratic primary for U.S. Senate, Prince
George’s County Executive Angela Alsobrooks announced Tuesday that she
will report raising more than $2.1 million in the first quarter of 2024 —
a take her campaign is describing as the largest first quarter on-year
fundraising haul of any federal candidate in Maryland history; the
previous record was $1.8 million, the campaign said.”

ABC 7 News: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17690?t=1018&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Prince George's Co. secures $198M from state for health,
infrastructure needs

“Prince George’s County Executive Angela Alsobrooks Tuesday declared the
just-ended Maryland General Assembly session a good one for Prince
Georgians. She said the county achieved all of its goals for funding for a
long list of priorities

GET INVOLVED

We have about one month left to win this race! Vote-by-mail ballots have
already dropped. Early vote starts in less than three weeks. Now is the
time to lock-in and step up. Find ways to take action below:

* NEW Make Calls from Home: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17083?t=1019&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Sign up HERE

* Baltimore Office, 1833 Ashland Ave: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17691?t=1020&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Knock on Doors | [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17692?t=1021&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Make
Calls | [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17693?t=1022&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Text your Friends

* Largo Office, 1101 Mercantile Ln #100: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17694?t=1023&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Knock on Doors w/ Angela! |
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17695?t=1024&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ] Knock on Doors | [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17696?t=1025&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Make Calls | [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17697?t=1026&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Text your Friends

* Silver Spring Office, 8455 Colesville Rd: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17698?t=1027&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Knock on Doors |
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17699?t=1028&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Make Calls | [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17700?t=1029&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Text your Friends

* Towson Office, 32 West Rd: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17701?t=1030&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Knock on Doors!

* Brandywine Staging Location: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17702?t=1031&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Knock on Doors!

* Howard Staging Location: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17703?t=1032&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Knock on Doors!

We need to make sure we’re covering the polls for early vote! We are
close to hitting our recruitment goal for this week, but we still need
at least 67 more shifts. Sign up to work the polls at
[ http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15324?t=1033&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]angelaalsobrooks.com/earlyvote.
Mark your calendars — [ http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15406?t=1034&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]we need all hands on deck April 27th & 28th,
May 4th & 5th, and May 11th through 14th to Get Out The Vote! We need
as many folks as possible to come out to an office to knock on doors
and make calls. We can't leave any vote behind, so make sure you mark
your calendars and sign up TODAY!

[ https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/signup/volunteer-form?t=1035&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Volunteer

[ http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12166?t=1036&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Find Events Near You

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17708?t=1043&amount=25&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Donate

SOCIALS

While we'll keep sending emails to keep you updated, the best way to keep
up with Angela is on our social media channels. Follow us on Twitter,
Facebook, and Instagram to follow along with us on the campaign trail!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8814?t=1037&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Facebook

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8815?t=1038&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Twitter

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8816?t=1039&akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371 ]Instagram

Sincerely,

Team Alsobrooks

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1400%2E52803%2E22Z371

She will fight to create economic opportunity for young people, while fiercely defending our fundamental rights. [ ][IMG] UPCOMING EVENTS Join us on our All in for Angela Tour at a stop near you! Come get involved in our Get Out The Vote efforts! Monday, April 15 (Columbia) – All in for Angela: Howard County – [ ]RSVP Here Saturday, April 20th (Towson) — All in for Angela: Baltimore County — [ ]RSVP Here Sunday, April 21st — All in for Angela: Anne Arundel County — [ ]RSVP Here Wednesday, April 24th — All in for Angela: Silver Spring — [ ]RSVP Here Friday, April 26th — All in for Angela: Southern Prince George’s County — [ ]RSVP Here Saturday, April 27th – All in for Angela: Baltimore City — [ ]RSVP Here Saturday, April 27th — All in for Angela: Gaithersburg — [ ]RSVP Here IN THE NEWS [ ]Endorsement Announcement: Progressive Neighbors MSNBC: [ ]Catch the clip of Angela on the Weekend on MSNBC Fox5: ICYMI Political Science scholar John Dedie shared on Fox5 that he is betting on Angela Alsobrooks as the winner of this race. [ ]Watch it here. My MCM: [ ]Alsobrooks, Trone Agree to Televised Senate Democratic Primary Forum “Democratic Senate candidates Prince George’s County Executive Angela Alsobrooks and Rep. David Trone are set to participate in the first televised forum of the primary on April 19, after months of smaller community candidate forums across the state.” Baltimore Fishbowl: [ ]With Trone absent, Alsobrooks makes her case to take on Hogan in Maryland Senate race WTOP News: [ ]‘We got it all’: Why Prince George’s Co. leaders are celebrating Maryland’s new state budget “As a sometimes difficult negotiation in Annapolis culminated with a compromise that didn’t require overtime, leaders from Prince George’s County said the session ended with nearly every financial ask tucked into the budget heading to Gov. Wes Moore’s desk. ‘I think we got it all,’ said County Executive Angela Alsobrooks, who gathered with leaders from the county’s legislative delegation after the session came to a close. ‘It is an astonishing number of successful outcomes that we’ve seen for Prince George’s. This is a winning year in a really tough, tough economic environment,’ Alsobrooks said.” Maryland Matters: [ ]Dunn, Alsobrooks, Vogel touting fundraising numbers ahead of deadline “Meanwhile, in the hard-fought Democratic primary for U.S. Senate, Prince George’s County Executive Angela Alsobrooks announced Tuesday that she will report raising more than $2.1 million in the first quarter of 2024 — a take her campaign is describing as the largest first quarter on-year fundraising haul of any federal candidate in Maryland history; the previous record was $1.8 million, the campaign said.” ABC 7 News: [ ]Prince George's Co. secures $198M from state for health, infrastructure needs “Prince George’s County Executive Angela Alsobrooks Tuesday declared the just-ended Maryland General Assembly session a good one for Prince Georgians. She said the county achieved all of its goals for funding for a long list of priorities GET INVOLVED We have about one month left to win this race! Vote-by-mail ballots have already dropped. Early vote starts in less than three weeks. Now is the time to lock-in and step up. Brandywine Staging Location: [ ]Knock on Doors! * Howard Staging Location: [ ]Knock on Doors! We need to make sure we’re covering the polls for early vote! We are close to hitting our recruitment goal for this week, but we still need at least 67 more shifts. Sign up to work the polls at [ ]angelaalsobrooks.com/earlyvote. Mark your calendars — [ ]we need all hands on deck April 27th & 28th, May 4th & 5th, and May 11th through 14th to Get Out The Vote! We need as many folks as possible to come out to an office to knock on doors and make calls. We can't leave any vote behind, so make sure you mark your calendars and sign up TODAY! name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Roberts?=
subject: Capitol Report April 13, 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roberts for St
body:
Bill to defund Planned Parenthood moves closer to passage | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
April 13, 2024
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=cea79de495&e=a088917f89)
---
Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis urges Missouri voters to restore women's reproductive rights at the ballot box in November.
|
---
| **Contact Senator Roberts** 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329
Jefferson City, MO 65101
(573) 751-4415
Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov
---
| | | | | | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=66015a66b4&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=422a8e4111&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=2169fab207&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| **Bill to defund Planned Parenthood moves closer to passage**
Legislation seeking to block women’s health care provider Planned Parenthood from receiving reimbursements from the state’s Medicaid program could soon be headed to the governor after the Republican-controlled Missouri Senate overcame an 11-hour Democratic filibuster to bring the measure to a vote on April 10. It passed 23-10 along straight party lines.

The House of Representatives previously approved House Bill 2634 by a vote of 104-49 on March 4. However, because of Senate changes, the bill returns to House, which is expected to grant final passage to measure in its current form rather than seek to negotiate a compromise version that would require another Senate vote and potentially spark another filibuster.

Because abortion is illegal in Missouri in nearly all circumstances, none of Planned Parenthood’s Missouri clinics perform them and instead focus on other women’s health care services, including general care, cancer screenings and contraception. However, Republican lawmakers for years have unsuccessfully pushed to defund the organization’s Missouri operations since it still offers abortion in other states. Federal law has long prohibited Medicaid funds from paying for abortion services.

The Missouri Supreme Court twice in recent years has struck down efforts to defund Planned Parenthood through the state budget process. In both cases, the court cited longstanding precedent that budget bills must be limited to appropriating funding and cannot also set policy without violating a state constitutional prohibition against bills containing multiple subjects.

House Bill 2634 attempts to get around the constitutional impediment by creating a general statute purporting to prohibit Medicaid reimbursements to health care facilities affiliated with out-of-state abortion providers. Although critics say the bill violates federal requirements that states must allow willing providers of Medicaid-eligible services to participate in the program, the 8th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals recently upheld a similar Arkansas law.

---
|
---
| **House approves change that could weaken voter rights**
The Missouri House of Representatives on April 9 granted preliminary approval on a voice vote to Republican legislation that could drastically weaken the voting rights protections in the Missouri Constitution. A second, recorded vote is required to advance the measure to the Senate.

House Joint Resolution 104’s primary purpose is to constitutionally block efforts to adopt ranked-choice voting or other methods allowing voters to cast ballots for multiple candidates in a given race. However, an unrelated provision added as so-called “ballot candy” to entice voters into ratifying the underlying legislation could inadvertently lead to some U.S. citizens being legally disenfranchised in the future.

The state constitution currently guarantees voting rights to “all” U.S. citizens who are at least 18 years old, Missouri residents and registered to vote. HJR 104 would alter that provision to say “only” people who meet those requirements can vote. The measure’s sponsor says the intent is to prevent non-citizens from voting, which they already can’t do. However, that seemingly minor one-word change could have far reaching consequences by eliminating the constitution’s existing absolute guarantee of voting rights for citizens who meet the constitutional requirements and empower future lawmakers to enact laws excluding certain citizens from voting.

If approved by the legislature, HJR 104 automatically would go on the Nov. 5 statewide ballot for ratification. However, the Senate in previous years has failed to take up similar legislation approved by the House.
---
|
---
| **Senate passes bill to eliminate child marriage in Missouri**
Child marriage in Missouri would be completely outlawed under legislation that won first-round Senate approval on April 10. A second vote is required to advance the measure to the House of Representatives.

Until six years ago, Missouri allowed children as young as 15 to marry with parental permission, with even younger kids able to marry with judicial approval. As a result, the state had an unwelcome reputation as a haven for child marriage, often involving girls being wed to much older men.

Although lawmakers enacted legislation in 2018 raising the minimum marriage age to 16 and prohibiting adults age 21 or older from marrying children, some hardline conservatives have resisted banning child marriage entirely. Those hardliners, however, did not block the latest effort to eliminate child marriage, Senate Bill 767, from coming to a preliminary vote.
---
|
---
| **2024 SENATE BILLS**
[**SB 790**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=2889b01fbf&e=a088917f89) \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession of a firearm by a minor

[**SB 791**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=68745a1285&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to homelessness

[**SB 792**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=4624e8c8ba&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes the Revitalizing Missouri Downtowns and Main Streets Act

[**SB 883**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b84c3b7228&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions

[**SB 884**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=7bd83a7451&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to facilities of historic significance

[**SB 885**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=1cea1b0049&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to school board elections in urban and metropolitan school districts

[**SB 965**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=9d58e95d5d&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes a sales tax for special educational services

[**SB 966**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a13a1512c9&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes a property tax for special educational services

[**SB 967**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=2a2a784014&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the calculation of weighted average daily attendance used to calculate state aid for school districts

[**SB 1039**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=40ce91017b&e=a088917f89) \- Creates the Missouri Geospatial Advisory Council

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=21bedb1616&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.

If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a47d1c0972&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

You can also contact [ALIVE](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=f64110c6bb&e=a088917f89) at _314-993-2777_.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a8493e01e9&e=a088917f89).

clean_body: Bill to defund Planned Parenthood moves closer to passage | | | | | | | Capitol Report April 13, 2024 | | Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis urges Missouri voters to restore women's reproductive rights at the ballot box in November. | | Contact Senator Roberts 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | Bill to defund Planned Parenthood moves closer to passage Legislation seeking to block women’s health care provider Planned Parenthood from receiving reimbursements from the state’s Medicaid program could soon be headed to the governor after the Republican-controlled Missouri Senate overcame an 11-hour Democratic filibuster to bring the measure to a vote on April 10. It passed 23-10 along straight party lines. The House of Representatives previously approved House Bill 2634 by a vote of 104-49 on March 4. However, because of Senate changes, the bill returns to House, which is expected to grant final passage to measure in its current form rather than seek to negotiate a compromise version that would require another Senate vote and potentially spark another filibuster. Because abortion is illegal in Missouri in nearly all circumstances, none of Planned Parenthood’s Missouri clinics perform them and instead focus on other women’s health care services, including general care, cancer screenings and contraception. However, Republican lawmakers for years have unsuccessfully pushed to defund the organization’s Missouri operations since it still offers abortion in other states. Federal law has long prohibited Medicaid funds from paying for abortion services. The Missouri Supreme Court twice in recent years has struck down efforts to defund Planned Parenthood through the state budget process. In both cases, the court cited longstanding precedent that budget bills must be limited to appropriating funding and cannot also set policy without violating a state constitutional prohibition against bills containing multiple subjects. House Bill 2634 attempts to get around the constitutional impediment by creating a general statute purporting to prohibit Medicaid reimbursements to health care facilities affiliated with out-of-state abortion providers. Although critics say the bill violates federal requirements that states must allow willing providers of Medicaid-eligible services to participate in the program, the 8th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals recently upheld a similar Arkansas law. | | House approves change that could weaken voter rights The Missouri House of Representatives on April 9 granted preliminary approval on a voice vote to Republican legislation that could drastically weaken the voting rights protections in the Missouri Constitution. A second, recorded vote is required to advance the measure to the Senate. House Joint Resolution 104’s primary purpose is to constitutionally block efforts to adopt ranked-choice voting or other methods allowing voters to cast ballots for multiple candidates in a given race. However, an unrelated provision added as so-called “ballot candy” to entice voters into ratifying the underlying legislation could inadvertently lead to some U.S. citizens being legally disenfranchised in the future. The state constitution currently guarantees voting rights to “all” U.S. citizens who are at least 18 years old, Missouri residents and registered to vote. HJR 104 would alter that provision to say “only” people who meet those requirements can vote. The measure’s sponsor says the intent is to prevent non-citizens from voting, which they already can’t do. However, that seemingly minor one-word change could have far reaching consequences by eliminating the constitution’s existing absolute guarantee of voting rights for citizens who meet the constitutional requirements and empower future lawmakers to enact laws excluding certain citizens from voting. If approved by the legislature, HJR 104 automatically would go on the Nov. 5 statewide ballot for ratification. However, the Senate in previous years has failed to take up similar legislation approved by the House. | | Senate passes bill to eliminate child marriage in Missouri Child marriage in Missouri would be completely outlawed under legislation that won first-round Senate approval on April 10. A second vote is required to advance the measure to the House of Representatives. Until six years ago, Missouri allowed children as young as 15 to marry with parental permission, with even younger kids able to marry with judicial approval. As a result, the state had an unwelcome reputation as a haven for child marriage, often involving girls being wed to much older men. Although lawmakers enacted legislation in 2018 raising the minimum marriage age to 16 and prohibiting adults age 21 or older from marrying children, some hardline conservatives have resisted banning child marriage entirely. Those hardliners, however, did not block the latest effort to eliminate child marriage, Senate Bill 767, from coming to a preliminary vote. | | 2024 SENATE BILLS \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession of a firearm by a minor \- Modifies provisions relating to homelessness \- Establishes the Revitalizing Missouri Downtowns and Main Streets Act \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions \- Modifies provisions relating to facilities of historic significance \- Modifies provisions relating to school board elections in urban and metropolitan school districts \- Authorizes a sales tax for special educational services \- Authorizes a property tax for special educational services \- Modifies the calculation of weighted average daily attendance used to calculate state aid for school districts \- Creates the Missouri Geospatial Advisory Council \- Modifies provisions relating to legal representation for certain court proceedings involving children \- Modifies provisions relating to benevolent tax credits \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts \- Creates provisions relating to inmate phone call fees \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Repeals provisions relating to the caseload of public name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Election deniers aren’t going away – they’re doubling down
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friends,
This is an actual quote from a recent robocall that went out from the Republican National Committee to 145,000 voters across the country:
“We all know the problems. No photo IDs, unsecured ballot drop boxes, mass mailing of ballots, and voter rolls chock full of deceased people and non-citizens are just a few examples of the massive fraud that took place.”

Then, on Friday evening, the Speaker of the House made a pilgrimage to Mar-a-lago to renew their false claims, once again using the buzzword "election integrity." Election denial is the official position of the GOP. The sitting Speaker of the House, their Presidential nominee, and their national campaign committee are in lockstep. They have institutionalized a platform of false claims of voter fraud.
Why? Because they want to scare you. They want to diminish your confidence in valid election results so that they can try to block those valid election results if they don't like them. They aren't supporting "election integrity." They're promoting election malfeasance.

But here's the truth.

While democracy's opponents spew lies and propaganda, every professional election official across the country is continuing our work to make it easier to vote and harder to cheat, ensuring only those legally registered or voting and protecting the election process from bad actors, be they foreign or domestic.

My top priority as Michigan's Secretary of State and Chief Election Officer is to ensure that all citizens can participate in free, fair, and secure elections. We need to work together to ensure no matter who someone votes for or where they vote, that they can have rightly placed faith and confidence in their voice and in the vote.

In the months ahead, I encourage you to seek out trusted information from election officials and professional election administrators who only have your best interest in mind. Help us debunk misinformation, because that's how we will actually protect the integrity of our elections.

Democracy is a decision – and so is protecting it. Defending our democracy requires a shared commitment to do the hard work and call out the lies. That’s why I’m so grateful that so many of you have already stepped up to defend democracy, both here in Michigan and around the country.

Thank you for your continued support and all the work you do to defend our democracy.

-Jocelyn

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sosbenson?refcode=emfooter]

Detroit, MI 48221

The MAGA media has been playing by different rules. Their alternative facts have become America’s reality. They lie because they know they can get away with it. You know I never shy away from a fight when it comes to Donald Trump, the MAGA horde, rightwing haters, or defending the truth. **Taking the fight to the people trying to destroy American democracy is what we live and breathe.**

A little more than a year ago, Stuart Stevens, Joe Trippi, and I decided that we needed to slay another dragon: the right’s massive, toxic media machine. So, we launched Resolute Square, a growing community of creators, thinkers, strategists, and activists with one mission: to defend democracy when the old media models fail.

At Resolute Square, we’re taking the fight beyond the ballot box to where the autocrats are winning–the media landscape of America. We’re growing into a powerful media voice, dedicated to crushing the enemies of democracy like Ben Shapiro, Steve Bannon, Tucker Carlson, OANN, Fox News, and on and on.

We can’t depend on mainstream media to warn America of a second Trump term. They’re worried about being "fair and objective" instead of warning America of the danger to our republic if Donald Trump is re-elected.**That’s why we need a media platform like Resolute Square more than ever before.**

[We refuse to let a corrupt minority steal what it means to be an American. Every $15 donation allows us to reach over 1,000 Americans. clean_body: | = Dear Peter, The MAGA media has been playing by different rules. Their alternative facts have become America’s reality. They lie because they know they can get away with it. In 2020, we took on Trump and defeated him.Now, we have to take on the MAGA media. = | = You know I never shy away from a fight when it comes to Donald Trump, the MAGA horde, rightwing haters, or defending the truth. Taking the fight to the people trying to destroy American democracy is what we live and breathe. A little more than a year ago, Stuart Stevens, Joe Trippi, and I decided that we needed to slay another dragon: the right’s massive, toxic media machine. So, we launched Resolute Square, a growing community of creators, thinkers, strategists, and activists with one mission: to defend democracy when the old media models fail. At Resolute Square, we’re taking the fight beyond the ballot box to where the autocrats are winning–the media landscape of America. We’re growing into a powerful media voice, dedicated to crushing the enemies of democracy like Ben Shapiro, Steve Bannon, Tucker Carlson, OANN, Fox News, and on and on. We can’t depend on mainstream media to warn America of a second Trump term. They’re worried about being "fair and objective" instead of warning America of the danger to our republic if Donald Trump is re-elected.That’s why we need a media platform like Resolute Square more than ever before. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. = = = = Your support will help us capture millions of these voters in battleground states. It can never be too soon to start welcoming the disengaged into our community of democracy defenders, but it can become too late. Thank you, Rick ******** ****** ****** ****** ****** ******** Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Remember this? [](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtsWJ4oHmyX6l1dZXrMu59XkqaLmdnimuDefwh5_O-3pRQ7FPUM88aNfoHqddKjZv6QIvmYfagjJfTiqEXZA29aKlKmlldYqhjs0ZM3QL2lQOiH6dL20YekgL2iD-0Ob5H_78D8EQoGxgMM7imsqhgUjOXEO7AHArhG3h9kHkvtwoBImOLtlfPK64w69Mq5q9skMDgEN3I2oGMpkXXMypMa3NUqsSXR4meR3iLfMjZ8qi0QS5dKMHiFWjWrh15MYLHtEI2T0F6LE7YuotVFPRjda3ITKbSAnd9QCkoSaCT6H5uL6GncKt_YSeDh2PxocAKsg90JLW3cV_OymOPpcs3AISr9YCxtjFORtIAvroGWYTK5mogh-GXcMASzMdae05pBvJCvp8NJYDIakSy_HU3p3O9DLlF_Mw2A8ct5xVpeoYZVVdpxPO_Tb1PAIlUbPPJhBntyPSAIFkpI0jZ_15A3Q/45h/51WII7cOQaeuODLPp6DRrw/h0/h001.cqfTYa5D7xuO1IsQetfKX6emAMR0uUgZVDIpmuA-yCk) Remember that feeling you had in 2016 when Trump won the election? The fear, the confusion... wondering what was going to happen next. We can't go back, Derek. This November, control of the White House, the House, and the Senate are all up for grabs... and each of them is as close as they can be. As you consider the role you can play in making sure Democrats win all three -- know that there is no organization better suited to helping Democrats running everywhere than the DNC. But what you may not know is that almost all of our donations -- the donations we use to help build Party infrastructure and fund winning campaigns -- come from lots of people donating a few bucks at a time, often in response to emails like this. **So that means we have to ask -- to make sure we beat Trump and elect a Democratic House and Senate:** **[Can you please make a $7 donation directly to the DNC today? clean_body: Remember that feeling you had in 2016 when Trump won the election? The fear, the confusion... wondering what was going to happen next. | | Remember this? Remember that feeling you had in 2016 when Trump won the election? The fear, the confusion... wondering what was going to happen next. We can't go back, Derek. This November, control of the White House, the House, and the Senate are all up for grabs... and each of them is as close as they can be. As you consider the role you can play in making sure Democrats win all three -- know that there is no organization better suited to helping Democrats running everywhere than the DNC. But what you may not know is that almost all of our donations -- the donations we use to help build Party infrastructure and fund winning campaigns -- come from lots of people donating a few bucks at a time, often in response to emails like this. So that means we have to ask -- to make sure we beat Trump and elect a Democratic House and Senate: Thank you, The Democrats | | | | ---|---|--- Text JOIN to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: Chuck Schumer
subject: You stood out to me today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | It's Sen. Schumer.

I'm between meetings, so I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive Democratic memberships for April, and I need to make sure you activate your membership before the mid-month deadline.

If we want to save the Senate** _again_** this year, we need to begin laying the groundwork immediately. Voting rights, reproductive justice, President Biden's judicial nominees, and our ultra-slim Democratic majority are all on the line. We can't afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines!

**Your membership has never been more critical. Please, use this custom link to activate right now:**

**[www.dscc.org/202404members/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/17681?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240413-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortMembershipRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240413-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortMembershipRF-Pros-sl1&akid=14272%2E9716520%2EGY1Ta0)**

Thanks for taking action to activate your DSCC membership,

Chuck Schumer

name: Team Mazie
subject: First, Then, Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
We need to prepare for the dark money heading towards us

|
#
---
**FIRST:** The Supreme Court handed down its decision in _Citizens United_ , opening the floodgates for special interest money to influence our elections. **THEN:** GOP-connected mega-donors, billionaires, and fringe activist groups took advantage — spending hundreds of millions of dollars over the last decade to fund attack ads and smear campaigns targeting Democrats — and hand-picking candidates who would rubber stamp their extreme agenda. **NEXT:** In 2022, out-of-touch, mainland billionaires contributed to a record-breaking _$1.2 million in outside spending_ as part of a blatant attempt to buy a congressional seat in Hawaii. **NOW:** There’s no shortage of right-wing billionaires who are willing to spend whatever it takes to end Mazie’s fight for our working families, our freedoms, and our future — and they’ll spend even more if it gets them closer to a GOP Senate majority. [**Peter, pitch in $10 or any amount before Monday’s mid-month deadline to help us mount the grassroots response we need to fend off dark money spending, send Mazie back to the Senate, and preserve our Democratic Senate majority. name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: Join our Statewide Call Monday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It's Primary Month

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=1)
---
Saturday, April 13, 2024 | Peter --
### **April Statewide Call**
Please join us Monday April 15th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide Call. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/pa_fwd_april_statewide_meeting_20240415?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=2) Last month we introduced you to the Eric Settle and Chris Foster, the two candidates running as Forward Party candidates for statewide office. Please check out the [recording of that call](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfZCOhMXAoIZ4eUWR4XwHKI-&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=3) if you missed it. We've had some great events and exciting news since last month's call so if you're just tuning in to what we're doing in PA, this is a great time to get involved.
* * *
### What we'll be discussing
* Our candidate affiliates including our recent [event with Conner Schroy](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=v89J664D1zzFzOLfCLan25tvgv9YN-Hy0FdxUTk7N0RFytrXmRqt_HOBQGKU3vkswe8nWbr7ywAjjwIX1b1ZJIfYdhXRRwGqBO0YyW22csj5xsO12qNPxZzmM_89BqDIcajmm43YZDbPdznkXZxcF4Zy0Mg_B9X3KIGhfJFcwHc6ueOW42ktGEpduNOq9Y0L&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=4)
* PA Primaries 4/23
* Signature gathering to get our candidates on the ballot.
* recruiting more candidates.
* We have a [new website](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u6XwRhvsem01hvYMbSFzm2g&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=5).
* Save The Date: We're planning a convention for 6/1/24

It's certainly busy times and this is a great opportunity to hear from your fellow Pennsylvania Forwardists and help make the party you want to see. Hope to see you Monday. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/pa_fwd_april_statewide_meeting_20240415?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=6) Pennsylvania Forward Party
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=7)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=8)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=9)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=10)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=11) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=12) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=13) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=14) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_statewide_call_invite&n=15) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. body:
This could TOTALLY derail his re-election scheme
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21252%2E4449941%2EzmeoO3)
---
**This is Trump’s worst nightmare:** **IF** we can fund our ads about the dangers of the Electoral College, we can convince states around the country to adopt the popular vote!

**BUT IF** we can’t, the Electoral College could hand Trump another DISASTROUS presidency in November. _**NO!!**_

[**We’re practically begging: We need you to chip in $7 now to help fund our Abolish the Electoral College ads and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41975?t=7&akid=21252%2E4449941%2EzmeoO3) | [$6,400 GOAL: Chip in $7 now »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41975?t=8&akid=21252%2E4449941%2EzmeoO3)
---
* * *
**FACT:** In 2016, Donald Trump won the Presidency despite losing the popular vote – _this flies in the face of basic rules of Democracy!_

**FACT:** In 2020, Donald Trump LOST – the popular vote AND the Electoral College – and set his sights on overturning the election results.

**FACT:** Donald Trump is trying to coast into the presidency AGAIN using the Electoral College – **he could become president AGAIN without ever winning the popular vote!**

[**Trump has NEVER won the popular vote. Without the Electoral College, his re-election scheme will be TOTALLY derailed. Chip in $7 to help fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College and support our work before midnight tomorrow »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41975?t=9&akid=21252%2E4449941%2EzmeoO3)

body:

body:
I’m a straight shooter – always have been always will. You might not like what I have to say but I will never sugarcoat the truth. Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington. |
[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=28b75c587a904a40b6e21906e7b54258&_e=oD1eCTPUArTPOjyRDkFHmvuwu5cmouOpOvoG4FH_n13DGM9DfTNjLFUZBOxL-xj4RUBPlK5n1LkkIVulh14IiPoNHuzgklNmVaomhpRo8Q062zd7CGeMPZKxDahf_Epek-gxUtK7iTE1-BRf_6ChBNhGDc1DdgItEMBWPluzOfXRsxwgXr0tZyzrVZsubafQK2dejkARVQ_0A3c-GKEEDY07-iUQCpdnII2nEv4tHdLkinC34UGLJt5UZNvwt2rVW0_DhvYRGdScyNfj7DzXiJHGdKL3MjPLtOJe_SwP0pffr05pIm0R64XyDBe23spwyoT5QagW-dHjjGPrBdZCUJfb9uF8hw67LY0G5-vptw4O_NCcT6zIEWtGAIT3VInZCBPJxCSTSVQOeVMK57Ru_Z95sbQEMO9A4ataOF98aMg%3D)

Here’s the deal, Peter.

I’m a straight shooter – always have been always will. You might not like what I have to say but I will _never_ sugarcoat the truth. _Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington._

So, here’s the God-honest truth: **Republicans will lose in November if we don’t start acting like a team.**

**We’ll lose the House, and truly, I don’t think we can handle a single day of total Democrat control in Washington.**

What Democrats want to do to America is clinically insane – _they want to change our foundations, to make our country unrecognizable. They are wasting all of your hard-earned money to fund illegal immigrants, higher prices, defunding the police, forcing parents out of the classroom, and lining their own pockets._

You might be burnt out from the constant stream of news out of Washington, trust me I get it... but if you want things to actually change for the better, _**you have to pay attention.**_

[**We can’t sit back and take this way of life because if we do we’ll see Democrats take our country away.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=28b75c587a904a40b6e21906e7b54258&_e=oD1eCTPUArTPOjyRDkFHmvuwu5cmouOpOvoG4FH_n13DGM9DfTNjLFUZBOxL-xj4WTecW4fGT6dfubdrPNRBFkQFY2OP7Iiq5eCmjgVKM_-eXQk7ErrHsX_zSrmJABP5pcSncTwhTp0YVBpk_xYET2RNnae5M-GuyZ_ZWsjr3lElAG3kiMye6rf4VNjCRaFJp6GdVaijeT5MOmQYx_rJghyFfXxiWh-3H5eIGkcjPOLRInQ2dIcBxchJq10UR3RspFwulGfCo_ryS-NSWpqztIknoGLVjErrfss77JTuNZX_3yigecwQYmAKUpS2RXWsGV1bprvK268G6aw-niOOLZ1z4gqKYsXRyC1m3C4UrUwC3Rly1xBZtdQNRd9mQKyxOzKa3Pv6ULktE2Z6Ds5b_sLAGcPo76wcd7vDECOX7Vv6t7H-0VjxXD6gKkNYSgxd)

[**I need to know you’re on the team who still cares about freedom._I need to know you are on the team who’s willing to stand up and FIGHT back against the woke mob that is infecting our country._**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=28b75c587a904a40b6e21906e7b54258&_e=oD1eCTPUArTPOjyRDkFHmvuwu5cmouOpOvoG4FH_n13DGM9DfTNjLFUZBOxL-xj4WTecW4fGT6dfubdrPNRBFkQFY2OP7Iiq5eCmjgVKM_-eXQk7ErrHsX_zSrmJABP5pcSncTwhTp0YVBpk_xYET2RNnae5M-GuyZ_ZWsjr3lElAG3kiMye6rf4VNjCRaFJp6GdVaijeT5MOmQYx_rJghyFfXxiWh-3H5eIGkcjPOLRInQ2dIcBxchJq10UR3RspFwulGfCo_ryS-NSWpqztIknoGLVjErrfss77JTuNZXoW7IEoT-1JrotG7Tlnv9g6RJmXhAx_oKwSSphGp-CKmjVxOsUpwrxbkfIYY2mXZm--yDvXrPV59VAA29b3vSg-ByBp_qmZ-pTUDFXCBZiA7aWrc54ED4C1syDUEus5AaqkAm5sHaCVJsZIYdwaMMw)

[** JOIN THE TEAM ➞ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=28b75c587a904a40b6e21906e7b54258&_e=oD1eCTPUArTPOjyRDkFHmvuwu5cmouOpOvoG4FH_n13DGM9DfTNjLFUZBOxL-xj4WTecW4fGT6dfubdrPNRBFkQFY2OP7Iiq5eCmjgVKM_-eXQk7ErrHsX_zSrmJABP5pcSncTwhTp0YVBpk_xYET2RNnae5M-GuyZ_ZWsjr3lElAG3kiMye6rf4VNjCRaFJp6GdVaijeT5MOmQYx_rJghyFfXxiWh-3H5eIGkcjPOLRInQ2dIcBxchJq10UR3RspFwulGfCo_ryS-NSWpqztIknoGLVjErrfss77JTuNZX2BOguuTqu6_Mq3KpJAlHFL7eMphfSo9inBv5M9tJX1M5NZR61hwGjS-fUry52qwlm-WQE81Ojywj8-1FqzxzJa-899uuR70rC_VXd806unKKkV_EFEmZyptRp_kIAWfNkO25uKlRABXwg30GihAd-)
Think back on your life four years ago – were things better for you under President Trump? _Under a strong Republican majority in the House and the Senate?_

I can tell you for sure that it used to cost less to fill up my car with gas and eggs were 49% cheaper. I can tell you that I used to feel safe walking down the street knowing that our border was closed and there were police to protect me under Republican leadership.

[**We have to work together if we’re going to save our country.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=28b75c587a904a40b6e21906e7b54258&_e=oD1eCTPUArTPOjyRDkFHmvuwu5cmouOpOvoG4FH_n13DGM9DfTNjLFUZBOxL-xj4WTecW4fGT6dfubdrPNRBFkQFY2OP7Iiq5eCmjgVKM_-eXQk7ErrHsX_zSrmJABP5pcSncTwhTp0YVBpk_xYET2RNnae5M-GuyZ_ZWsjr3lElAG3kiMye6rf4VNjCRaFJp6GdVaijeT5MOmQYx_rJghyFfXxiWh-3H5eIGkcjPOLRInQ2dIcBxchJq10UR3RspFwulGfCo_ryS-NSWpqztIknoGLVjErrfss77JTuNZXpftNG7PL941vZIfl_1vtn2B8I0nGVb2ZFzGooCCnSwT2IA0EeyczkKha2aehZ1El9S1c346WgoTFkvMoE-N9-DTDiVCfWLO_5X23lacqS7UHdSxJqKEMPKnzdAwfCWHgGxQ6MCkL458CmA22SM-Ka)

[**Are you going to be on the winning side of freedom?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=28b75c587a904a40b6e21906e7b54258&_e=oD1eCTPUArTPOjyRDkFHmvuwu5cmouOpOvoG4FH_n13DGM9DfTNjLFUZBOxL-xj4WTecW4fGT6dfubdrPNRBFkQFY2OP7Iiq5eCmjgVKM_-eXQk7ErrHsX_zSrmJABP5pcSncTwhTp0YVBpk_xYET2RNnae5M-GuyZ_ZWsjr3lElAG3kiMye6rf4VNjCRaFJp6GdVaijeT5MOmQYx_rJghyFfXxiWh-3H5eIGkcjPOLRInQ2dIcBxchJq10UR3RspFwulGfCo_ryS-NSWpqztIknoGLVjErrfss77JTuNZU7PeooC5e3r_bMFU4ErWA7ufR0f089KW2owe7SoIMeD0wT9Y0Wy3Q3FtjD3Om9gfvCvp2cEUUCFHLZQI6WrBKQzXzZXahqkX-Kq7l49neBXQ_rL2BDdAgd7mgXp-Hd4WDOpz1O9aRS97dMbZZ9uS4j)

[** STEP UP ➞ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=28b75c587a904a40b6e21906e7b54258&_e=oD1eCTPUArTPOjyRDkFHmvuwu5cmouOpOvoG4FH_n13DGM9DfTNjLFUZBOxL-xj4WTecW4fGT6dfubdrPNRBFkQFY2OP7Iiq5eCmjgVKM_-eXQk7ErrHsX_zSrmJABP5pcSncTwhTp0YVBpk_xYET2RNnae5M-GuyZ_ZWsjr3lElAG3kiMye6rf4VNjCRaFJp6GdVaijeT5MOmQYx_rJghyFfXxiWh-3H5eIGkcjPOLRInQ2dIcBxchJq10UR3RspFwulGfCo_ryS-NSWpqztIknoGLVjErrfss77JTuNZUDbC75h3ZoscFI7yBQqqZ5f5Ej-ebuzT7-AlP35JClwKX2e5bNgvkQdzmQ1S3XH_BfvwsegqreTiBkDmaUwXT_F5A1npvlQbxghTq0wwZIqub6d9l2pcbbFL-MOSiiGpumyKZn3KL1GKLpa7pvjoV2)
I know things are tough right now. _Things will be even more tough if you do nothing._

[**Please help.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=28b75c587a904a40b6e21906e7b54258&_e=oD1eCTPUArTPOjyRDkFHmvuwu5cmouOpOvoG4FH_n13DGM9DfTNjLFUZBOxL-xj4WTecW4fGT6dfubdrPNRBFkQFY2OP7Iiq5eCmjgVKM_-eXQk7ErrHsX_zSrmJABP5pcSncTwhTp0YVBpk_xYET2RNnae5M-GuyZ_ZWsjr3lElAG3kiMye6rf4VNjCRaFJp6GdVaijeT5MOmQYx_rJghyFfXxiWh-3H5eIGkcjPOLRInQ2dIcBxchJq10UR3RspFwulGfCo_ryS-NSWpqztIknoGLVjErrfss77JTuNZU6GQ31ExZfu2rkHwink97xGJ6A18JZTDA-xeKmmOPPS_dVaMZz121_ZBQD47HQ16hV7RnjD1VVhsGqPp-GAu8oG4KlOUPfJLTsVd58ZXZRGUAG9X7Oeo7cah-1r19WU-e-lRH5i4kbE2ggJO5P_fy0)

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! clean_body: I’m a straight shooter – always have been always will. You might not like what I have to say but I will never sugarcoat the truth. Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington. | Here’s the deal, Peter. I’m a straight shooter – always have been always will. You might not like what I have to say but I will never sugarcoat the truth. Trust me, we deal with that enough in Washington. So, here’s the God-honest truth: Republicans will lose in November if we don’t start acting like a team. We’ll lose the House, and truly, I don’t think we can handle a single day of total Democrat control in Washington. What Democrats want to do to America is clinically insane – they want to change our foundations, to make our country unrecognizable. They are wasting all of your hard-earned money to fund illegal immigrants, higher prices, defunding the police, forcing parents out of the classroom, and lining their own pockets. You might be burnt out from the constant stream of news out of Washington, trust me I get it... but if you want things to actually change for the better, you have to pay attention. - Think back on your life four years ago – were things better for you under President Trump? Under a strong Republican majority in the House and the Senate? I can tell you for sure that it used to cost less to fill up my car with gas and eggs were 49% cheaper. I can tell you that I used to feel safe walking down the street knowing that our border was closed and there were police to protect me under Republican leadership. I know things are tough right now. Things will be even more tough if you do nothing. Gratefully, Nancy Mace P.S. I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute and the last dollar. So, if you only have a dollar to spare, please know how thankful I am for your support, and I hope to continue to make you proud in Congress. | | About Nancy Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. go.txting.io/mEWDMy | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress Nancy Mace for Congress | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186, Charleston, SC 29492

body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=88a0259142e546cc992d74957f518868&_e=HLA-dm-tadqlV_d1AcFOv9-kS-7N0P7MkB_kKDZZ9lSU2UYEmGT7CF9VTwouuXYPdhAGR1mji28buJ5shfdw7hAPlFJcFocPlreJN1FA4axPJsycHMUbh5wBpYZo7P-p2wxP60RYrb435TuI_OQMYA1D1McIfbM9lXC4t4EniNPAR7hruz-TCxvJrQEb1Yfz-UUGjnDEDnHLmA6R1wXnMoiwrs5tSWIg5diEmEac38CxBbKZBxRTbnSRQZtzmXkpeT95OGlRCHBQ9lreug0KqTBY9n7znztBg2G-W6NGhuM%3D)

| | Fellow Patriot,
---
You might know my husband Hung from his U.S. Senate campaign, and you might even have seen me out and about in our Commonwealth by his side!

But today, I want to take a moment to introduce myself personally, after all you've done for our family and our mission.

My name is April Cao, and besides being Hung's wife I'm an EMT, writer, and mother of five.

You see, my husband owes his life to this country. He and his family escaped communism in Vietnam. If it wasn't for the generosity of America, he might not be here today.

But he wasn't satisfied with just settling down in our country and fading into the background. For 25 years, he put his life on the line for America as a U.S. Navy Special Operations Officer.

_And now, even though his military career is over, he 's not done fighting for our country - and that's why he's running for U.S. Senate. _

**Hung isn 't a career politician like Joe Biden and Tim Kaine. He's a true American fighter, and he would do ANYTHING to help make our country stronger. **

**[Today, I'm reaching out to ask you to stand with my husband as he embarks on this incredible journey. Will you join our family to send this incredible man to the Senate today?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=88a0259142e546cc992d74957f518868&_e=HLA-dm-tadqlV_d1AcFOv9-kS-7N0P7MkB_kKDZZ9lSU2UYEmGT7CF9VTwouuXYPdhAGR1mji28buJ5shfdw7hAPlFJcFocPlreJN1FA4axPJsycHMUbh5wBpYZo7P-pyXhte1YYmd12qGPV30mfNH9aeR4T5uwV0EzAQO6I4FDC8UVKpfRhjF3WddYlcE0SXZBF-r_YCvN0OPtj952U4EmVfe6avbEkpuRu4HXCnTdR5Q8uz2PMPzTV1zqPNI7En82O1ulevWtoabBqcFIT3sI1L3osh6pt8oAw2fGgsrc%3D)**
---
[**JOIN TEAM CAO**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=88a0259142e546cc992d74957f518868&_e=HLA-dm-tadqlV_d1AcFOv9-kS-7N0P7MkB_kKDZZ9lSU2UYEmGT7CF9VTwouuXYPdhAGR1mji28buJ5shfdw7hAPlFJcFocPlreJN1FA4axPJsycHMUbh5wBpYZo7P-pI2x-dRKMTwf7IHOKsHsYCXzk7iMcHRtBF_CYmNGJaO-h_BaAh7QqTappeWp_utDJDMXQzhCbIkf0R8DcYfCg8OHA4QH6cjEVGv6SFbxoqhhUMuYScYYCxz-HxSvVWqpw6ZQgCpCvJFxHr4ej64vNHzbw-An8LCxZhFGD3s_5bl0%3D)
---
[**SEND HUNG TO THE SENATE**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=88a0259142e546cc992d74957f518868&_e=HLA-dm-tadqlV_d1AcFOv9-kS-7N0P7MkB_kKDZZ9lSU2UYEmGT7CF9VTwouuXYPdhAGR1mji28buJ5shfdw7hAPlFJcFocPlreJN1FA4axPJsycHMUbh5wBpYZo7P-p1kDit7NYV7haB_KaMZtvxN6CQKzNM32IGehwhVxOiheBJWYaUCOwkUK1Vj4N1MPuXVj8clZwqqC1rItGDNYhM4ARptHCesWXFODU1QnUXBK58m6_tQKiGRkXtYaik6y4V1GSTB9ocr6fZuyvwUtkgI8ga6blBJ_9J7L7Bz6BnCs%3D)
---
Hung is an amazing husband to me and father to our children. He truly puts himself last and others first in everything he does. That's what makes him such an incredible family man - and it's what will make him a great Senator.

I hope you'll join my family and me today on our mission to save our country from career politicians like Tim Kaine. I know your support means the world to Hung, and it means everything to me too.
---
Thank you, April Cao
---
Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134

Peter, during her time as vice president and throughout her long career in public service, Kamala Harris has been at the forefront of the fight for American families – **and been a powerful progressive champion.**
* In a first-of-its-kind gesture of support for reproductive rights, VP Harris visited an abortion clinic in Minnesota to express her outrage at the attacks on our reproductive freedoms.
* VP Harris recently unveiled **$20 billion** in green bank grants to fund clean energy projects nationwide. This is thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act – which she played an integral role in passing.
* And as a champion of progressive policies, she’s been a strong voice in the fight to defend voting rights, protect our environment, advocate for economic justice, and defend reproductive rights.

subject: This election is critical - I want you to know the facts.
body:
#AmnestyAyotte can't be trusted to fight for us in Concord.
| |
---
Derek, On the issue of amnesty, there’s very little daylight between Kelly’s votes and the positions of the two leading Democrats running for Governor in New Hampshire. We can’t trust someone who ran for the US Senate in 2010 as a conservative and then **voted with Obama over 260 times.** We can’t trust someone who **joined with all of the Democrats to give amnesty to millions of illegal immigrants.** **Let me be blunt - We can't trust Kelly Ayotte.** She didn't protect NH then, and we can't trust her to do it now. Amnesty Ayotte can't be trusted to fight for us in Concord. [**TO READ MORE ABOUT KELLY’S DECEPTION AND ACTIONS VISIT AmnestyAyotte.com**](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.)

Thanks, Tina = Hey, this isn't good: The Club for Growth, an influential conservative group that's backed Ted Cruz since his first election, just announced it will spend at least $10 MILLION to help Ted defeat Colin Allred. This $10 million is going to be spent on trying to spread false attacks about Colin across Texas – and if that's not bad enough, this is on top of the $46 million Ted has already raised. If we're going to combat these attacks and finally defeat Ted Cruz, we need to hit every single fundraising goal, including tonight’s midnight goal – and right now, we're still short. = | = Already, Ted Cruz has raised more money than any other Senate candidate in the country, and this race is shaping up to be the most expensive race in the country. With Ted Cruz pulling in this kind of money, we need every grassroots supporter to pitch in today if we want a good shot at giving Texans some real leadership for once. | | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=7a098df7dded4d7e97e8a3a1bb838942&_e=0dSeoOOui7QZ3SViUexvxbI08TsxLo3LUQGlzGdIx48Zw3lBKJupiKCuX0YgqXpvGtWIWWaRIjOURl179Rw2GjlyhWidfyU4grK--1AOygw5lJg0_bu4SY5SeMFcQE1G-okyMRkRMXihktZXiIOw9zecanS0OTnPZG-W3lSN3FBozyYWpcgw_ng2uMkAKvkQvHxqA-HlBhf2CRuzd-rTiBQS_Hl2iwxSvUz1CWwzEJq55ovexX-G_6W_rceSpA4QcqM8nK7fFcQZzCw-GUvEiX7pB3FkbbZ5QvIsbZet86mdx2gIvEXcaYiVZubqTUlmi4_FoyBe5u-SO7becrhPvJhxVyANWSJF-dwKQEvtHdDAiIu5BH-Y1ukoGnC9RWKpHFbqlZ2crmNatmAEKkRGNQ%3D%3D)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. clean_body: | | | | | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his ActBlue allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I must win this race. | | Sincerely, | | Steve Garvey #6 | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 |

Friend, the Equal Rights Amendment would legally end gender-based discrimination once and for all — allowing us to protect reproductive rights, enforce equal pay and so much more. And it has finally been ratified by the required 38 states.
But even though the vast majority of Americans support it, an arbitrary deadline is preventing us from adding this amendment to the Constitution. Kirsten's joint resolution would allow us to circumvent this deadline and _finally_ certify the ERA.
This is our best chance to stop the GOP's far-right attacks against women, restore reproductive freedom nationwide and defend our civil rights**. But the harsh reality is that we can't get this done if Democrats lose the Senate majority.**
Republican extremists in New York are emboldened like never before: In the 2022 midterms, they won enough House seats to flip the chamber RED. ** And now they're targeting Kirsten's seat to take back the Senate. **
Now, more than ever before, we need Kirsten's bold, relentless voice in the Senate to keep fighting for gender equality. clean_body: she's counting on your help | | | This is AMAZING news, friend: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a joint resolution to finally codify the Equal Rights Amendment into the Constitution after over 100 YEARS! = But Kirsten cannot pass this resolution without a strong Democratic Senate majority — and Republicans are targeting her seat for defeat! = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Friend, the Equal Rights Amendment would legally end gender-based discrimination once and for all — allowing us to protect reproductive rights, enforce equal pay and so much more. And it has finally been ratified by the required 38 states. But even though the vast majority of Americans support it, an arbitrary deadline is preventing us from adding this amendment to the Constitution. Kirsten's joint resolution would allow us to circumvent this deadline and finally certify the ERA. This is our best chance to stop the GOP's far-right attacks against women, restore reproductive freedom nationwide and defend our civil rights. But the harsh reality is that we can't get this done if Democrats lose the Senate majority. Republican extremists in New York are emboldened like never before: In the 2022 midterms, they won enough House seats to flip the chamber RED. And now they're targeting Kirsten's seat to take back the Senate. Now, more than ever before, we need Kirsten's bold, relentless voice in the Senate to keep fighting for gender equality. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 - and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: Peter, TODAY, Donald Trump is back in Pennsylvania for the THIRD time this year. It’s no secret that the path to both the Senate and the White House runs through Pennsylvania. That’s why Trump is doing everything in his power to flip this battleground red. If we’re going to protect women’s rights, workers’ rights, and the fate of our democracy, we need to do everything in our power to stop him. But we can only do that with your help. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. Thank you for your support — every dollar makes a difference in this battleground race! — Team Casey

name: American Update
subject: Lights Out: Biden Admin Targets Lightbulbs In Latest Appliance Crackdown
body:
And Biden Admin Jacks Up Costs For Oil And Gas On Public Lands

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c690857%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C0qlvwA6Ys8Ik5nUc8uupA&sysid=1 Lights Out: Biden Admin Targets Lightbulbs In Latest Appliance Crackdown

The Biden administration finalized energy efficiency regulations targeting light bulbs on Friday. The Department of Energy (DOE) announced the final rules for “general services lamps,” a category of products that includes light bulbs, to nudge the market to adopt more energy efficient models. The Biden administration, led chiefly by the DOE, has pushed similar regulations targeting a host of household appliances.

I'm getting ready to leave to attend the Trump Rally and **support President Trump** , but I wanted to share some exciting news!

**We just released our first TV ad highlighting my military experience and why I’m the best candidate to secure the border, strengthen our military, and Keep America Safe!**

"World on Fire"
| I’ve served in the military for more than 28 years as an Army infantry soldier and Air Force intelligence officer, including four combat zone deployments.

**And I learned that weakness sets the World on fire!**

I’m running for Congress because I believe that we need fewer career politicians and more experienced leaders to get our country back on track.

**For me to defeat Susan Wild and help President Trump secure our borders, strengthen our military, cut wasteful spending, and get our economy back in order, I need your help!**

Every contribution that you make goes directly towards keeping my TV ad on the air. _**Will you chip in now to help me take on Susan Wild and protect our safety and security?**_

We just released our first TV ad highlighting my military experience and why I’m the best candidate to secure the border, strengthen our military, and Keep America Safe! | "World on Fire" | I’ve served in the military for more than 28 years as an Army infantry soldier and Air Force intelligence officer, including four combat zone deployments. For me to defeat Susan Wild and help President Trump secure our borders, strengthen our military, cut wasteful spending, and get our economy back in order, I need your help! | | **We 're a paper that for nearly 200 years has borne the promise to "shine for all"** That means relentlessly seeking the truth for our readers and the public which we serve. Our aim is for every interaction with the Sun to inform, educate, inspire, and uplift our readers. Its editors are some of the smartest and fairest in the business.” | NEWT GINGIRCH⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐“The Sun is a paper that shines like a beacon amid a sea of lies and misinformation.” | | | | | | | We 're a paper that for nearly 200 years has borne the promise to "shine for all" That means relentlessly seeking the truth for our readers and the public which we serve. Other papers have come to prioritize other agendas, leading to a deliberate effort to downplay important stories of public interest. Our aim is for every interaction with the Sun to inform, educate, inspire, and uplift our readers. To do battle on their behalf to protect the "social freedom" that our republic is in danger of entirely losing. | | | | | | |

name: Marco Rubio
subject: A roll of aluminum foil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you.

**With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end?** If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time.

While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals.

I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me.

**And you know what?** If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - __one single dollar__ - we'd be able to hit all of our goals.
---

Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community.

**I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! [Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. _Democrats hope I give up on you and stop sending these emails.

They also hope you stop reading these emails.

They'd love it if we both give up on our conservative values altogether._

_**I won 't give up on you, and I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values either.**_ I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.

But if you think we need to get this country back on track and restore the American Dream, please donate whatever you can before midnight.
