name: Sherrod Brown
subject: personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65677?t=6&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4) Hi, friend: I’m personally asking if you’ll split a [$10 donation](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65678?t=7&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4) between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project today so I can reach my midnight fundraising goal.

I’m facing the toughest reelection battle of my life, and I’m up against my self-funding GOP opponent who is flooding this race with millions of his own money to defeat me.

To make matters worse, _CNN_ says I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and the latest polls show this race is neck and neck.

The truth is, I simply can’t win, and Democrats can’t defend our razor-thin Senate majority, without your support. [So I need to ask: Will you please split $10 or more between me and the Voter Protection Project now so I can win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65678?t=8&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65679?t=9&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65680?t=10&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65681?t=11&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65682?t=12&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65678?t=13&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4)
Thanks so much,

Sherrod
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13763%2E878179%2E7A9nr4)
---

name: Team Gallego
subject: Please: Hear us out for a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, this won’t be the first email you’ve opened from us. But we are hoping it might be the first email you make a donation to.
Here’s why:
After everything Kari Lake’s said and done, from the countless failed lawsuits targeting our elections, the baseless conspiracies and election denial, the support for one of the most extreme abortion bans in the nation, the lies, the attacks... Arizona is still one of the closest states in the nation.
You can check the polls — neck and neck.
She is raking in huge checks from elite Republican mega-donors and tons of smaller donations from the millions of MAGA-faithful followers she has all over the country.
We’re in the fight of our lives here.
And without your support, without your first donation, we might not have the resources we need to fight back and defeat her.
That’s the honest truth.
**So, to stop Senator Kari Lake from ever becoming a reality, we’re asking you to chip in $3.**
[CHIP IN $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240413-2-120&amount=3&t=1&akid=2202%2E734936%2E09J7AA)
**To help Ruben win and make sure we keep control in the Senate, we’re asking you to chip in $3.**
[CHIP IN $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240413-2-120&amount=3&t=2&akid=2202%2E734936%2E09J7AA)
**To defeat Donald Trump and stop the MAGA-right from taking back power, we’re asking you to chip in $3.**
[CHIP IN $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240413-2-120&amount=3&t=3&akid=2202%2E734936%2E09J7AA)
We need you with us, Peter. And we would not be asking if this were not so important.
Please chip in.
Thank you,
Team Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=2202_734936_09J7AA&akid=2202%2E734936%2E09J7AA)

Here’s why: After everything Kari Lake’s said and done, from the countless failed lawsuits targeting our elections, the baseless conspiracies and election denial, the support for one of the most extreme abortion bans in the nation, the lies, the attacks... Arizona is still one of the closest states in the nation. You can check the polls — neck and neck. She is raking in huge checks from elite Republican mega-donors and tons of smaller donations from the millions of MAGA-faithful followers she has all over the country. We’re in the fight of our lives here. And without your support, without your first donation, we might not have the resources we need to fight back and defeat her. That’s the honest truth. So, to stop Senator Kari Lake from ever becoming a reality, we’re asking you to chip in $3. To help Ruben win and make sure we keep control in the Senate, we’re asking you to chip in $3. To defeat Donald Trump and stop the MAGA-right from taking back power, we’re asking you to chip in $3. We need you with us, Peter. And we would not be asking if this were not so important. Please chip in. Thank you, Team Gallego Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: we need to team up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
This weekend, my entire staff and I are attending the Rural Summit organized by the Michigan Democratic Party's Rural Caucus. These are my takeaways...
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Civil%20War%20%281%29.png]
Your donations are helping me become the best candidate I can be and to better-represent rural voters when I get to Congress. Thank you.
If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
RUSH $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
RUSH $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
RUSH $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTIRBUTE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
Friends,
Beyond just an opportunity to engage with power players, this summit is an incredible opportunity to learn .
I am attending breakout sessions to interact with experts on topics such as environmental protection, DEI, engaging youth voters, campaigning on a grassroots budget, labor organizing, and safe-guarding our democracy.
This summit has helped me develop good policies with labor, tribal, environmental, and economic leaders that help keep our campaign the strongest, most viable, and electable Democratic campaign for MI01, so we can expel Trumpism from rural Michigan for good.
To feel the support here for my second run for Congress is humbling, and I couldn't do it without you.
After several conversations with down-ballot candidates, it's clear; We need to team up. We need to work together.
That's why I'm committed to helping quality candidates in their elections district-wide, from school boards to county commissions.
Not to mention — my success in the General Election helps our Senator candidates and President Biden keep Michigan blue.
I would be honored to have you in my corner, too. Together, we can ensure rural voices are heard loud and clear.
Thank you for considering a contribution.
Onward,
Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: No other choice...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
this is not the email I wanted to write, friend
| | |
---
Hello, friend – it’s Sherrod.
This isn't the email I wanted to write, but I really have no other choice. Unfortunately, **a recent poll shows me neck and neck with my millionaire GOP opponents.**

We’ve got just over two months until the June 25 primary election and we’ve got doors to knock, calls to make, texts to send, and ads to run. The ads part of all this is the most expensive aspect, and we need to run as many ads as possible to reach every primary voter in the district. So our team is setting a $10,000 fundraising goal to make sure we can run ads through the primary. We need to get there by Tuesday night. subject: POLL: Kennedy Leads Over Biden and Trump!

body:
RFK Jr. stands as a beacon of hope for a better tomorrow.

Dear Peter,
Clearly, the voting population is tired of the bankrupt two-party system, and millions are declaring their independence.
According to a new Fox News poll, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s independent message is resonating with voters, resulting in higher favorability numbers than President Joe Biden and Donald Trump!
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfkjr_leading_4_13_24_nd1&n=3)
In addition, a recent CNN shows Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is at 18% nationally, making him the most popular independent presidential candidate in modern history.
Kennedy embodies the spirit of courage, compassion, and unwavering commitment to equal justice under the law that has defined our nation's greatest leaders.
With a legacy deeply rooted in the pursuit of equality and opportunity for all, RFK Jr. stands as a beacon of hope for a better tomorrow.
From a lifetime of advocating for environmental sustainability, civil rights, medical freedom, and fair economic policy, Kennedy is committed to fighting for the American Values that unite all of us.
This moment is pivotal. With the DNC's playbook exposed, it's more evident than ever that RFK Jr. is the leader America needs — _one who can truly win in November and bring about the healing and transformation our country cries out for._
But we cannot do this alone. We need your support to turn our vision into reality.

[Please support Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s campaign and help Team Kennedy keep the momentum going.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfkjr_leading_4_13_24_nd1&n=10)
Not only do we have expensive security costs, but we also need to spend more than $15 million to obtain ballot access in all 50 states and the District of Columbia.
The political establishment is committed to stopping Kennedy’s name from appearing on the ballot. [We need you to make sure they do not succeed.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfkjr_leading_4_13_24_nd1&n=11)

name: Dave Reichert
subject: A Leader who will support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by We Stand With Dave Reichert (R)
body:
It’s time for change

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=933e133ef8a143d6aed1c8d86c967aef&_e=HKYHO4tB9Thfn_KT0eGDu57g23RUZsyNXEyyIpKVPasUQro_4YG75EKTPEf2KCUDodPMyt4tSkWzIMNa9RmzAXwM7xgJC-OVqAFTxKxprDMBxp-34Eo_d4WagA-aNntPhqnyzH7ANIXP74aAa7eKhF6Mib-dhPkQsloigFJ0NqoOXX8zhg_lDL7wWP4CtUo-JhJtVGWArP_y3qldcBhmSp_ga9aI_7rmoF-MV57l0VtT4-SDltHAc_5u0yowt0mK2I8VL6itSnB9qqxozQuke4uhlQFKxPjDRPUZqV98Xcop20A9LG3neQzyT7TxdkmjLZSmZ1FkF6jWKxaa-bCewhOo_HflBlqB7EptXvHY8yH0G-tjKjlOVrl1TWQvl3gfIAsW3Crhlg3KbEFN7IR3vw%3D%3D)
---
Friend, Americans deserve leaders who will support citizens and help get America back on track.

_**Washingtonians are suffering from high prices and high rates of crime. It’s time we rein in the high cost of living in our state and restore public safety.**_
| [**RESTORE WASHINGTON**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=933e133ef8a143d6aed1c8d86c967aef&_e=HKYHO4tB9Thfn_KT0eGDu57g23RUZsyNXEyyIpKVPasUQro_4YG75EKTPEf2KCUDodPMyt4tSkWzIMNa9RmzAXwM7xgJC-OVqAFTxKxprDMBxp-34Eo_d4WagA-aNntPhqnyzH7ANIXP74aAa7eKhF6Mib-dhPkQsloigFJ0NqoOXX8zhg_lDL7wWP4CtUo-JhJtVGWArP_y3qldcBhmSgdcN9DK5rie0OmPZHXrQDYc41osq3B7dbgjX2GkFdQQHEgMWN0NhR3EzzGccpNOQJD7ETqGWrOuco17fQLZtGzqeWxOOz85KGauHPtJH2xj_olRGIpgiE-8DQb0Lbj5v123jNDr7XYDrPEEcOjOlcScS6T5coE3XAQxvlee_p3M1iqBeqqmMaPQQ-aoxglSDw%3D%3D)
---
[**BRING DOWN INFLATION**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=933e133ef8a143d6aed1c8d86c967aef&_e=HKYHO4tB9Thfn_KT0eGDu57g23RUZsyNXEyyIpKVPasUQro_4YG75EKTPEf2KCUDodPMyt4tSkWzIMNa9RmzAXwM7xgJC-OVqAFTxKxprDMBxp-34Eo_d4WagA-aNntPhqnyzH7ANIXP74aAa7eKhF6Mib-dhPkQsloigFJ0NqoOXX8zhg_lDL7wWP4CtUo-JhJtVGWArP_y3qldcBhmSgdcN9DK5rie0OmPZHXrQDYc41osq3B7dbgjX2GkFdQQuPc3dQ_zp0b3BUAhoVfctJgJGJ1q9d2RrbxSjoUYB09TM5StcFlMs3_JG_nTARWmMWYuRCCyLFo91mIM5Dwmv18Ghgk8ph0pSQghqbCnTYM5ZSkFg0RC1zJHWN5ALY-K5Xj4N2BDtOVxmxf-VMuzKA%3D%3D)
---
[**RESTORE PUBLIC SAFETY**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=933e133ef8a143d6aed1c8d86c967aef&_e=HKYHO4tB9Thfn_KT0eGDu57g23RUZsyNXEyyIpKVPasUQro_4YG75EKTPEf2KCUDodPMyt4tSkWzIMNa9RmzAXwM7xgJC-OVqAFTxKxprDMBxp-34Eo_d4WagA-aNntPhqnyzH7ANIXP74aAa7eKhF6Mib-dhPkQsloigFJ0NqoOXX8zhg_lDL7wWP4CtUo-JhJtVGWArP_y3qldcBhmSgdcN9DK5rie0OmPZHXrQDYc41osq3B7dbgjX2GkFdQQlv07tbS-qH5AVzbIrthy-WqZjgk3PhAlQjc-5q0orJRDrpEk1GtlPZlhzDgHmsChSYTMK1PSUct7nD2mhmiDepacLiRlxraeI2oZ-C1Z7n_1W7UCO3BBOv7Dq6rzFKng4EdzkSEtKamhtg5F5sXX3g%3D%3D)
---

This means we have to _**ACT NOW**_ to support law enforcement, stop new taxes, and repeal regressive taxes. The Democrats are no friend to your wallet or safety. They have repeatedly undermined public safety and raised your taxes even further.

[**MAKE WASHINGTON SAFE**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=933e133ef8a143d6aed1c8d86c967aef&_e=HKYHO4tB9Thfn_KT0eGDu57g23RUZsyNXEyyIpKVPasUQro_4YG75EKTPEf2KCUDodPMyt4tSkWzIMNa9RmzAXwM7xgJC-OVqAFTxKxprDMBxp-34Eo_d4WagA-aNntPhqnyzH7ANIXP74aAa7eKhF6Mib-dhPkQsloigFJ0NqoOXX8zhg_lDL7wWP4CtUo-JhJtVGWArP_y3qldcBhmSgdcN9DK5rie0OmPZHXrQDYc41osq3B7dbgjX2GkFdQQUC8guS2dRloG9DWUt4U-vVvU-qzVP1ZlaNFo4VdwrZMauHfDzHguZ3bwAmol9ZK68N3OKAUbAOJLT321yP66H44HnORIyIh0setmjT4nCacjMLCp68zNE_TKOxFlb6YbOS-gigGQyG0p7FtjupDxHA%3D%3D)
---

---

Washington needs a leader who will fight to protect citizens. Washingtonians have been left in the dust for too many years. I’m ready to work together and help the people of Washington reach greatness.

**Together, we’ll change what’s wrong, fix what’s broken, and do what’s right.**
We still have time to save our Great State from the despair of the Democrats. **[I’m kindly asking you to pitch in anything you can to help us save citizens from suffering any longer.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=933e133ef8a143d6aed1c8d86c967aef&_e=HKYHO4tB9Thfn_KT0eGDu57g23RUZsyNXEyyIpKVPasUQro_4YG75EKTPEf2KCUDodPMyt4tSkWzIMNa9RmzAXwM7xgJC-OVqAFTxKxprDMBxp-34Eo_d4WagA-aNntPhqnyzH7ANIXP74aAa7eKhF6Mib-dhPkQsloigFJ0NqoOXX8zhg_lDL7wWP4CtUo-JhJtVGWArP_y3qldcBhmSp_ga9aI_7rmoF-MV57l0VtT4-SDltHAc_5u0yowt0mKdQf7EBkhYamiAfcYVO-2qqt7OTD3r5Qp5virt63NIqk1jKQ2DUpZ4wZUlDsKVMVO1_I8vvMmUKUdmdtKB8ZxoukAaiN8v0UbM2b8001NvFn4sRYXQPyl3MAHD0Z6iLCga6Z49eJHjGv9lHAaP0MVsA%3D%3D)**

Thank you for taking the despair of our State seriously. I can’t do this without you, and I know I’m ready to fight, but are you?

[**JOIN TEAM REICHERT**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=933e133ef8a143d6aed1c8d86c967aef&_e=HKYHO4tB9Thfn_KT0eGDu57g23RUZsyNXEyyIpKVPasUQro_4YG75EKTPEf2KCUDodPMyt4tSkWzIMNa9RmzAXwM7xgJC-OVqAFTxKxprDMBxp-34Eo_d4WagA-aNntPhqnyzH7ANIXP74aAa7eKhF6Mib-dhPkQsloigFJ0NqoOXX8zhg_lDL7wWP4CtUo-JhJtVGWArP_y3qldcBhmSgdcN9DK5rie0OmPZHXrQDYc41osq3B7dbgjX2GkFdQQr2MFtIFen0oyjYTeDlqQ4Ti8hK5ePOACINthYmlPst1AG9hHKpdfbQydPkTj5DUMhI5UZ_1VEwHC6Jt3pfzu1Jke8Icde0hRQKrcOEYO5j3BwXa3WyaW7WoewuzjxkW6wfu2GYg4pt4jXOPo3At8vQ%3D%3D)

Thank you for your support,
Dave Reichert

name: Wisconsin Senate Update
subject: What CNN just said about this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Wisconsin’s Senate seat is one of the Top 10 most likely to flip.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2397%2E35263%2EoYDHQP)
Peter — _CNN_ just updated their rankings of the Top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip this November, and Wisconsin is on the list. **[Will you rush an urgent donation to help Tammy Baldwin keep this seat blue and defend our Senate majority?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240413_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2397%2E35263%2EoYDHQP)** | | [FIGHT BACK →](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240413_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2397%2E35263%2EoYDHQP)
---
Elections experts at _CNN_ and _The Hill_ agree that Tammy is one of the most vulnerable Senators up for reelection this year.
And on top of that, _Politico_ just reported that Wisconsin _“is rapidly becoming one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races of this campaign cycle.”_
The rest of the country is waking up to the reality we’ve been warning about for months now — **Wisconsin’s neck-and-neck Senate race could determine which party controls the Senate.**
Republicans spent $77 million to win our state’s other Senate seat by 1% of the vote in 2022. They’re on pace to spend _even more_ this time around, fueled by Eric Hovde’s $20 million self-funded war chest.
Fighting back against our Republican opponent and winning this race is going to require sustained grassroots support from folks like you.
**[Will you rush in a contribution today to help us keep Wisconsin and our Senate majority blue?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240413_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2397%2E35263%2EoYDHQP)**

name: Rick Scott
subject: I’m done with the lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

I’m sick and tired of all the lies coming from politicians in Washington.

That’s why I’m going to tell you the truth right now even though it isn’t pretty - **_[I need your help.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=efb93b68191141ddb7a7ceea807a5757&_e=Kt1maV2aaBL2H-4oh0ETAL-wMyOX4FFl-JaB_TnSGQdOH9bk-oHkhOCS1i2maFWInj_VEUOYtX4V6ykQuCJFtALx-TprWFMt7P8OhtOeRTtLPPDfIZ70uwtHKhbtm9N1oUWLXV9ruB291E6_iil-HWaMrYMMhflIofzmgi5ocImrInFE5_5bgi9YhTMfP_KLWOib9c6iOpfDcRblF7qKQxcHDVSX1bg55fOcHD8oFTq0BOk1cD7arPlCL8jdT6vQg3ooZNgAlj-gAL-mvyeu044ioiEGgRHnS7mdkbxAkuuPuDbo3s4Rg0OLv8btef_xcrdVhoay-ve2FHYvl3JsjoJrNTPR1yq2uSo-byUPFYc%3D) _**

Peter, this is Senator Rick Scott.

**The Democrats have announced Florida as a top target in 2024.**

They’re going to spend tens of millions to try and defeat me, and right now, we need your help to stop them.

**_[Our mid-month deadline is in just two days, and we can’t afford to fall behind at such a critical moment.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=efb93b68191141ddb7a7ceea807a5757&_e=Kt1maV2aaBL2H-4oh0ETAL-wMyOX4FFl-JaB_TnSGQdOH9bk-oHkhOCS1i2maFWInj_VEUOYtX4V6ykQuCJFtALx-TprWFMt7P8OhtOeRTtLPPDfIZ70uwtHKhbtm9N1oUWLXV9ruB291E6_iil-HWaMrYMMhflIofzmgi5ocImrInFE5_5bgi9YhTMfP_KLWOib9c6iOpfDcRblF7qKQzMFjtyWox8G80AdqH0XD9HCWr-SZuSNkTVzamAsAFW-sTIAQ9EHj3tSEd8JsBePxLhjuBQxhdndZCFkkta0K_CunLV91--MnEOwQEB-6M3NTIIJG_K_ZwFfD0sZnVld0D08Y6l9_FhgTIE6kfbEvhg%3D)_**

---
[**STAND WITH SEN. SCOTT**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=efb93b68191141ddb7a7ceea807a5757&_e=Kt1maV2aaBL2H-4oh0ETAL-wMyOX4FFl-JaB_TnSGQdOH9bk-oHkhOCS1i2maFWInj_VEUOYtX4V6ykQuCJFtALx-TprWFMt7P8OhtOeRTtLPPDfIZ70uwtHKhbtm9N1oUWLXV9ruB291E6_iil-HWaMrYMMhflIofzmgi5ocImrInFE5_5bgi9YhTMfP_KLWOib9c6iOpfDcRblF7qKQyQFn18mqHNK9FMQHPQyA2oJwOyMcJ_DjcmLfnYB4wGfjSdg62TwJJNX76JfKQYI0ceaTihbVApGwlaUWHWLn83o00ipGIHAhkgqB7iuc1AxxfK-SWhX4MGuWY87wNoERMuB2Ucf8A-7guK6QiX-VyA%3D)
---
Look, I know you get a lot of emails asking for money, but I’m not lying when I tell you that everything is on the line.

**Democrats want to make us a lawless country where woke DEI replaces merit and hard work. They want to prosecute President Trump and silence every Republican from top to bottom.**

And if we miss this deadline and lose my Florida Senate seat, Biden and Schumer will have a liberal voice in Washington to continue their agenda.

**[I’m facing one of my most important deadlines yet, and I’m hoping to see your name as a supporter in our fight to RESCUE AMERICA.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=efb93b68191141ddb7a7ceea807a5757&_e=Kt1maV2aaBL2H-4oh0ETAL-wMyOX4FFl-JaB_TnSGQdOH9bk-oHkhOCS1i2maFWInj_VEUOYtX4V6ykQuCJFtALx-TprWFMt7P8OhtOeRTtLPPDfIZ70uwtHKhbtm9N1oUWLXV9ruB291E6_iil-HWaMrYMMhflIofzmgi5ocImrInFE5_5bgi9YhTMfP_KLWOib9c6iOpfDcRblF7qKQxQWmArjPCS80mYl1HZxNkYMOAXWRdfolfX03-nifwTxWe48e3idwtmHtJ-F6qQ_w3PjKip1X9pJfLRhFIwtjugWfNVkiKDbERxLaGONCIyg63W69bBNCcc1luwLKVwt0i9rcWWWjyOWCkvLk1PW3p0%3D)**

---
[**STAND WITH SEN. SCOTT**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=efb93b68191141ddb7a7ceea807a5757&_e=Kt1maV2aaBL2H-4oh0ETAL-wMyOX4FFl-JaB_TnSGQdOH9bk-oHkhOCS1i2maFWInj_VEUOYtX4V6ykQuCJFtALx-TprWFMt7P8OhtOeRTtLPPDfIZ70uwtHKhbtm9N1oUWLXV9ruB291E6_iil-HWaMrYMMhflIofzmgi5ocImrInFE5_5bgi9YhTMfP_KLWOib9c6iOpfDcRblF7qKQ_K2HSg80UY69etQBxNRWFXLotBvsq815--_JZt37ULrUZED0C0MsxBjh-_QnDI5mWvmcWbokLa-eGkv-Wdj36nOfoduUB4svORq0Kh16cKLJ288_dncvf5Riu8VUeR3BUqqOgNWRqkcznJqUn2TPTI%3D)

| | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8225f43df1d442a8a8e1764f1145ce9f&_e=4Ct544LsfChPLD4rPXrHA3cOihaY61MzpQpmn1YsSFhG1bwFCCN2t6zYIlVCRDbFKb3ZBWv-Gmnih15TPKfv_9eGzTs7gY1Nw4FMFQUPGe5777fCIG6EQukuo66RRBzcZezIJCFGBX5lSaaJilY8X3uwKnbicgP3zgg7Z0YaYOoS3eZvqe-ztvHDiaB10if8C75kZyLxzf6vG1Td-fbZ_f5S6SmkZx-TnVuIuZCRUDLDnpX9plHaOEtM2BGNkGRrIYbxcOobmYU6RNVc5_dcF82OmwJjAXmSro9efcqQCpOq0XhgDjdOFJPpRZTZ6WPKdI4yWGvzPJS2octPhu2n4fhMQhIkts2vMrOWjDUmM6VXUmYy_uRhLENQLekmF9itbdUP242xfmkypDedgqHrWg%3D%3D)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8225f43df1d442a8a8e1764f1145ce9f&_e=4Ct544LsfChPLD4rPXrHA3cOihaY61MzpQpmn1YsSFhG1bwFCCN2t6zYIlVCRDbFKb3ZBWv-Gmnih15TPKfv_9eGzTs7gY1Nw4FMFQUPGe5777fCIG6EQukuo66RRBzcZezIJCFGBX5lSaaJilY8X3uwKnbicgP3zgg7Z0YaYOoS3eZvqe-ztvHDiaB10if8C75kZyLxzf6vG1Td-fbZ_f5S6SmkZx-TnVuIuZCRUDJpXOHpJ2INNR7YjOr69w2s745tZXF0akyDr_Fy3MD6eALdfRJ7bqlMXjcMr7QI2ozNpZIMa_-9di2RdJTtr9dAZoJWVwz27GVXQ4pjSWMkqP3Fvrcq2o3x-0b5v90Pi5ub74tURiWkAZyo-9xlRhB64RJy7ZX9Wan5n9tJcsRlAQ%3D%3D) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!
---

subject: Too many schools are forced to do this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children Growth Fund
body:
Did you know that nearly 100 Catholic schools...| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this **[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=0b9948ff709f4c418765764c21466cae&_t=JAiDRGgJVIYoi6b-7gNwf_PAFd7dqMDaiptxXWfCtsCWqtxp7xisbf26Hy9uusdPuuAPbg5LljmZXY1olEETYt7MBSQiro5bEBjudSGSlTE%3D)**
---
| | **“We’re closing our doors... for good.”** Peter, did you know that **nearly 100 Catholic schools across America** are forced to say those dreaded words every year? We believe every family deserves the freedom to choose where and how their children are educated –– **_and that’s why we’re working to keep Catholic schools open_** _. _
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION: KEEP CATHOLIC SCHOOLS OPEN**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0b9948ff709f4c418765764c21466cae&_e=foEWOTBVHMh7CG-MdJv34YgNr3D3h0ULZ_y2FCGfdz0DJ_nPHQnLN9azqIwG9qrzWDfkiTdfR0Gnlvwk8pWNWSek1-BXlIu3VALFkSteLxeRgCNsrrdWfSum7ezbX-8AQt3_kslorh1e-DSmrvEHnot0L7mt4AI5ScXMRcZhO52AuL1Of7zrDjI2oT1BOn55PqG98ivqOh4vOypGUlfg7Xfk6wlIhm2r7qN-Q4vnpxWK1fzZyNsbP_NLAb6FX78WE_G1v-DBCvFrycBCn1-TWmkDk5eFvvH1GTaokw7d8iKjtoPrH05wgNrcXYAZ28qtGKoNHoHbvB2En1MZjSHjJyMYj3haant-2GrT9FGUai1C15jmuUCpDNAWXTqMDq8XyTuYK9dg7h9uCjeJNfnc8CG_MuWn9_FPYThySrcMDpW4PbRxe_BW4G2AaaHwDLyw8lcHOukaEcDKiRMNBarPWAhqBaQSOwSigAhfycen65k%3D)
---
Right now, 1.6 million American children are enrolled in Catholic schools, but the school system they love is under threat of extinction –– **especially** in states that don’t allow taxpayers to direct education tax dollars to private schools.

For many families, their local Catholic school is the only available alternative to the public school system. **And if their school closes, their access to school choice can disappear overnight.**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION: SAVE CATHOLIC SCHOOLS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0b9948ff709f4c418765764c21466cae&_e=foEWOTBVHMh7CG-MdJv34YgNr3D3h0ULZ_y2FCGfdz0DJ_nPHQnLN9azqIwG9qrzWDfkiTdfR0Gnlvwk8pWNWSek1-BXlIu3VALFkSteLxeRgCNsrrdWfSum7ezbX-8AQt3_kslorh1e-DSmrvEHnot0L7mt4AI5ScXMRcZhO52AuL1Of7zrDjI2oT1BOn55PqG98ivqOh4vOypGUlfg7Xfk6wlIhm2r7qN-Q4vnpxWK1fzZyNsbP_NLAb6FX78WE_G1v-DBCvFrycBCn1-TWmkDk5eFvvH1GTaokw7d8iKjtoPrH05wgNrcXYAZ28qtGKoNHoHbvB2En1MZjSHjJ3NnkibodAk2W4Q9Em7i4knLp3Bcw8oR93H7XeC1mfQfLTQFJzra3wH3CkJDBNZqh5K390dssVVrFLvpad7rie6LXHF6U4Iii0bkGFaAa6qRido10ncYDfwAGwgbyxaJ0FLoQDqOJEEmbWbApL2tEI4%3D)
---
**This is the withering of educational options in our most at-risk neighborhoods. **

__Because these schools aren't just for Catholics. __

There's a beautiful phrase you will hear from Catholic educators: "We don't teach these kids because _they're_ Catholic. We teach because _we're_ Catholic."

Catholic schools don't just open where there is existing parent wealth. As a charitable work, they serve many communities where quality education is lacking.

**Peter, this is why we fight for school choice –– and supporters like you are making a powerful impact every day.**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION: DEFEND SCHOOL CHOICE**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0b9948ff709f4c418765764c21466cae&_e=foEWOTBVHMh7CG-MdJv34YgNr3D3h0ULZ_y2FCGfdz0DJ_nPHQnLN9azqIwG9qrzWDfkiTdfR0Gnlvwk8pWNWSek1-BXlIu3VALFkSteLxeRgCNsrrdWfSum7ezbX-8AQt3_kslorh1e-DSmrvEHnot0L7mt4AI5ScXMRcZhO52AuL1Of7zrDjI2oT1BOn55PqG98ivqOh4vOypGUlfg7Xfk6wlIhm2r7qN-Q4vnpxWK1fzZyNsbP_NLAb6FX78WE_G1v-DBCvFrycBCn1-TWmkDk5eFvvH1GTaokw7d8iKjtoPrH05wgNrcXYAZ28qtGKoNHoHbvB2En1MZjSHjJ_BmzGvBDMiYZ00WVmP4ef4Tl7mKdfD3mUxeGwzYcXrFJJzy7JhG7ovMGz1uQ1b35OjpRVSlZZWr2tUbydqXWFRve2gVLYwYoQvQX7Yg1OYp_RPCWxG8IEga8GggXv5kk-VYI0xNaYuEk6Ooc1KH3N0%3D)
---
The **American Federation for Children Growth Fund** knows that education needs vary for every individual student. We work to give every child the opportunity to have his or her education needs met.

Whether that's a Catholic school or another type of private school, these diverse options can only survive if families have the freedom to choose.

[**Join us today in fighting for this vital American institution by signing our petition asking lawmakers to let parents choose Catholic schools.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0b9948ff709f4c418765764c21466cae&_e=foEWOTBVHMh7CG-MdJv34YgNr3D3h0ULZ_y2FCGfdz0DJ_nPHQnLN9azqIwG9qrzWDfkiTdfR0Gnlvwk8pWNWSek1-BXlIu3VALFkSteLxeRgCNsrrdWfSum7ezbX-8AQt3_kslorh1e-DSmrvEHnot0L7mt4AI5ScXMRcZhO52AuL1Of7zrDjI2oT1BOn55PqG98ivqOh4vOypGUlfg7Xfk6wlIhm2r7qN-Q4vnpxWK1fzZyNsbP_NLAb6FX78WE_G1v-DBCvFrycBCn1-TWmkDk5eFvvH1GTaokw7d8iKjtoPrH05wgNrcXYAZ28qtGKoNHoHbvB2En1MZjSHjJ8elYXzP9Idg8yvKd4F2D61C0f8jY94v2Zk-CZ8Ce3YZwK4fglw7TnQPwq_MFZZI0-vWxKh4P_Ex9i_U9sJpCjECHifvFeIg_iv2Tj0no3LRMP2U9up7Qfe-LLiSSOahHE69XmTHFzS3YHS-ve49ifI%3D)

Thank you,
Rebekah Bydlak
American Federation for Children Growth Fund

body:
It won’t be long before Trump pours millions into his campaign again
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21254%2E4449941%2EpBFULc)
---
We are getting **UNBELIEVABLY** close to Election Day, and the polls are still showing Trump and Biden neck-and-neck!

_So we’re reaching out to local Democrats to ask what you all think about President Biden:_ | **[DO YOU APPROVE OF PRESIDENT BIDEN?](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_biden?source=FFR_20240413_EMPOLL_E4_T0_GM&t=7&akid=21254%2E4449941%2EpBFULc)** | **[YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_biden?source=FFR_20240413_EMPOLL_E4_T0_GM&t=8&akid=21254%2E4449941%2EpBFULc)**
---
**[NO, I DON’T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_biden?source=FFR_20240413_EMPOLL_E4_T0_GM&t=9&akid=21254%2E4449941%2EpBFULc)**
**[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_biden?source=FFR_20240413_EMPOLL_E4_T0_GM&t=10&akid=21254%2E4449941%2EpBFULc)**
**_10,482 local Democrats have already responded →_**

**Your response is due April 13, 2024 before 11:59PM**
🔻 _Fact_ 🔻\- Donald Trump has enough dark money to drown President Biden in attack ads.

🔻 _Fact_ 🔻\- The polling being this close will make this race even uglier as Trump rushes to smear President Biden.

🔹 _Fact_ 🔹\- It takes grassroots support from Democrats like you to push Biden ahead in the polls so he can win in November!
_**We can’t let Donald Trump win in November, that’s the worst possible scenario – and could end Democracy as we know it.**_
**[RESPONSE REQUIRED FROM YOU: DO YOU APPROVE OF PRESIDENT BIDEN?](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_biden?source=FFR_20240413_EMPOLL_E4_T0_GM&t=11&akid=21254%2E4449941%2EpBFULc)**
**[YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_biden?source=FFR_20240413_EMPOLL_E4_T0_GM&t=12&akid=21254%2E4449941%2EpBFULc)**
---

**[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/approve_biden?source=FFR_20240413_EMPOLL_E4_T0_GM&t=14&akid=21254%2E4449941%2EpBFULc)**

Please pause and do that this evening because we are on the brink of seeing **WWIII** if things continue down this path. ## General Flynn Wants To Meet YOU!
---
America's General, [Michael Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9092490.3932.1.14049675329f9e2ea558c71b6292c6b1), is doing a **Nation-Wide Tour** for his new movie! [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9092490.3933.1.d576e6262953863d0b87c93d25cef00f) wants to invite you to join him in a city that is close to you. At the end of each showing, there will be a live Q&A w/[General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9092490.3934.1.c70562b475d9ef62f4722f537e7a874c). View the locations of the [Flynn Tour](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9092490.3935.1.45f03727ccfa80fe6847541b18897740): [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9092490.3936.1.08cd164dd15cbaf99e422619f874925f) General Flynn will be coming to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9092490.3937.1.8bdce6dd9e168791bdf061e60d2a2767) Tulsa for the premier of the [NEW Flynn Movie](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9092490.3938.1.f9f6c4b65445bc9bd69ff9d819d0b8b2)! **Date** : Monday, May 20, 2024
**Meet & Greet**: 5:00pm
**Show Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **Ticket Link** : [https://www.flynnmovie.com/ref/Tulsa/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9092490.3939.1.3c0cc01636ddf403b3a6cc29e161e977) Follow the [Link](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9092490.3940.1.37205e367f71352f5ad75937afcb7f92) above, click "Get Tickets" and select the Tulsa Show Time. There will be a **LIVE Q &A** with [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9092490.3941.1.4b70dde30ab4a57ea016b8c7c22d578d) after the movie. body:
Would you give $25 -- or even $50? | | |
---
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make your first contribution to President Biden's reelection campaign. Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially right now -- is so important. Here's the truth: April is an FEC fundraising deadline month. This means that at the end of the month we will be required to report how much money we've raised and how many donations we've received. Everyone will be watching -- the press, our opponents, and even supporters will be waiting to see the strength of our campaign. We've received a huge number of individual donations so far -- people of all backgrounds and from all communities. It's a big part of how we've been able to withstand the millions and millions of dollars Republicans are spending on attack ads. But today, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you. Because this is the most important fundraising deadline of the presidential election yet. [Can President Biden count on you to contribute $5, $10, or whatever you can afford today? It's a big part of how we've been able to withstand the millions and millions of dollars Republicans are spending on attack ads. But today, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you. Because this is the most important fundraising deadline of the presidential election yet. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in. It means a lot to our chances. Team Biden-Harris

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: The GOP caught the bus
body:
| |
---
Anti-choice Republicans like Jim Jordan have angered women and will reap what they sow in November. | [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTg1NDE2MjYxNDEzMTI1NzEsXCJyXCI6MTE4NTQxNjcwMDQ0MTQwNjIyfSIsInMiOiJiYjFmZDJiNTI1MmMxN2I2In0)
| |
---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTg1NDE2MjYxNDg2NTI2MDUsXCJyXCI6MTE4NTQxNjcwMDQ0MTQwNjIyfSIsInMiOiIyMDVkOWNlYzMxYWYzNzllIn0)
---
|
---

Friend,

In Arizona, anti-choice Republicans just got what they wanted all along: a total ban on all abortions with criminal penalties for physicians and medical professionals.

And now they are reaping the consequences of what they've sown: a thoroughly angered and energized electorate, led by women who see through this toxic agenda to control our lives, our bodies, and our futures.

I am proud that in Ohio, we led the way last November to enshrine the protections of Roe into our state constitution. **I was on the ground every day for months with advocates fighting to get this on the ballot, and to build a huge, inclusive coalition to get it passed. And we WON—with 57% of the vote. **

But while this was an extremely important measure, it won't be enough if extremists like Jim Jordan are allowed to stay in office and wield power.

Although he has never once passed a single bill into law, Jordan was the lead sponsor of a national abortion ban. **And Jordan is a proud champion of the "Right to Life at Conception" bill, which would give embryos the same legal rights as adults and threaten in-vitro fertilization, as we just saw happen in Alabama.****
**[](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTg1NDE2MjYxNTQ5NDQwNjMsXCJyXCI6MTE4NTQxNjcwMDQ0MTQwNjIyfSIsInMiOiJjZTY1OGNjODRlMzBhMjY4In0)
|
---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTg1NDE2MjYxNjMzMzI2NzIsXCJyXCI6MTE4NTQxNjcwMDQ0MTQwNjIyfSIsInMiOiI1M2M2MzFhNmVmZGUzZGExIn0)
---
|
---
We need to come together on a NATIONAL level and fight to defeat dangerous anti-choice extremists like Jim Jordan.

**We can oust Jordan this year and protect our rights by sending me to Congress in his place. I will sponsor a bill on Day 1 to codify Roe and protect reproductive rights.
****[
Can I count on your help to get me there to fight for our rights? We are at a critical point in this campaign to defeat Jim Jordan, and a contribution of $25, $50, or more is a HUGE help:](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTg1NDE2MjYxNjk2MjQxMjksXCJyXCI6MTE4NTQxNjcwMDQ0MTQwNjIyfSIsInMiOiIzZjY3NTJkMzMwMjA1Y2U1In0)****

name: Erin Conway, Team DNC
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Ever since President Obama's 2012 victory, Democrats have generally dominated Republicans when it comes to small-dollar individual donations. | |
---
Derek -- We send a number of fundraising emails, so we thought you deserve an explanation of why these messages are so important in the fight to elect Joe Biden and Democrats everywhere this November. **Here's the truth:** Ever since President Obama's 2012 victory, Democrats have generally dominated Republicans when it comes to small-dollar individual donations. Where do we get these donations? From emails like the one you're reading right now. So when you see Democrats rising in the polls, when you see our commercials on the air, when you see Democrats win up and down the ballot this November, please know it's the response to emails like this one that make all that possible. Now we don't need you to give to every email we send. No one expects that. But we do hope you'll give to this one -- because we know Republicans are ramping up their big-dollar fundraising, and we need to match those efforts if we're going to win. So please: [**Can you use this link to contribute $7 (or whatever you can) directly to the DNC? We will put your donation right to work electing Democrats everywhere.**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtsWJ4oHmyX6l1dZXrMu59XkqaLmdnimuDefwh5_O-3pR3zk97V47CBkRCqt1gBrFnDYNHu5H5Vpis1MVbrvPHoN52VsUsKSTkkxOY6EuPhH5HlM2GnCt3-_LS-SMNTPqBAo_54nlixskfWEPW5uhUQF0c8QjboEYR_IYMm7rW2XXIk6-RfL-H6mCtZ-qP4V5JwmzzhuEuaIEzOkIgNUmwFxWAKMK_z0rfH9O3LP0r8hqZRT7616NfOy0kikEYMRlmcvaEDLdKSWaEqtdbHglYKMH9CE5MzjMPvpvV_mRtW71b6I_UwOQ8Jeu0GcNEnXUP_yvag9moI3o1sar7YgOZv_BSXheV2EYlRouDtCdl3pLacfZnhikxDLqZZxm-ghiz/45h/vVQ1QYtsQc-vWvhHBIyKZQ/h0/h001.GeRBTHpVgygueS5zSWq4DEMtLNS6VjHXAKaaAEti-ts)

clean_body: Ever since President Obama's 2012 victory, Democrats have generally dominated Republicans when it comes to small-dollar individual donations. | | Derek -- We send a number of fundraising emails, so we thought you deserve an explanation of why these messages are so important in the fight to elect Joe Biden and Democrats everywhere this November. Here's the truth: Ever since President Obama's 2012 victory, Democrats have generally dominated Republicans when it comes to small-dollar individual donations. Where do we get these donations? From emails like the one you're reading right now. So when you see Democrats rising in the polls, when you see our commercials on the air, when you see Democrats win up and down the ballot this November, please know it's the response to emails like this one that make all that possible. Now we don't need you to give to every email we send. No one expects that. But we do hope you'll give to this one -- because we know Republicans are ramping up their big-dollar fundraising, and we need to match those efforts if we're going to win. So please: Thank you. Democratic victories this November would not be possible without people like you stepping up. Know you're making a difference with your donation today. Erin Erin Conway Grassroots Fundraising Director Democratic National Committee | | | | ---|---|--- Text JOIN to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, .
